description: Activate 1 (manipulate)The aquarium lamp is a combination light source and exotic animal aquarium, intended to provide rich nobles amusement and illumination.

name: Arachnolute

description: These soft leather boots are embossed with simple woodland scenes.

name: Arboreal Boots (Greater)
description: These soft leather boots are embossed with simple woodland scenes.

description: This gnarled wand is made from the branch of an arboreal.

description: This gnarled wand is made from the branch of an arboreal.

name: Arcane Scroll Case of Simplicity
description: The four different types of scroll cases of simplicity often bear adornments appropriate to their magical tradition, such as angelic wings or otherworldly lettering.

name: Archaic Wayfinder
description: Activate Cast a Spell An archaic wayfinder functions as a compass and acts as a repository for one cantrip cast into it.

name: Architect's Pattern Book
description: Typically created by wizards who are hobbyists or professional architects, an architect's pattern book allows the caster to customize certain spells that create magical structures or domiciles, adding recreational areas such as an indoor bathhouse, gaming room, swimming pool, or similar luxury.

name: Archivist's Gaze
description: This strange contraption slides over your eyes, supernaturally sharpening your mind.

name: Arctic Vigor
description: This tattoo takes the shape of the face of a roaring polar bear with piercing, ice-blue eyes.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Arctic Vigor (Greater)
description: This tattoo takes the shape of the face of a roaring polar bear with piercing, ice-blue eyes.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Armbands of Athleticism

name: Armbands of Athleticism (Greater)
description: Skilled awl work has imprinted images of a muscled weightlifter into these tiered leather bands, which grant you enhanced stamina and skill when performing athletic exercises.

name: Armor Latches
description: This armor is easily doffed.

name: Armor of the Holy Warrior
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall

description: Magic wards deflect attacks.

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall

description: You need these tools to create items from raw materials with the Craft skill.

name: Ash Gown (Greater)
description: Greater ash gowns are formal wear spun from smoke, ash, and char collected from the Plane of Fire.

name: Ashen

name: Asp Coil
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Assassin's Bracers (Type I)
description: These paired bracers of red leather appear as plain armbands on the outside but display the branded symbol of on the inside.

name: Assassin's Bracers (Type II)
description: These paired bracers of red leather appear as plain armbands on the outside but display the branded symbol of on the inside.

description: These paired bracers of red leather appear as plain armbands on the outside but display the branded symbol of on the inside.

name: Astral (Greater)
description: Astral weapons command powerful spiritual energy from the Astral Plane.

name: Astringent Venom

name: Aurifying Salts
description: Activate A Interact You can apply this pale eggshell powder to one outfit, one object of up to Medium size, or up to 10 smaller objects in the same space, such as jewelry, to make them appear gilded for 1 hour.
source: Pathfinder #157: Devil at the Dreaming Palace

name: Aurochs Jerky

name: Aurochs' Might Tattoo (Greater)
description: The aurochs depicted by this tattoo is a powerful symbol of strength and resilience.

name: Aurochs' Might Tattoo (Lesser)
description: The aurochs depicted by this tattoo is a powerful symbol of strength and resilience.

name: Aurochs' Might Tattoo (Moderate)
description: The aurochs depicted by this tattoo is a powerful symbol of strength and resilience.

name: Authorized

name: Avalanche Boots
description: While the insides of these boots are comfortable, fur-lined leather, the outsides are a jumble of slate plates, giving the impression of a rockslide.

name: Avalanche of Stones Snare
description: When a creature enters the snare's square, the snare releases countless stones to batter the creature, dealing @Damage[22d8[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:40|basic|showDC:all]).
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Avernal Cape
description: Made from preserved crimson worm hide, this thick leather cape can deflect incoming blows without serious damage.
source: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm

name: Awakened Adamantine Shot
description: Ammunition round Activate 1 (manipulate)These bullets are formed from a liquefied high-grade precious metal and enchanted to unlock that metal's true potential.

description: Ammunition round Activate 1 (manipulate)These bullets are formed from a liquefied high-grade precious metal and enchanted to unlock that metal's true potential.

source: Pathfinder Adventure: Crown of the Kobold King

description: A lit candle sheds dim light in a 10‐foot radius for 8 hours.

name: Candle of Inflamed Passions
description: Activate 1 (manipulate) This blood-red candle is made from wax derived from oil shale found in certain parts of the Plane of Fire.

name: Candle of Invocation
description: Activate 1 Interact This golden candle bears the symbol of a specific deity emblazoned on its surface, surrounded by the iconography of that deity's faith.

name: Candle of Revealing
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)When lit, this black candle's eerie blue flame reveals the presence of creatures.

name: Candle of Truth
description: Activate A (manipulate) This tapered candle has a golden wick that burns with white fire.

name: Candlecap
description: The crown of a candlecap is stitched leather sewn in the shape of a small bowl.

name: Cane
description: A cane is a straight cane with a curved handle, shaped like the tip of a hook.

name: Cane of the Maelstrom
source: Pathfinder #162: Ruins of the Radiant Siege

name: Cantrip Deck (5-pack)
description: In an effort to spread the knowledge of magic as widely as possible, worshippers of Nethys discovered a way to bind cantrips into cards accessible even to non-spellcasters.

name: Cantrip Deck (Full Pack)
description: In an effort to spread the knowledge of magic as widely as possible, worshippers of Nethys discovered a way to bind cantrips into cards accessible even to non-spellcasters.

name: Cape of Grand Entrances
description: This regal blue cape is crafted from a hefty yet elegant velvet embroidered with ornate silver stars and dragons.

name: Cape of Illumination (Greater)
description: This golden cape, embroidered with vibrant red sun rays, sparkles like sunlight reflecting off the ocean.

name: Cape of Illumination (Lesser)
description: This golden cape, embroidered with vibrant red sun rays, sparkles like sunlight reflecting off the ocean.

name: Cape of Illumination (Moderate)
description: This golden cape, embroidered with vibrant red sun rays, sparkles like sunlight reflecting off the ocean.

name: Cape of Justice
description: While Yaezhing is feared and seldom worshipped in the open, some regions of Tian Xia see him as a god of necessary evil and their only hope for justice.
source: Pathfinder #196: The Summer That Never Was

name: Cape of the Open Sky
description: This cloth of gold cape was originally gifted to one of Goka's emperors centuries ago.

name: Capsaicin Tonic
description: This translucent, pale-yellow drink has several pepper seeds suspended within it.

name: Captivating Bauble
description: Activate 3 envision, Interact Requirements You are a master in Deception or Diplomacy.

name: Captivating Rosebud
description: Named because of its popularity among thieves to distract any authorities in pursuit, a captivating rosebud has a near-irresistible fragrance.

name: Captivating Score
description: Activate 2 envision, Interact A captivating score is a piece of parchment prepared for musical notation, long enough for a short song.

name: Careless Delight
description: Activate 1 Interact Sometimes called liquid persuasion, this sweet-tasting tincture induces euphoria that lowers inhibitions and increases trust.

name: Caress of the Great Serpent
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

name: Carrion Cask
description: This stylized, palm-sized box contains a black, ooze-like substance that can easily devour a corpse in moments, breaking the body down into a necromantic sludge.

name: Cartographer's Kit
description: This kit includes a writing set, a compass, a standard astrolabe, a ruler, and a survey map.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Cassisian Helmet
description: A small, feathered wing is attached to either side of this ornate brass helmet.

name: Cassock of Devotion
description: Each cassock of devotion depicts scenes related to the domains of a certain deity.

name: Cat's Eye Elixir
description: Activate A (manipulate)After you consume this elixir, your vision sharpens and you become sensitive to even the most minute movements.

name: Catch Pole
description: This sturdy pole has a rope attached to one end in a loop with the other end extending to the handle.

name: Catching
description: A catching rune creates a small, magical vacuum that attempts to pull weapons away from opponents.

name: Cauldron of Nightmares
description: Engraved with carvings of tortured souls, this green cauldron has two abilities that allow it to capture nightmares and then unleash them on the world.
source: Pathfinder #161: Belly of the Black Whale

name: Caustic Deteriorating Dust
description: Contained in a specially enchanted small leather or hide sack, deteriorating dust is a potent caustic agent and a prized item among Rovagug's more discreet followers.

name: Cauterizing Torch
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This small, clockwork torch device uses a trigger-operated sparker to ignite a flow of flammable gas, creating a short, hot flame capable of rapidly cauterizing wounds and helping to stop bleeding.

name: Cauthooj Bagpipes
description: The main portion of this set of bagpipes is fashioned from the dried skin of a cauthooj, with the feathers still attached.

name: Cave Worm Venom
description: Activate 2 (manipulate)Venom from enormous cave worms leaves a victim weakened.

name: Cavern's Heart
description: This armor can channel your life force into an enhanced .

name: Cayden's Brew
description: Activate 1 Interact Cayden's brew is like rich beer or ale, with a golden-brown color and foamy head.

name: Cayden's Brew (Double)
description: Activate 1 Interact Cayden's brew is like rich beer or ale, with a golden-brown color and foamy head.

name: Cayden's Brew (Triple)
description: Activate 1 Interact Cayden's brew is like rich beer or ale, with a golden-brown color and foamy head.

name: Celestial Hair
description: Usage affixed to armor Activate F Interact Trigger You critically fail a saving throw or are critically hit by an attack This strand of hair shimmers like the strands of fate.

name: Celestial Peach (Life)
description: Activate 1 Interact Among Hao Jin's most precious treasures are three living plants, the last surviving celestial peach trees taken from the mountains of Chu Ye.

name: Celestial Peach (Rejuvenation)
description: Activate 1 Interact Among Hao Jin's most precious treasures are three living plants, the last surviving celestial peach trees taken from the mountains of Chu Ye.

name: Celestial Peachwood Sword
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

name: Cerulean Scourge
description: Activate 2 (manipulate)This poison is infamous for making the victim's blood vessels glow with a bright blue light before painfully bursting.

name: Chain (10 feet)
description: 10 feet of chain.

name: Chain of Stars
description: Activate f envision Trigger You hit a creature with the affixed weapon.

name: Chain of the Stilled Spirit
description: This 3-foot length of chain is made of a mystical blue-white steel.

name: Chair of Inventions
description: This wheelchair is outfitted with a variety of tools and devices to assist with the creation and production of a number of mechanical implements.

name: Chair Storage
description: Chair storage can be purchased and applied to any wheelchair.

name: Chakram
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Chalice of Ozem
description: This ruby-studded dawnsilver chalice can't be harmed by any substance it holds, no matter how caustic.

name: Chameleon Suit
description: Activate 2 (manipulate)This complex clockwork outerwear, worn over armor or other clothing, is composed of thin, interlocking scales of myriad colors attached to numerous clockwork gears that can rotate between all visible colors and shades.

name: Chameleon Suit (Greater)
description: Activate 2 (manipulate)This complex clockwork outerwear, worn over armor or other clothing, is composed of thin, interlocking scales of myriad colors attached to numerous clockwork gears that can rotate between all visible colors and shades.

name: Channel Protection Amulet
description: This nugget of polished tektite is trapped in a cage of braided wire and hangs from a silken cord.

name: Chaos Collar
description: This unobtrusive collar is made to hide beneath an animal's fur or blend in against scaled skin.

name: Chaos Falcon Feather
description: Activate Cast a SpellWhen used as catalysts, chaos falcon feathers lend flexibility to spells that deal with elemental energy.

name: Charlatan's Cape
description: This bright red-and-gold cape is often interlaced with glittery threads and serves as a distraction.

name: Charlatan's Gloves
description: Tiny silver hooks decorate these fine silk gloves.

name: Charlatan's Gloves (Greater)
description: Tiny silver hooks decorate these fine silk gloves.

name: Charm of Resistance
description: This charm, normally hung from the belt or worn around the neck, grants you resistance 5 against one type of energy damage: acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic.

name: Charm of Resistance (Greater)
description: This charm, normally hung from the belt or worn around the neck, grants you resistance 10 against one type of energy damage: acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic.

name: Charm of Resistance (Major)
description: This charm, normally hung from the belt or worn around the neck, grants you resistance 15 against one type of energy damage: acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic.

name: Charm of the Ordinary
description: Activate 2 envision, Interact Carved from a chunk of sturdy hardwood, this small charm is shaped like a broom, a wooden barrel, a lantern, or another ordinary item.

name: Cheetah's Elixir (Greater)
description: Activate A (manipulate)Enzymatic compounds in this elixir strengthen and excite the muscles in your legs.

name: Cheetah's Elixir (Lesser)
description: Activate A (manipulate) Enzymatic compounds in this elixir strengthen and excite the muscles in your legs.

description: Activate A (manipulate) Enzymatic compounds in this elixir strengthen and excite the muscles in your legs.

name: Chest
description: A wooden chest can hold up to 8 Bulk of items.

name: Chilled Fire Noodles

description: Activate 3 (manipulate) Access Tian Xia originThese cool noodles are served with dark fermented sauces and vinegars before finally being tossed with spicy chili oil.

name: Chime of Opening

name: Chimera Thread
description: Activate 10 minutes (Interact) This multicolored skein is twisted together from strands of many different materials.

name: Choker of Elocution
description: This platinum choker bears characters from a language's alphabet, and it gives knowledge of that language and the associated culture's customs.

name: Choker of Elocution (Greater)
description: This platinum choker bears characters from three language's alphabet, and it gives knowledge of those languages and the associated culture's customs.

name: Choker-Arm Mutagen (Greater)

name: Choker-Arm Mutagen (Lesser)
description: Activate 1 Interact For 1 minute your limbs become extremely limber, letting you stretch and twist to extreme degrees at the cost of fine motor skills.

description: Activate 1 Interact For 1 hour your limbs become extremely limber, letting you stretch and twist to extreme degrees at the cost of fine motor skills.

name: Choker-Arm Mutagen (Moderate)

name: Choleric Contagion
description: Activate 2 Interact This vile poison is contagious, causing the victim's skin to secrete the toxin, allowing it to spread to others.

name: Chopping Evisceration Snare
description: An almost-impossible number of axes spring out at a target with lethal force.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Choral Toga
description: This elegant toga is infused with inexhaustible energy to enjoy life possessed by azatas.

name: Chromatic Jellyfish Oil (Greater)
description: Activate 1 Interact Made from several oils of differing hues extracted from jellyfish and rare plants, the layers of chromatic jellyfish oil stack to form a rainbow within their vial.

name: Chromatic Jellyfish Oil (Lesser)
description: Activate 1 Interact Made from several oils of differing hues extracted from jellyfish and rare plants, the layers of chromatic jellyfish oil stack to form a rainbow within their vial.

name: Chromatic Jellyfish Oil (Moderate)
description: Activate 1 Interact Made from several oils of differing hues extracted from jellyfish and rare plants, the layers of chromatic jellyfish oil stack to form a rainbow within their vial.

name: Chronicler Wayfinder

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Chrysoberyl symbol of an evil eye
Cindergrass Cloak
description: This hooded cloak woven of long, waxy grass is designed so it can close over your entire body.

name: Cindergrass Poultice
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This thick, waxy gel erases the effects of flame.

name: Cinnamon Seers
description: Zippy, alchemically treated cinnamon suffuses cinnamon seers, a rock candy with a lively taste that provides a mental boost.

name: Cipher of Elemental Planes
description: This device is made from two metal discs, one slightly smaller than the other, each bearing a variety of runes and symbols along their outer edges.

name: Circlet of Persuasion
description: This elegant silver band often resembles curling fig leaves and fits around your brow.

name: Clandestine Cloak
description: When you pull up the hood of this nondescript gray cloak (an Interact action), you become drab and uninteresting, gaining a +1 item bonus to Stealth checks and to Deception checks to a forgettable background character, such as a servant, but also taking a -1 item penalty to Diplomacy and Intimidatio

name: Clandestine Cloak (Greater)
description: When you pull up the hood of this nondescript gray cloak (an Interact action), you become drab and uninteresting, gaining a +2 item bonus to Stealth checks and to Deception checks to a forgettable background character, such as a servant, but also taking a -1 item penalty to Diplomacy and Intimidatio

name: Clarity Goggles (Greater)
description: Clarity goggles feature faceted lenses that filter your surroundings from several slightly different angles at once, giving you a sharper picture of them.

name: Clarity Goggles (Lesser)
description: Clarity goggles feature faceted lenses that filter your surroundings from several slightly different angles at once, giving you a sharper picture of them.

name: Clay

name: Clay Sphere
description: This dry clay ball becomes malleable when activated, shifting into a variety of forms.

description: This dry clay ball becomes malleable when activated, shifting into a variety of forms.

name: Clay Sphere (Major)
description: This dry clay ball becomes malleable when activated, shifting into a variety of forms.

name: Cleft Head Marking (Greater)

name: Cleft Head Marking (Lesser)
description: Caution and misdirection are the hallmarks of your hold.

name: Climbing Bolt
description: The shaft of this bolt is wrapped with fine twine.

name: Climbing Kit
description: This satchel includes 50 feet of rope, pulleys, a dozen pitons, a hammer, a grappling hook, and one set of crampons.

name: Climbing Kit (Extreme)
description: This satchel includes 50 feet of rope, pulleys, a dozen pitons, a hammer, a grappling hook, and one set of crampons.

name: Clinging Bubbles (Greater)

description: This small vial of viscous, clear, soapy solution comes with a wand, attached to the inside of the vial's cap, with a little loop at its end.

name: Clinging Ooze Snare
description: Complex traps that incorporate ooze monsters into their ingenious construction have long been a favorite of those who seek devious ways to protect their hidden laboratories, and it is from this tradition that the clinging ooze snare takes its inspiration.

name: Cloak of Devouring Thorns
description: This cloak appears to be woven from a thousand living leaves, hungry for flesh and eager to defend the cloak's wearer.

name: Cloak of Elvenkind
description: This cloak is deep green with a voluminous hood, embroidered with gold trim and symbols significant in elven culture.

name: Cloak of Elvenkind (Greater)
description: This cloak is deep green with a voluminous hood, embroidered with gold trim and symbols significant in elven culture.

name: Cloak of Feline Rest
description: This black velvet cloak is featureless and very soft to the touch.

name: Cloak of Gnawing Leaves
description: This cloak appears to be woven from a thousand living leaves, hungry for flesh and eager to defend the cloak's wearer.

name: Cloak of Illusions
description: This cloak flows, covering and concealing the wearer's body.

name: Cloak of Illusions (Greater)
description: This cloak flows, covering and concealing the wearer's body.

name: Cloak of Immolation
description: Appearing as a magic cloak such as a clandestine cloak, this garment is made of highly volatile fabric.

name: Cloak of Repute
description: This gaudy and extravagant cloak is adorned with brilliant gems and a fur trim.

name: Cloak of Repute (Greater)
description: This gaudy and extravagant cloak is adorned with brilliant gems and a fur trim.

name: Cloak of Repute (Major)
description: This gaudy and extravagant cloak is adorned with brilliant gems and a fur trim.

name: Cloak of Swiftness
description: This thin cloak is surprisingly light, as if clouds or the very wind were woven together to make the garment.

name: Cloak of the Bat
description: Sewn from several long strips of luxurious brown and black silk, this cloak grants you a +2 item bonus to Stealth checks as well as to Acrobatics checks to .

name: Cloak of the Bat (Greater)
description: Sewn from several long strips of luxurious brown and black silk, this cloak grants you a +3 item bonus to Stealth checks as well as to Acrobatics checks to .

name: Cloak of the False Foe
description: Images of strange animals and distorted figures are woven into this coarse, fur-lined cloak.

name: Cloak of Thirsty Fronds
description: This cloak appears to be woven from a thousand living leaves, hungry for flesh and eager to defend the cloak's wearer.

name: Cloak of Waves & Clouds
description: This magical cloak was crafted from the feathers and scales of a legendary giant fish that could transform into a resplendent bird.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

name: Clockwork Bookshelf
description: This device was originally created by an inventor who had way more books they wanted to access than available wall space to store them.

name: Clockwork Box Packer
description: This handy clockwork device is too expensive for most warehouses and shipping docks to make use of it, but some nobles have purchased the item for their staff as a status symbol, and merchants who are in the shipping trade can afford to slowly reap the benefits of its usage.

name: Clockwork Chirper
description: This simple clockwork bird is no larger than a sparrow, designed to be wound up and perched on a tree branch or ledge.

name: Clockwork Cloak
description: Paper-thin interlocking gears and winding cogs make up this bronze cloak.

name: Clockwork Dial
description: This small timepiece allows you to accurately track time, useful for coordinating attacks, cooking, and all other sorts of activities, without the steadiness or care necessary to use an hourglass.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Clockwork Goggles
description: Activate 2 (manipulate)This heavy set of mechanical goggles contains a variety of different lenses for different situations, including lenses that filter light at different intensities and frequencies and even some that capture heat and other stimuli.

name: Clockwork Goggles (Greater)
description: Activate 2 (manipulate)This heavy set of mechanical goggles contains a variety of different lenses for different situations, including lenses that filter light at different intensities and frequencies and even some that capture heat and other stimuli.

name: Clockwork Heels

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Clockwork Helm
description: Rotating gears cover the outside of this imposing helmet.
source: Pathfinder #161: Belly of the Black Whale

name: Clockwork Macuahuitl
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Clockwork Megaphone
description: A clockwork megaphone uses cunning clockwork gears to adjust the shape and angle of the cone within the megaphone, allowing you to raise or lower the volume, widen or contract the angle in which you project your voice, or both at the same time.

name: Clockwork Monkey
description: These cute and unassuming toy monkeys are often dressed in loud clothing and carry a percussion instrument.

name: Clockwork Recorder
description: This small recording device can be as tiny as a music box or around the size of large book and is typically concealed in hollowed-out books and jewelry.

name: Clockwork Rejuvenator
description: Activate 1 or 2 Interact Requirements The round you activate the rejuvenator, you must first spend either 1 or 2 Interact actions to wind the device.
source: Pathfinder #161: Belly of the Black Whale

name: Clockwork Songbird
description: Originally constructed by the Thassilonian wizard Liralarue to serve as a key for a treasure vault, this clockwork songbird has other functions as well.

name: Clockwork Spider Bomb
description: Activate 1 Interact While arachnophobes don't need to fear this contraption's spiderlike appearance, they should probably worry if it starts ticking.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Cloning Potion
description: Activate 1 Interact When you drink a cloning potion, you split in two, one version of you remaining in your space and the other moving into an adjacent space.

name: Cloth of Nullification
description: This small piece of embroidered cloth is inimical to all magic.

name: Clothing (Desert)
description: Desert clothing is made up of loose-fitting, light, breathable clothes that protect your head and body from the sun and allow you to cool off easily.

name: Clothing (Fine)
description: Fine clothing, suitable for a noble or royal, is made with expensive fabrics, precious metals, and intricate patterns.

name: Clothing (High-Fashion Fine)
description: Fine clothing, suitable for a noble or royal, is made with expensive fabrics, precious metals, and intricate patterns.

name: Clothing (Ordinary)
description: Ordinary clothing is functional with basic tailoring, such as peasant garb, monk's robes, or work clothes.

name: Cloud Buns
description: Activate 1 (manipulate) Access Tian Xia originWhite, pillowy dough surrounds an interior containing minced meats, spices, and herbs.

description: Activate 1 (manipulate) Access Tian Xia originWhite, pillowy dough surrounds an interior containing minced meats, spices, and herbs.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

name: Cloud Pouch

name: Clown Monarch
description: Activate 2 Interact A victim of clown monarch is amusing to behold as they repeatedly suffer slapstick pratfalls.

name: Clubhead Poison
description: Activate 2 Interact This poison is named for the strain of fungi from which it's distilled.

name: Coating
description: When etched, this rune creates an extradimensional space that links to the weapon that wields it.

name: Codebreaker's Parchment
description: This finely crafted, seemingly mundane parchment is useful for writing sensitive documents.

description: This finely crafted, seemingly mundane parchment is useful for writing sensitive documents.

description: This finely crafted, seemingly mundane parchment is useful for writing sensitive documents.

name: Codex of Unimpeded Sight
description: A female figure peers through her blindfold from the cover of this stately tome.

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Communication Pendants
description: Each of these matching necklaces has been constructed using one half of a purple teardrop-shaped gem, split in two.

name: Communion Mat
description: This pageless grimoire is made up of two durable covers that open to display a small ritual circle.

name: Compass
description: A compass helps you or navigate, provided you're in a location with uniform magnetic fields.

name: Compass (Lensatic)
description: A compass helps you or navigate, provided you're in a location with uniform magnetic fields.

name: Compass of Transpositional Awareness
description: The silver face of this glass-encased compass is etched with dozens of esoteric symbols, obscure icons, and inscrutable abbreviations.

name: Compound Eyes
description: You replace your eyes with ones similar to an insect's or a crustacean's, which allow you to better pinpoint movement.

name: Comprehension Elixir (Greater)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This bitter draught opens your mind to the potential of the written word.

name: Comprehension Elixir (Lesser)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This bitter draught opens your mind to the potential of the written word.

name: Concealed Holster
description: This leather holster is crafted to better hide small firearms from view.

name: Concealed Sheath
description: This leather sheath is large enough to hold an item of up to light Bulk and is typically used for daggers, wands, thieves' tools, and similar objects.

name: Concealment Coin
description: This hollow piece resembles a typical coin and features enough space inside to hide brief messages written on small pieces of paper.

name: Conch of Otherworldly Seas
description: Magical writing covers the surface of this beautiful conch shell, which emits a blue light from inside.

name: Condensed Mana
description: Activate 2 Strike Condensed mana is a crystal vial filled with concentrated miasma from the Mana Wastes.

name: Conducting
description: A conducting weapon can channel energy through it.

name: Conduit Shot (Greater)
description: Ammunition any Activate 1 command Fine lines of djezet sparkle in conduit shot.

name: Conduit Shot (Lesser)
description: Ammunition any Activate 1 command Fine lines of djezet sparkle in conduit shot.

name: Conduit Shot (Moderate)
description: Ammunition any Activate 1 command Fine lines of djezet sparkle in conduit shot.

name: Confabulator
description: This device attaches to any non-percussive musical instrument, allowing a non-verbal character to shape the sounds of the instrument into speech.

name: Conrasu Coin (Arbiter)
description: Activate F envision Trigger You attempt a Diplomacy check to .

name: Conrasu Coin (Bythos)
description: Activate F envision Trigger You're targeted with an attack but the opponent hasn't rolled yet.

name: Conspirator's Cookie
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)The shape and exact flavor of these chocolate-covered cookies vary slightly based on who prepares them and the language they are imbued with when crafted.

name: Constricting Whip Tail
description: You have a strong, prehensile tail.

name: Contagion Metabolizer (Greater)
description: Activate 1 Interact Contagion metabolizers seek out toxins in the bloodstream and attempt to purify them into humors the body processes naturally.

name: Contagion Metabolizer (Lesser)
description: Activate 1 Interact Contagion metabolizers seek out toxins in the bloodstream and attempt to purify them into humors the body processes naturally.

name: Contagion Metabolizer (Moderate)
description: Activate 1 Interact Contagion metabolizers seek out toxins in the bloodstream and attempt to purify them into humors the body processes naturally.

name: Conundrum Spectacles
description: These wire spectacles have been fitted with circular glass lenses.

name: Conundrum Spectacles (Greater)
description: These wire spectacles have been fitted with circular glass lenses.

name: Cooling Elixir (Greater)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This elixir is made from salamander scales to withstand fire.

name: Cooling Elixir (Lesser)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This elixir is made from salamander scales to withstand fire.

name: Cooling Elixir (Moderate)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This elixir is made from salamander scales to withstand fire.

name: Cooperative Waffles
description: Activate 10 minutes (Interact) Flash-cooked on a waffle iron and drizzled with alchemical syrups and compound butter, cooperative waffles bolster the supportive spirit of those who share the batch.

name: Cooperative Waffles (Greater)
description: Activate 10 minutes (Interact) Flash-cooked on a waffle iron and drizzled with alchemical syrups and compound butter, cooperative waffles bolster the supportive spirit of those who share the batch.

name: Copper Penny
description: Activate f envision Trigger You are knocked Requirements You're an expert in Acrobatics, and you are unarmored.

name: Coral idol of an elemental lord
Cordelia's Construct Key
description: Worn on a necklace, this intricate key grants you greater facility with constructs.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Cordelia's Greater Construct Key
description: Worn on a necklace, this intricate key grants you greater facility with constructs.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Coronet of Stars
description: This short golden crown bears a number of gems, each placed in the center of an engraving of a star.
source: Pathfinder #192: Worst of All Possible Worlds

name: Corpse Compass
description: This bone compass, made of the bones of sapient creatures that died violent deaths, is eerily effective when it comes to locating corpses.

name: Corpsecaller Round
description: Ammunition round Activate 1 Interact This bullet is crafted entirely from obsidian and engraved with hair-thin runes.

name: Corpseward Pendant
description: A corpseward pendant is usually shaped like the skull of a humanoid or small animal.

name: Corrective Lenses
description: A set of corrective lenses might take the form of eyeglasses or specialized goggles worn over the eyes.

name: Corrosive
description: Acid sizzles across the surface of the weapon.

name: Corrosive (Greater)
description: Acid sizzles across the surface of the weapon.

name: Corrosive Ammunition
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This peculiar ammunition is coated in yellow dust that leaves a stain on anything it touches.

name: Corrosive Engravings
description: These tin sheets are bound in brass and show significant signs of erosion.

name: Corruption Cassock
description: Perception [[/r 1d20+20]]; precise vision 30 feet, imprecise hearing 30 feet, constant detect alignment Communication telepathy (Celestial, Common, four other languages) Skills Deception [[/r 1d20+21]], Diplomacy [[/r 1d20+19]], Religion [[/r 1d20+19]] Int +2, Wis +5, Cha +4 Will [[/r 1d20+20]] Devo

name: Countering Charm
description: This glittering charm is made of a gemstone flawed with a leaden inclusion.

name: Countering Charm (Greater)
description: This glittering charm is made of a gemstone flawed with a leaden inclusion.

name: Countering Charm (Major)
description: This glittering charm is made of a gemstone flawed with a leaden inclusion.

name: Courtier's Pillow Book
description: This elegant journal has a detailed social dossier on the owner's acquaintances.

name: Covenant Tea
description: Activate 1 Interact or 10 minutes (concentrate, Interact) This green tea is often steeped in a pot with a dried persimmon.

name: Cowl of Keys
description: This simple, tattered cloak is a faded green and features small, stylized keys sewn throughout its length.
source: Pathfinder #192: Worst of All Possible Worlds

name: Coyote Cloak
description: This dusty coat is made of mangy brown-and-gray coyote fur.

name: Coyote Cloak (Greater)
description: This dusty coat is made of mangy brown-and-gray coyote fur.

name: Crackling Bubble Gum (Greater)
description: This tangy gum cracks and pops in your mouth as you chew it.

name: Crackling Bubble Gum (Lesser)
description: This tangy gum cracks and pops in your mouth as you chew it.

name: Crackling Bubble Gum (Major)
description: This tangy gum cracks and pops in your mouth as you chew it.

name: Crackling Bubble Gum (Moderate)
description: This tangy gum cracks and pops in your mouth as you chew it.

name: Crafter's Eyepiece
description: This rugged metal eyepiece etched with square patterns is designed to be worn over a single eye.

name: Crafter's Eyepiece (Greater)
description: This rugged metal eyepiece etched with square patterns is designed to be worn over a single eye.

name: Creeping Death
description: Activate 2 Interact Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:22] Onset 1 round Maximum Duration 6 rounds Stage 1 @Damage[2d6[poison]] damage and Stunned 1 (2 rounds) Stage 2 @Damage[2d6[poison]] damage and (1 round) Stage 3 @Damage[2d6[poison]] damage and controlled (2 days) Stage 4 dead.

name: Cresset of Grisly Interrogation
description: This iron cresset appears as a cage-like basket with a metal bowl fitted into its base-a bowl sized perfectly to hold the severed head of a Medium or Small humanoid.
source: Pathfinder Adventure: Crown of the Kobold King

name: Crimson Fulcrum Lens
description: This concave lens has a drifting crimson cloud resembling slowly swirling blood within it.

name: Crimson Tome
description: These tomes are sacred to the Red Mantis assassins, who use them to scribe their spells and record their violent deeds.

name: Crimson Worm Repellent
description: Activate 1 minute (Interact) Cave worm repellent is a highly noxious oil that can be applied to a creature or sprinkled in a circle around a 10-foot-radius area.
source: Pathfinder #155: Lord of the Black Sands

name: Crooner's Cravat
description: This long, silky neckcloth has the ability to be tied into a convincing semblance of an elegant evening scarf, a worker's neck kerchief, an elaborate cravat, or any other neckwear.

name: Crowbar
description: When Forcing Open an object that doesn't have an easy grip, a crowbar makes it easier to gain the necessary leverage.

name: Crowbar (Levered)
description: When Forcing Open an object that doesn't have an easy grip, a crowbar makes it easier to gain the necessary leverage.

name: Crown of Insight
description: A series of evenly spaced, unblinking tattooed eyes line your skin.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Crown of Intellect
description: A trio of brilliant gems have been set into this elegant golden crown.

name: Crown of the Companion
description: Stories tell of a forgotten king who once loved his subjects so much he was willing to give his own life energy for them, using an object like the crown of the companion.

name: Crown of the Fire Eater
description: A wreath of flames dances around the rim of this golden crown.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Crown of the Fire Eater (Greater)
description: A wreath of flames dances around the rim of this golden crown.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Crown of the Fire Eater (Major)
description: A wreath of flames dances around the rim of this golden crown.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Crown of the Kobold King
description: Originally, this magical crown was to be known as the Crown of Toil-a magic item crafted by the dwarven priest named Gristogar.
source: Pathfinder Adventure: Crown of the Kobold King

name: Crown of Witchcraft
description: An elegant accoutrement for a witch who has come into the higher echelons of power, a crown of witchcraft typically looks like a garland of flowering twigs, a jeweled circlet, or a tall hat of fine fabric.

name: Crown of Witchcraft (Greater)
description: An elegant accoutrement for a witch who has come into the higher echelons of power, a crown of witchcraft typically looks like a garland of flowering twigs, a jeweled circlet, or a tall hat of fine fabric.

name: Crushing
description: Weapons with this rune empower your strength, and attacks with these weapons leave your foe staggered.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Crushing (Greater)
description: Weapons with this rune empower your strength, and attacks with these weapons leave your foe staggered.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Crushing Bough Bracers
description: Carved from the heartwood of some impossibly large tree on the Plane of Wood or First World, crushing bough bracers enable wearers to cling to and shape plant material with ease.

name: Crutch
description: Crutches come as singles or as a pair depending on how much support you need while walking.

name: Crying Angel Pendant
description: Activate 2 (concentrate)When you activate this alabaster pendant, attempt to using Medicine with a +1 item bonus to the check.

name: Cryolite Eye
description: You tore your eye from the socket and offered it to whatever spirit would take it.

name: Cryomister (Greater)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)When you Activate a cryomister, you can either place it in an adjacent square or toss it up to 20 feet away.

name: Cryomister (Lesser)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)When you Activate a cryomister, you can either place it in an adjacent square or toss it up to 20 feet away.

name: Cryomister (Major)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)When you Activate a cryomister, you can either place it in an adjacent square or toss it up to 20 feet away.

name: Cryomister (Moderate)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)When you Activate a cryomister, you can either place it in an adjacent square or toss it up to 20 feet away.

name: Crystal Ball (Clear Quartz)
description: This polished crystal sphere enhances scrying magic.

name: Crystal Ball (Moonstone)
description: This polished crystal sphere enhances scrying magic.

name: Crystal Ball (Obsidian)
description: This polished crystal sphere enhances scrying magic.

name: Crystal Ball (Peridot)
description: This polished crystal sphere enhances scrying magic.

name: Crystal Ball (Selenite)
description: This polished crystal sphere enhances scrying magic.

name: Cube of Force
description: A cube of force is an enchanted cube that measures an inch across.

name: Cube of Nex
description: The Cube of Nex is an enchanted cube that measures an inch across.

name: Cube of Recall
description: This small cube has smooth matte sides.

name: Cultist Cowl
description: The fabric of a cultist cowl is either raspy burlap, durable cotton, or fine silk, depending on the item's power (and thus the implied import of the worshipper who wears it).

name: Cultist Cowl (Greater)
description: The fabric of a cultist cowl is either raspy burlap, durable cotton, or fine silk, depending on the item's power (and thus the implied import of the worshipper who wears it).

name: Cultist Cowl (Major)
description: The fabric of a cultist cowl is either raspy burlap, durable cotton, or fine silk, depending on the item's power (and thus the implied import of the worshipper who wears it).

name: Cunning
description: The weapon performs divination magic on the blood of your foes, granting you insight into their abilities and weaknesses.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Curare
description: Activate 2 InteractHunters all over Golarion favor curare, a potent paralytic derived from boiled tree bark.

name: Curious Teardrop
description: Perception +26; precise vision 60 feet, imprecise hearing 30 feet Communication telepathy (Common, Talican) Skills Diplomacy +24, Alchemy Lore +26, Metal Lore +26, Society +24 Int +6, Wis +2, Cha +4 Will +26 A curious teardrop, despite being a sphere of liquid metal, hangs like an earring on a golde

name: Curled Cure Gel
description: Activate Curled cure secretes a gel that gently warms the skin and stimulates healing.

name: Cursebreak Bulwark
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Cursed Dreamstone
description: A dreamstone can become cursed if left exposed to creatures that corrupt sleep, generate nightmares, or otherwise prey on sleeping or dreaming victims via supernatural methods.

name: Cursed Immaculate Instrument
description: This has been cursed by the sublime breath it was taken from, causing it to warp, rust, or tarnish, though the holder of the instrument cannot perceive this and rationalizes away any attempt to explain the instrument's obviously cursed nature.

name: Curtain Call Cloak
description: This blue velvet cloak is cut from the remains of a curtain from a destroyed theater.

name: Cutlery
description: Ammunition for the Users typically upend the entire contents of their cutlery drawer into the gun, aim it in the general direction of the foe, and hope it hits something.

name: Cytillesh
description: Deros use cytillesh in a variety of ways, and some surface-dwellers seek out the fungus for their own use.

name: Cytillesh Oil
description: Activate 2 (manipulate)This thick substance is distilled from the mind-robbing cytillesh fungus, though it lacks memory-altering capabilities.

name: Cytillesh Toolkit
description: These healer's toolkits are collections of crystalline scalpels and gritty salves made of cytillesh.

name: Dancing Lamentation
description: Activate 2 Interact This toxin erratically stimulates the limbs, forcing unexpected shifts in momentum.

name: Dancing Scarf
description: This long and billowing scarf is typically woven of silk or sheer fabric and adorned with bells or other jangling bits of shiny metal.

name: Dancing Scarf (Greater)
description: This long and billowing scarf is typically woven of silk or sheer fabric and adorned with bells or other jangling bits of shiny metal.

name: Daredevil Boots
description: These brightly colored, soft-soled boots motivate you to perform risky stunts and grant you the agility to succeed.

name: Daredevil Boots (Greater)
description: These brightly colored, soft-soled boots motivate you to perform risky stunts and grant you the agility to succeed.

name: Dark Pepper Powder
description: Made from the smokebulbs that grow in Stonebreach, dark pepper is used as a common spice in dwarven cooking, but can also be an irritant in large quantities.

name: Darkening Poison
description: Many calignis keep several doses of darkening poison, an uncommon injury poison made from Darklands spider venom, on hand to incapacitate foes.

name: Darkvision Elixir (Greater)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate) After you drink this elixir, your sight becomes sharper in darkness.

name: Darkvision Elixir (Lesser)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate) After you drink this elixir, your sight becomes sharper in darkness.

name: Darkvision Elixir (Moderate)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate) After you drink this elixir, your sight becomes sharper in darkness.

name: Darkvision Scope
description: These scopes, popular with snipers and other sneaky sharpshooters who ply their trade in the dead of night, incorporate clouded crystals with magical properties into their design.

name: Darkvision Scope (Greater)
description: These scopes, popular with snipers and other sneaky sharpshooters who ply their trade in the dead of night, incorporate clouded crystals with magical properties into their design.

name: Dawnflower Beads
description: Perception [[/r 1d20+20]]; precise vision 30 feet, imprecise hearing 30 feet Communication speech (Celestial, Common, and two other common languages) Skills Diplomacy [[/r 1d20+21]], Medicine [[/r 1d20+22]], Religion [[/r 1d20+19]], Sarenrae Lore [[/r 1d20+23]] Int +2, Wis +5, Cha +4 Will [[/r 1d20+

name: Dawnlight
description: This shining symbol of Sarenrae depicts the goddess with her arms held wide.

name: Dawnlight (Greater)
description: This shining symbol of Sarenrae depicts the goddess with her arms held wide.

name: Dawnlight (Major)
description: This shining symbol of Sarenrae depicts the goddess with her arms held wide.

name: Dawnsilver Chunk
description: Dawnsilver is renowned for its lightness, durability, and effectiveness against a range of creatures including devils and werecreatures.

name: Dawnsilver Ingot
description: Dawnsilver is renowned for its lightness, durability, and effectiveness against a range of creatures including devils and werecreatures.

name: Day Goggles
description: The darkened lenses of these goggles protect sensitive eyes from bright light but make seeing in the dark more difficult.

name: Daylight Vapor
description: Activate 1 Interact This heavier-than-air mist emits a soft glow.
source: Pathfinder #160: Assault on Hunting Lodge Seven

name: Dazing Coil
description: Activate F (concentrate) Trigger You deal damage to an creature with the affixed weaponThis knot of copper wire reshapes itself in a new pattern every time its affixed weapon deals damage.

name: Dazzling Rosary
description: Activate Cast a SpellWhen energy courses through these lustrous beads, they glow brightly in the sacred colors of the spellcaster's faith.

name: Dazzling Rosary (Greater)
description: Activate Cast a SpellWhen energy courses through these lustrous beads, they glow brightly in the sacred colors of the spellcaster's faith.

name: Deadly Slashing Claws
description: Sharp claws have been grafted to your hands or feet, perhaps extending from your knuckles or the tips of your toes.

name: Deadweight Mutagen (Greater)
description: Activate 1 Interact For 1 hour your joints loosen and bones thicken, making your body incredibly weighty and difficult to maneuver around.

name: Deadweight Mutagen (Lesser)
description: Activate 1 Interact For 1 minute your joints loosen and bones thicken, making your body incredibly weighty and difficult to maneuver around.

name: Deadweight Mutagen (Major)
description: Activate 1 Interact For 1 hour your joints loosen and bones thicken, making your body incredibly weighty and difficult to maneuver around.

name: Deadweight Mutagen (Moderate)
description: Activate 1 Interact For 10 minutes your joints loosen and bones thicken, making your body incredibly weighty and difficult to maneuver around.

name: Deadweight Snare
description: This snare is made of magnetized weights and heavy ropes rigged to a trip wire or pressure plate.

name: Deafening Music Box
description: Symbols of musical notes decorate this gold-framed wooden cube measuring just under 1 foot by 1 foot.

name: Death Coil
description: This modified Stasian coil of metal and glass stands about three feet tall.

name: Death Knell Powder
description: Activate 2 Interact This poison is made from toxic spores reduced to a gray powder and suffused with necromantic energy.

name: Deathcap Powder
description: The toxic deathcap mushroom can be dried, ground, and treated to form a flavorless powder with accelerated effects.

name: Deathdrinking
description: A weapon etched with a deathdrinking rune shimmers with dark purple energy.

name: Deathless
description: These symbols fortify your body's grasp on your soul, keeping it tethered when death approaches.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Deathless Light
description: Activate 1 envision This glowing piece of flesh increases the spell rank of a spell with the light trait by 1 (maximum 7) when determining whether the spell's light will shine in magical darkness or counteract a spell.

name: Deathseeker
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

name: Deathstalk Mushroom
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)Deathstalk mushrooms that have been alchemically treated into this poison cause those who succumb to suffer horrific hallucinations in which everyone around them distorts into demonic shapes shortly before their own bodies begin to break down and melt from within.
source: Pathfinder #211: The Secret of Deathstalk Tower

name: Decanter of Endless Water
description: This item looks like an ordinary glass flask full of water.

name: Decaying
description: Eerie waves of purplish energy dance across the surface of a weapon etched with this rune.

name: Decaying (Greater)
description: Eerie waves of purplish energy dance across the surface of a weapon etched with this rune.

name: Deck of Harrowed Tales
description: The Deck of Harrowed Tales is a unique deck connected to a unique demiplane known as the Harrowed Realm.

name: Deck of illusions
description: This set of 34 parchment cards usually comes in a velvet bag or simple leather wrap.

name: Deck of Many Things
description: These 22 cards of heavy vellum, usually stored in a box or a pouch, bear images or glyphs depicting symbols of magical power.

name: Deck of Mischief
description: This deck of 54 cards appears nearly identical to standard playing cards.

name: Defiled Costa
description: Activate A envision This still-bloody rib was taken from a priest of Urgathoa at the moment they passed into undeath and has a constant stench of decay.

name: Defiled Costa (Greater)
description: Activate A envision This still-bloody rib was taken from a priest of Urgathoa at the moment they passed into undeath and has a constant stench of decay.

name: Delve Scale
description: Activate 1 Interact If fried, a bulette's thick forefoot scales render into crunchy snacks.

name: Demilich Eye Gem
description: This glowing gem is harvested from a demilich and has an 8th-rank spell magically bonded to it.

name: Demolishing
description: A demolishing weapon is made to destroy constructs.

name: Demolition Fulu (Greater)
description: A demolition fulu allows a saboteur or excavator to be far away from the scene when demolition happens.

name: Demolition Fulu (Lesser)
description: A demolition fulu allows a saboteur or excavator to be far away from the scene when demolition happens.

name: Demolition Fulu (Moderate)
description: A demolition fulu allows a saboteur or excavator to be far away from the scene when demolition happens.

name: Demon Bone Tiles (Brimorak)
description: Activate Cast a Spell (add 1 action)These bones from different types of demons can be used to form temporary barriers.

name: Demon Bone Tiles (Pusk)
description: Activate Cast a Spell (add 1 action)These bones from different types of demons can be used to form temporary barriers.

name: Demon Bone Tiles (Seraptis)
description: Activate Cast a Spell (add 1 action)These bones from different types of demons can be used to form temporary barriers.

name: Demon Dust
description: Activate 1 Interact The save for addiction to demon dust is @Check[fortitude|dc:24|name:Demon Dust Addiction|traits:virulent|showDC:owner], and the addiction has the virulent trait.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Absalom, City of Lost Omens

name: Demon Mask
description: This terrifying mask is crafted in the visage of a leering demon and grants a +1 item bonus to Intimidation checks.

name: Demon Mask (Greater)
description: This terrifying mask is crafted in the visage of a leering demon and grants a +2 item bonus to Intimidation checks.

name: Demon-Hunting Bands
description: Activate F (concentrate)Trigger You Stride.

name: Demon's Knot
description: The demon Kaivirris is housed in the magnificent ruby that serves as the centerpiece of this beautiful, goldplated, cold iron pendant necklace.

name: Demortification Oil
description: Activate 1 Interact This foul-smelling oil has the appearance and odor of the greasy, thick fluids that seep from a decaying body.

name: Deployable Cover
description: This thick mat of canvas, foliage, and wood is mounted on a tripod of flexible metal struts, folded into a baton-like shape, and clamped shut.

name: Deployable Cover (Ballistic Cover)
description: This thick mat of canvas, foliage, and wood is mounted on a tripod of flexible metal struts, folded into a baton-like shape, and clamped shut.

name: Depth Charge I
description: Ammunition any Carved with stylized images of water or aquatic life, depth charges that are fired underwater or at a submerged target function with their normal range increments and can hit no matter their normal damage type.

name: Depth Charge II
description: Ammunition any Carved with stylized images of water or aquatic life, depth charges that are fired underwater or at a submerged target function with their normal range increments and can hit no matter their normal damage type.

description: Ammunition any Carved with stylized images of water or aquatic life, depth charges that are fired underwater or at a submerged target function with their normal range increments and can hit no matter their normal damage type.

description: Ammunition any Carved with stylized images of water or aquatic life, depth charges that are fired underwater or at a submerged target function with their normal range increments and can hit no matter their normal damage type.

description: Ammunition any Carved with stylized images of water or aquatic life, depth charges that are fired underwater or at a submerged target function with their normal range increments and can hit no matter their normal damage type.

name: Depth Charge VII
description: Ammunition any Carved with stylized images of water or aquatic life, depth charges that are fired underwater or at a submerged target function with their normal range increments and can hit no matter their normal damage type.

name: Depth Gauge
description: This simple tool consists of a small iron weight attached to a thin rope that is marked at regular intervals (typically every foot).
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Desiccating Scepter
description: Often wielded by priests of cruel desert gods, this thin scepter is carved from dry, yellowed bone and can destroy the moisture in anything it touches.

name: Desolation Locket
description: The surface of this golden, heart-shaped locket is nearly worn through with cracks.

name: Desolation Locket (Greater)
description: The surface of this golden, heart-shaped locket is nearly worn through with cracks.

name: Desolation Locket (Major)
description: The surface of this golden, heart-shaped locket is nearly worn through with cracks.

name: Detect Anathema Fulu
description: Given to undisciplined acolytes at risk of breaking their vows, this fulu activates on its own if its wearer begins to perform an act anathema to a specific deity or cause, decided at the time of crafting.

name: Detective's Kit
description: This leather satchel contains empty vials, a pair of tweezers, a supply of small linen cloths, a set of brass calipers and a knotted string for measuring distances, several pieces of chalk, a pen, and a blank notebook for keeping notes.

name: Detector Stone
description: During their journeys across the Gravelands, the Knights of Lastwall found several smoky, gemstone-like objects that knights refer to as detector stones.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall

name: Deteriorating Dust
description: Contained in a specially enchanted small leather or hide sack, deteriorating dust is a potent caustic agent and a prized item among Rovagug's more discreet followers.

name: Detonating Gears Snare
description: This snare uses clockwork stressed almost to the breaking point, which activates with a powerful explosion that deals @Damage[3d8[piercing]] damage to the first creature entering the snare's square.

name: Devil's Breath Incense
description: Activate 1 Interact This 6-inch-long stick of gray-green incense has an unsettling, oily look to it.

name: Devil's Luck
description: Devil Decipher Writing Arcana, Occultism, Society You've bargained with an imp, one of the least powerful devils, for a fragment of infernal luck.

name: Devil's Trident
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Monsters of Myth

name: Devoted Vestments
description: These vestments are made of panels showing various scenes from the legends of a particular deity.

name: Digly's Oil of Sympathy (Greater)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This thick, red liquid has a pungent—but not unpleasant—smell.

name: Digly's Oil of Sympathy (Lesser)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This thick, red liquid has a pungent—but not unpleasant—smell.

name: Digly's Oil of Sympathy (Major)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This thick, red liquid has a pungent—but not unpleasant—smell.

name: Digly's Oil of Sympathy (Minor)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This thick, red liquid has a pungent—but not unpleasant—smell.

name: Digly's Oil of Sympathy (Moderate)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This thick, red liquid has a pungent—but not unpleasant—smell.

name: Diluted Hype
description: A synthetic adrenaline supplement that increases awareness and reaction time.

name: Dimension Shot
description: Ammunition any Activate 2 command, envision Dimension shot is deep blue black, but motes of light play upon it like stars in the night sky.

name: Dimensional Knot
description: Activate Cast a Spell Shelynites originally crafted this complex knot of vibrant string for bracelets meant to tie the destinies of two people together.

name: Dinosaur Boots
description: The tough, scaled leather of these heavy boots comes from a mighty dinosaur, granting you the steadiness of a lumbering beast.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Dinosaur Boots (Greater)
description: The tough, scaled leather of these heavy boots comes from a mighty dinosaur, granting you the steadiness of a lumbering beast.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Diplomat's Badge
description: When displayed prominently, this brass badge makes creatures find you more agreeable.

name: Diplomat's Charcuterie
description: Activate 10 minutes (Interact) A common sight at political gatherings, a diplomat's charcuterie has fine meats, cheeses, nuts, fruits, and other finger foods mixed with reagents to engender friendly feelings between those consuming them.

name: Dirt Sea in a Jar
description: This small jar of dark sand swirls intensely as you peer into it, evoking the dangerous beauty of the Dirt Sea.

name: Dischoran Rubble
description: Activate Cast a Spell (add 1 action)Rock fragments exposed to any dischoran's sonic blasts can sometimes retain a portion of the attack's energy, trembling slightly whenever they are touched.

name: Discord Fulu
description: Duration 1 hourIncorporating green in its writing, a discord fulu is a popular but unethical tool often deployed on romantic rivals to foil their advances.

name: Disguise Kit
description: This small wooden box contains cosmetics, false facial hair, spirit gum, and a few simple wigs.

name: Disguise Kit (Elite Cosmetics)
description: This small wooden box contains cosmetics, false facial hair, spirit gum, and a few simple wigs.

name: Disguise Kit (Elite)
description: This small wooden box contains cosmetics, false facial hair, spirit gum, and a few simple wigs.

name: Disguise Kit (Replacement Cosmetics)
description: This small wooden box contains cosmetics, false facial hair, spirit gum, and a few simple wigs.

name: Disintegration Bolt
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)The shaft of this bolt is scorched and blackened, and handling it coats your fingers with a fine black powder.

name: Dispelling Sliver
description: Activate F (concentrate) Trigger Your Strike damages a targetMade from a treated sliver of cold iron, this talisman allows you to counteract magical effects.

name: Dispersing Bullet
description: Ammunition sling bullet Activate 1 Interact The metals used to forge this lead shot were taken from a variety of continents and barely stay together.

name: Disrupting Oil
description: Activate 1 Interact A pearlescent fluid, disrupting oil applied to a weapon grants the benefits of a rune for 1 minute.

name: Disrupting Oil (Greater)
description: Activate 1 Interact A pearlescent fluid, disrupting oil applied to a weapon grants the benefits of a Greater Disrupting rune with a @Check[fortitude|dc:30|name:Greater Disrupting|traits:incapacitation] for 1 minute.

name: Distracting Carapace
description: Your skin is studded with pieces of iridescent chitin that ripple like oil on water.

name: Diver's Gloves (Greater)
description: These black leather gloves fit snuggly, running up the length of your arm to your elbow.

name: Diver's Gloves (Lesser)
description: These black leather gloves fit snuggly, running up the length of your arm to your elbow.

name: Diver's Gloves (Moderate)
description: These black leather gloves fit snuggly, running up the length of your arm to your elbow.

name: Divine art piece created by Shelyn
Divine Scroll Case of Simplicity
description: The four different types of scroll cases of simplicity often bear adornments appropriate to their magical tradition, such as angelic wings or otherworldly lettering.

name: Diviner's Nose Chain
description: The diviner's nose chain is worn by attaching piercings to the ear and nose, creating a connection between the senses of hearing and smell.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Diving Suit
description: Diving suits are bulky, waterproofed leather outfits with copper helmets, worn by divers and underwater salvagers.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Djezet Alloy Ingot
description: This rust red metal is liquid at room temperature, making it challenging for all but the most skilled metallurgists to craft with and earning it the name "quickiron" in some places.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Djezet Dose
description: Activate A Interact Some mages carry vials of djezet for its magic-enhancing properties.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Djezet Mass
description: This rust red metal is liquid at room temperature, making it challenging for all but the most skilled metallurgists to craft with and earning it the name "quickiron" in some places.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Doctrine of Blissful Eternity
description: The bones of small animals decorate the cover of this tome, creating a pattern that resembles a gross perversion of Pharasma's holy symbol.

name: Doll
description: Dolls are found throughout Golarion in a wide variety of forms.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Doll (Exquisite surprise)
description: This doll contains a hidden compartment or pouch capable of holding a single object of up to light Bulk—typically a bell, rattle, or dried flowers.

name: Doll (Surprise)
description: This doll contains a hidden compartment or pouch capable of holding a single object of up to light Bulk—typically a bell, rattle, or dried flowers.

name: Doubling Rings
description: This item consists of two magically linked rings: an intricate, gleaming golden ring with a square-cut ruby, and a thick, plain iron ring.

name: Doubling Rings (Greater)
description: This item consists of two magically linked rings: an intricate, gleaming golden ring with a square-cut ruby, and a thick, plain iron ring.

name: Dr. Ushernacht's Astonishing Ink (Major)
description: This syrupy ink smells organic and faintly spoiled.

name: Dr. Ushernacht's Astonishing Ink (Minor)
description: This syrupy ink smells organic and faintly spoiled.

name: Dr. Ushernacht's Astonishing Ink (Moderate)
description: This syrupy ink smells organic and faintly spoiled.

name: Draconal Mask
description: This dragon-themed half-mask helps you to navigate through darkness and to notice things from afar—such as helping to find seats in a theater after a show begins, or to pick up details from a show even if you're seated in the back row!

name: Draconic Toxin Bottle
description: This glass bottle appears to be a dragon's breath potion of a specific dragon type (usually red) but has been polluted, making it toxic to use.

name: Draft of Stellar Radiance
description: Activate 1 Interact This potion's bottle glows softly with shimmering silver light.

name: Dragon Bile
description: A mix of digestive juices and green dragon poison glands nauseates the victim as its flesh is digested from within.

name: Dragon Pearl
description: Activate 1 minute (manipulate)These fermented and dried tea leaves are rolled into a ball shaped like a pearl.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

name: Dragon Rune Bracelet
description: A dragon rune bracelet is a gold bangle formed around the scale of a famous dragon.

name: Dragon Throat Scale
description: Activate Cast a Spell Dragon scales of all sorts can be powerful magical reagents, infusing magic with the might of their breath.

name: Dragon Turtle Armor
source: Pathfinder #199: To Bloom Below the Web

name: Dragon Turtle Artillery
description: One end of this heavy cylinder of steel has been forged in the likeness of a dragon turtle's head, the mouth gaping wide.
source: Pathfinder #199: To Bloom Below the Web

name: Dragon Turtle Scale
description: Activate A (concentrate) Requirements You're trained in Athletics This shimmering green scale is usually attached to a golden clasp or chain.

name: Dragon Turtle Scale (Greater)
description: Activate A (concentrate) Requirements You're trained in AthleticsThis shimmering green scale is usually attached to a golden clasp or chain.

name: Dragon-Lotus Drum
description: This traditional barrel drum has tacked heads in the old military style of Hwanggot and is painted with a many-colored imperial dragon twined around white and pink lotuses, a symbol of long memory.

name: Dragon's Blood Pudding
description: Activate 1 Interact While some unscrupulous chefs claim that this savory pudding is made with real dragon's blood, its crimson color and acrid smell actually come from bloody mandrake paste, ginger root, and distilled terrap sap.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Dragon's Blood Pudding (Greater)
description: Activate 1 InteractWhile some unscrupulous chefs claim that this savory pudding is made with real dragon's blood, its crimson color and acrid smell actually come from bloody mandrake paste, ginger root, and distilled terrap sap.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

description: Activate 1 InteractWhile some unscrupulous chefs claim that this savory pudding is made with real dragon's blood, its crimson color and acrid smell actually come from bloody mandrake paste, ginger root, and distilled terrap sap.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

description: Activate 1 InteractWhile some unscrupulous chefs claim that this savory pudding is made with real dragon's blood, its crimson color and acrid smell actually come from bloody mandrake paste, ginger root, and distilled terrap sap.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Dragon's Breath (1st Level Spell)
description: This rune depicts a specific type of dragon, resizing after application to fit the surface of the item.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Dragon's Breath (2nd Level Spell)
description: This rune depicts a specific type of dragon, resizing after application to fit the surface of the item.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

description: This rune depicts a specific type of dragon, resizing after application to fit the surface of the item.
