description: This rune depicts a specific type of dragon, resizing after application to fit the surface of the item.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Dragon's Crest
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Dragon's Eye Charm
description: This charm, a dragon-shaped pendant worn like a necklace or set into armor or clothing as a decoration, is warm and smooth to the touch.

name: Dragonbone Arrowhead
description: Usage affixed to a melee weapon or a ranged weapon with the thrown trait Activate 1 Interact Requirements You're an expert with the affixed weapon.

name: Dragonclaw Scutcheon
description: Activate f envision Trigger You would take damage of a type depending on the talisman's dragon type: acid, cold, electricity, fire, or poison damage; Requirements You have the affixed shield raised.

name: Dragonfire Halfbow
source: Pathfinder #199: To Bloom Below the Web

name: Dragonfly Fulu
description: Activate f envision Trigger You take the action.Tradition says the dragonfly fulu should be affixed to the upper back, like the wings of an insect.

name: Dragonfly Potion
description: Activate 1 Interact Your eyes transform into those of a giant dragonfly, the thousands of separate facets wrapping around your head, and a pair of long, delicate, insectile wings grow from your upper back.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Dragonscale Amulet
description: This amulet is made from the scales of five ancient dragons.
source: Pathfinder #148: Fires of the Haunted City

name: Dragonscale Cameo
description: Activate 1 envision This ornamental pin, consisting of a single preserved dragon scale from a chromatic or metallic dragon mounted in a setting of precious metal, is typically affixed between the shoulder blades.

name: Dragontooth Trophy
description: Activate f envision Trigger You succeed at a Strike with the affixed weapon.

name: Drakeheart Mutagen (Greater)
description: Activate A (manipulate)Your skin grows scales like a drake, and your eyesight become sharp and your pupils slitted, but your mind and reflexes slow.

name: Drakeheart Mutagen (Lesser)
description: Activate A (manipulate)Your skin grows scales like a drake, and your eyesight become sharp and your pupils slitted, but your mind and reflexes slow.

name: Drakeheart Mutagen (Major)
description: Activate A (manipulate)Your skin grows scales like a drake, and your eyesight become sharp and your pupils slitted, but your mind and reflexes slow.

name: Drakeheart Mutagen (Moderate)
description: Activate A InteractYour skin grows tough scales like a drake, your eyesight become sharp and your pupils slitted, and your limbs grow wiry and quick, but your mind and reflexes become slow.

name: Draxie's Recipe Book
description: This tiny recipe book was created by a famous draxie chef, but it instantly resizes to fit the hand and eyes of the reader.

name: Drazmorg's Staff of All-Sight
source: Pathfinder Adventure: Crown of the Kobold King

name: Dread (Greater)
description: Eerie symbols cover your armor, inspiring terror in your foes.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Dread (Lesser)
description: Eerie symbols cover your armor, inspiring terror in your foes.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Dread (Moderate)
description: Eerie symbols cover your armor, inspiring terror in your foes.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Dread Blindfold
description: When tied over your eyes, this ragged strip of black linen gives you a +3 item bonus to Intimidation checks and darkvision.

name: Dread Helm
description: Activate 1 Interact The faceplate of a dread helm has a fierce visage that magnifies the effects of fear.

name: Dreadsmoke Thurible
description: This black-and-gray thurible is decorated with a skeleton motif; the jaw of one of the decorative skulls unhinges, allowing you to load it with incense as an action.

name: Dream Pollen Snare
description: This simple trap is made of taut twigs that, when triggered, snap down on a pollen-filled sac of a peculiar flower.

name: Dreaming Round
description: Ammunition round Activate 1 (concentrate)The night sky seems contained in this glass projectile.

name: Dreamstone
description: A dreamstone is a disc-shaped object carved with imagery or words sacred to Desna-be it her religious symbol, a short prayer, or merely the shape of a single star.

name: Dreamtime Tea
description: This lemony tea blended from rare Vudrani herbs and flowers is widely circulated by occult circles looking to transcend the boundaries of reality.

name: Drop of Convergent Waters
description: Abhaya's tireless years of study have allowed her to reproduce, at some level, the unconscious melding of elements she experienced during the last Challenge of Sky and Heaven.

name: Drought Powder
description: Activate 1 (manipulate) A gray powder that smells like wet rock, drought powder has various uses against water.

name: Drover's Band
description: This black leather wrist guard has a bright red gem on the inside of the wrist.

name: Drowsy Sun Eye Drops
description: Activate These drops are made from luminescent mushrooms and refined into eye drops, which simulates a creature's natural night vision.

name: Druid's Crown
description: Made of materials scavenged from wild places, a druid's crown can be rebuilt for a variety of benefits.

name: Drum of Upheaval
description: This heavy drum is engraved along the sides with images of centaurs in fierce combat.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Drumish Pearl Token
description: This silver brooch features an enormous freshwater pearl pulled from the depths of Lake Encarthan.

name: Drums of War
description: This handheld snare drum is adorned with garish scenes of battle and triumph.

name: Drums of War (Greater)
description: This handheld snare drum is adorned with garish scenes of battle and triumph.

name: Drums of War (Major)
description: This handheld snare drum is adorned with garish scenes of battle and triumph.

name: Dueling Cape
description: You can pull a dueling cape you're wearing from your shoulder and wrap it around your arm with an Interact action.

name: Dueling Spear
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Duelist's Beacon
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Dullahan Codex
description: The origins of the notorious Dullahan Codex are shrouded in mystery.

name: Dupe's Gold Nugget
description: Activate f envision Trigger You hit with a ranged Strike with the affixed weapon Requirements You're an expert with the affixed weapon.

name: Duskwood Branch
description: Duskwood is a very lightweight wood found primarily in old-growth forests in south-central Avistan; it is dark as ebony but has a slight purple tint.

name: Duskwood Lumber
description: Duskwood is a very lightweight wood found primarily in old-growth forests in south-central Avistan; it is dark as ebony but has a slight purple tint.

name: Dust Goggles
description: These sand-colored goggles keep the harsh weather of the Cinderlands at bay.

name: Dust of Appearance
description: Stored in a small reed, this powder looks like a fine metallic dust.

name: Dust of Corpse Animation
description: Activate 2 (manipulate)This black pouch contains what appears to be fine bone dust.

name: Dust of Corpse Animation (Greater)
description: Activate 2 (manipulate)This black pouch contains what appears to be fine bone dust.

name: Dust of Disappearance
description: Activate A InteractThis powder shimmers like a thousand tiny motes of light.

name: Dust Pods
description: You hide fragile pods of pollen or other clinging powder that get in the eyes of the first creature that enters the snare's square.
source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On

name: Dwarven Daisy (Lesser)
source: Pathfinder Society Quest #5: The Dragon who Stole Evoking Day

name: Dwarven Daisy (Moderate)
source: Pathfinder Society Quest #5: The Dragon who Stole Evoking Day

name: Dweomerveil
description: This soft covering for the mouth and nose is made from the sleek fur of a dweomercat and is fastened with two gnarled teeth of the same beast.

name: Dweomerweave Robe
description: This robe is made from dweomerweave, a magical fabric created by spinning minor illusions into the threads of ether spider silk.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Eagle Eye Elixir (Greater)
description: Activate A (manipulate)After you drink this elixir, you notice subtle visual details.

name: Eagle Eye Elixir (Lesser)
description: Activate A (manipulate)After you drink this elixir, you notice subtle visual details.

name: Eagle Eye Elixir (Major)
description: Activate A (manipulate)After you drink this elixir, you notice subtle visual details.

name: Eagle Eye Elixir (Moderate)
description: Activate A (manipulate)After you drink this elixir, you notice subtle visual details.

name: Earplugs
description: These small pieces of cloth and stuffing have been crafted to dramatically muffle sound and easily slide into and out of the ear canals of humanoid creatures.

name: Earplugs (PFS Guide)
description: Made of waxed cotton or cork, earplugs give you a +1 item bonus to saves against effects with the auditory trait.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Earthbinding
description: A weapon with this rune hums when touched to the ground.

name: Earthglide Cloak
description: This brown-and-gold robe covers you from head to toe.

name: Earthsight Box
description: This fine wooden box is inlaid with Dwarven runes, with hinges and a clasp of forged iron.

name: Ebon Fulcrum Lens
description: This strangest and most powerful of the fulcrum lenses resembles a chip of smooth obsidian containing three dark glimmers of Nhimbaloth's essence.

name: Ebon Marionette
description: This puppet is carved out of ebony wood and affixed to violet strings for easy manipulation.

name: Echo Receptors
description: You can sense your surroundings using sonic pings rather than relying on your vision.

name: Echo Token
description: Visitors to the Echo Repository always emerge with one of these silver coins, stamped with the visage of a faceless queen, somewhere on their person.

name: Ectoplasmic Tracer
description: This sticky, fluorescing substance, stored in an atomizing nozzle, sprays all creatures within a @Template[cone|distance:15] when released.

name: Effervescent Ampoule
description: Activate A (manipulate) Requirements You're trained in Acrobatics Light spring water fizzes and bubbles within this small glass globe, spilling onto the affixed armor when activated.

name: Effervescent Decoction
description: Activate 1 Interact This bubbly potion is purportedly made from winds gathered from the Mana Wastes and distilled into a liquor.

name: Egg Cream Fizz
description: Activate 1 Interact Containing neither eggs nor cream, an egg cream fizz contains milk or nut milk, sparkling water, and flavored syrup, frothed and chilled.

name: Eidetic Potion
description: Activate 1 Interact Bright pink, pale lavender, and vibrant orange colors swirl through this purplish liquid, making the eidetic potion resemble an unforgettable sunset.

name: Eidolon Cape
description: Though it appears to be one elegant piece, an eidolon cape consists of a mantle for your shoulders and a detachable cape.

name: Elder Seed
description: Activate 1 Interact An enormous, perfect, ripe seed from a tree important to a region's druids, an elder seed exudes vitality.

name: Elder Sign
description: This stone tablet is carved with the symbol of a five-branched twig.

name: Eldritch Flare
description: Activate 2 Interact This poison draws power from the magic of its victim.

name: Electrocable
description: This foot-long length of conductive cable is capped on both ends by grounded handles containing Stasian coils.

name: Electromuscular Stimulator
description: Activate 2 (manipulate)This rare gadget uses Stasian technology to grant someone a burst of activity, though its use can be painful.

name: Elemental Ammunition (Greater, Acid)
description: Ammunition any Activate 1 InteractWhen activated, the reservoir of alchemical reagents in elemental ammunition atomizes on impact, dealing 3d4 persistent acid damage to the target and 3 splash acid damage in addition to the damage the attack normally deals.

name: Elemental Ammunition (Greater, Cold)
description: Ammunition any Activate 1 InteractWhen activated, the reservoir of alchemical reagents in elemental ammunition atomizes on impact, dealing 3d4 persistent cold damage to the target and 3 splash cold damage in addition to the damage the attack normally deals.

name: Elemental Ammunition (Greater, Electricity)
description: Ammunition any Activate 1 InteractWhen activated, the reservoir of alchemical reagents in elemental ammunition atomizes on impact, dealing 3d4 persistent electricity damage to the target and 3 splash electricity damage in addition to the damage the attack normally deals.

name: Elemental Ammunition (Greater, Fire)
description: Ammunition any Activate 1 InteractWhen activated, the reservoir of alchemical reagents in elemental ammunition atomizes on impact, dealing 3d4 persistent fire damage to the target and 3 splash fire damage in addition to the damage the attack normally deals.

name: Elemental Ammunition (Greater, Poison)
description: Ammunition any Activate 1 InteractWhen activated, the reservoir of alchemical reagents in elemental ammunition atomizes on impact, dealing 3d4 persistent poison damage to the target and 3 splash poison damage in addition to the damage the attack normally deals.

name: Elemental Ammunition (Lesser, Acid)
description: Ammunition any Activate 1 InteractWhen activated, the reservoir of alchemical reagents in elemental ammunition atomizes on impact, dealing 1 persistent acid damage to the target and 1 splash acid damage in addition to the damage the attack normally deals.

name: Elemental Ammunition (Lesser, Cold)
description: Ammunition any Activate 1 InteractWhen activated, the reservoir of alchemical reagents in elemental ammunition atomizes on impact, dealing 1 persistent cold damage to the target and 1 splash cold damage in addition to the damage the attack normally deals.

name: Elemental Ammunition (Lesser, Electricity)
description: Ammunition any Activate 1 InteractWhen activated, the reservoir of alchemical reagents in elemental ammunition atomizes on impact, dealing 1 persistent electricity damage to the target and 1 splash electricity damage in addition to the damage the attack normally deals.

name: Elemental Ammunition (Lesser, Fire)
description: Ammunition any Activate 1 InteractWhen activated, the reservoir of alchemical reagents in elemental ammunition atomizes on impact, dealing 1 persistent fire damage to the target and 1 splash fire damage in addition to the damage the attack normally deals.

name: Elemental Ammunition (Lesser, Poison)
description: Ammunition any Activate 1 InteractWhen activated, the reservoir of alchemical reagents in elemental ammunition atomizes on impact, dealing 1 persistent poison damage to the target and 1 splash poison damage in addition to the damage the attack normally deals.

name: Elemental Ammunition (Moderate, Acid)
description: Ammunition any Activate 1 InteractWhen activated, the reservoir of alchemical reagents in elemental ammunition atomizes on impact, dealing 2d4 persistent acid damage to the target and 2 splash acid damage in addition to the damage the attack normally deals.

name: Elemental Ammunition (Moderate, Cold)
description: Ammunition any Activate 1 InteractWhen activated, the reservoir of alchemical reagents in elemental ammunition atomizes on impact, dealing 2d4 persistent cold damage to the target and 2 splash cold damage in addition to the damage the attack normally deals.

name: Elemental Ammunition (Moderate, Electricity)
description: Ammunition any Activate 1 InteractWhen activated, the reservoir of alchemical reagents in elemental ammunition atomizes on impact, dealing 2d4 persistent electricity damage to the target and 2 splash electricity damage in addition to the damage the attack normally deals.

name: Elemental Ammunition (Moderate, Fire)
description: Ammunition any Activate 1 InteractWhen activated, the reservoir of alchemical reagents in elemental ammunition atomizes on impact, dealing 2d4 persistent fire damage to the target and 2 splash fire damage in addition to the damage the attack normally deals.

name: Elemental Ammunition (Moderate, Poison)
description: Ammunition any Activate 1 InteractWhen activated, the reservoir of alchemical reagents in elemental ammunition atomizes on impact, dealing 2d4 persistent poison damage to the target and 2 splash poison damage in addition to the damage the attack normally deals.

name: Elemental Fragment
description: Activate 2 (concentrate, manipulate) This chunk of solidified planar energy is as large as a walnut and comes in six different varieties: a clear piece of crystal for the Plane of Air, a rough piece of rock for the Plane of Earth, a solidified piece of cooled lava for the Plane of Fire, a compact pi

name: Elemental Fragment (Greater)
description: Activate 2 (concentrate, manipulate) This chunk of solidified planar energy is as large as a walnut and comes in six different varieties: a clear piece of crystal for the Plane of Air, a rough piece of rock for the Plane of Earth, a solidified piece of cooled lava for the Plane of Fire, a compact pi

description: Activate 2 (concentrate, manipulate) This chunk of solidified planar energy is as large as a walnut and comes in six different varieties: a clear piece of crystal for the Plane of Air, a rough piece of rock for the Plane of Earth, a solidified piece of cooled lava for the Plane of Fire, a compact pi

name: Elemental Gem
description: Activate 2 Command, Interact You shout the name of an elemental lord and dash this glassy gem against a hard surface to activate it.

name: Elemental Wayfinder (Air)
description: Pathfinder Society researchers recently created elemental wayfinders with the assistance of the Society's elemental allies.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Elemental Wayfinder (Earth)
description: Pathfinder Society researchers recently created elemental wayfinders with the assistance of the Society's elemental allies.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Elemental Wayfinder (Fire)
description: Pathfinder Society researchers recently created elemental wayfinders with the assistance of the Society's elemental allies.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Elemental Wayfinder (Water)
description: Pathfinder Society researchers recently created elemental wayfinders with the assistance of the Society's elemental allies.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Elixir of Gender Transformation (Greater)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This clear, bitter liquid can be ingested to change certain secondary sex characteristics.

name: Elixir of Gender Transformation (Lesser)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This clear, bitter liquid can be ingested to change certain secondary sex characteristics.

name: Elixir of Gender Transformation (Moderate)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This clear, bitter liquid can be ingested to change certain secondary sex characteristics.

name: Elixir of Life (Greater)
description: Activate A (manipulate)Elixirs of life accelerate a living creature's natural healing processes and immune system.

name: Elixir of Life (Lesser)
description: Activate A (manipulate)Elixirs of life accelerate a living creature's natural healing processes and immune system.

name: Elixir of Life (Major)
description: Activate A (manipulate)Elixirs of life accelerate a living creature's natural healing processes and immune system.

name: Elixir of Life (Minor)
description: Activate A (manipulate)Elixirs of life accelerate a living creature's natural healing processes and immune system.

name: Elixir of Life (Moderate)
description: Activate A (manipulate)Elixirs of life accelerate a living creature's natural healing processes and immune system.

name: Elixir of Life (True)
description: Activate A (manipulate)Elixirs of life accelerate a living creature's natural healing processes and immune system.

name: Elixir of Rejuvenation
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)The elixir of rejuvenation restores a creature to full health and eradicates toxins affecting it.

name: Elsie's Excellent Bottled Vim
description: Activate 1 Interact A dose of this slightly fizzy, pale-pink tonic vitalizes the body and bolsters the spirit, bringing those suffering from aches and pains brought on by illness some temporary respite.

name: Elven Absinthe
description: Specialists in Kyonin prepare this emerald-green beverage.

name: Elven Branched Spear
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Elysian Clairglass
description: Used by soldiers who battle on the borderlands of Elysium, particularly in Gorum's realm of Clashing Shore, these bronze spyglasses are somewhat plain-looking save for a single diamond set into the largest cylinder.

name: Elysian Dew
description: Activate 1 Interact When you drink sweet, sky-blue Elysian dew, for 1 minute, you gain a 10-foot aura that evokes the vitality of Elysium, causing nearby objects to seem more colorful and plants to stand taller.

name: Ember Dust
description: Activate 1 Interact This handful of gritty black dust glows faintly, like old coals, but is cool to the touch.

name: Emberheart
description: This small, heart-shaped amulet appears to be sculpted from stone with a single streak of dim light running through, like an ember just beneath ashes.

name: Emerald Fulcrum Lens
description: This concave green lens is pitted and flawed; its jagged edges can cut those who don't handle it with care.

name: Emerald Grasshopper
description: Activate A (concentrate) Requirements You're trained in Athletics This metal grasshopper studded with emeralds is usually clasped to the legs of a suit of armor.

name: Emerald Grasshopper (Greater)
description: Activate A (concentrate) Requirements You're trained in Athletics This metal grasshopper studded with emeralds is usually clasped to the legs of a suit of armor.

name: Emergency Disguise
description: Usage affixed to armor Activate 1 Envision Requirements You're trained in Deception In Woodsedge Lodge, this thin red ribbon, typically worn around the neck, symbolizes the reach of Galt's soul-trapping guillotines, the infamous final blades.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Emergency Eye
description: Activate f command Trigger You become , or an effect otherwise impedes your vision Requirements You are an expert in Perception.

name: Emetic Paste (Greater)
description: Activate 1 Interact creatures have difficulty swallowing, so you can Activate emetic paste by applying it to your skin or that of a sickened creature within reach, typically on the throat.

name: Empathic Cords
description: These intricately braided lengths of leather, twine, and ribbon can be worn around the neck.

name: Empathy Charm
description: This charm, usually placed on an animal companion's collar, contains a single strand of your hair, as well as one of your animal companion's, creating a link that better transmits emotional cues to a trained psychological assistance animal.

name: Empty Hand Marking
description: Members of the Empty Hand consider themselves leaders of Belkzen, and their fearsome reputation has helped control Urgir for generations.

name: Encompassing Lockpick
description: This lockpick houses a small compartment containing many smaller picks and other miniature tools.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Endless Grimoire

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Engulfing Snare
description: You arrange a spiky cage of bones, particularly tough vegetation, or other material to spring up when disturbed.

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Enigma Mirror

description: Activate 1 Interact A vial of this enigma-sight potion seems to contain fragments of kaleidoscopic crystal that reflect mind-bending scenes.

name: Enormous chryselephantine sculpture by a legend
Enormous tapestry of a major battle
Ensnaring Disk
description: Activate f envision Trigger You use the affixed shield to Shield Block a melee weapon attack Requirements You are an expert in Athletics.

name: Envisioning Mask
description: These strange masks consist of a thin stone hood and a shimmering purple veil reminiscent of the pleroma aeon who first gifted them to mortals in the hope that sharing the means of aeon communication would reduce the misunderstandings and conflicts among mortal civilizations.

name: Eroding Bullet
description: Ammunition round Activate 1 (manipulate)Eroding bullets cast a faint green glow, and smell like the sickly- sweet organic gases that rise from corpses.

name: Escape Fulu
description: Activate f envision Trigger You attempt to .The escape fulu is a charm common among wealthy people, who wear the talisman in case of kidnapping.

name: Essence Charm

source: Pathfinder #199: To Bloom Below the Web

name: Extendable Tail
description: Built with collapsible poles and expanding hoops, this tail can extend to a length of 20 feet.

name: Extended Deteriorating Dust
description: Contained in a specially enchanted small leather or hide sack, deteriorating dust is a potent caustic agent and a prized item among Rovagug's more discreet followers.

name: Extending
description: An extending rune allows you to extend your weapon to impossible lengths.

name: Extending (Greater)
description: An extending rune allows you to extend your weapon to impossible lengths.

name: Extra Lung

name: Extradimensional Stash
description: Granted by When you perform sleight of hand, you fold space so that objects really do disappear.

name: Exuviae Powder
description: Activate 1 (manipulate) Exuviae powder comes from cast-off shells of cicada-like insects native to the Plane of Earth, crushed to dust.

name: Eye of Apprehension
description: Activate F (concentrate) Trigger You are about to roll Perception for initiative but haven't rolled yet Requirements You are a master in Perception This round piece of cymophane's silky inclusion makes it look like a cat's eye.

name: Eye of Enlightenment
description: Usage affixed to a weapon Activate f envision Trigger You succeed at a Strike with the affixed weapon Requirements You're an expert in Arcana, Occult, Nature, Religion, Society, or a Lore skill.

name: Eye of Fortune
description: Adherents of Erastil, god of the hunt, create these magical eye patches.

name: Eye of the Mantis
description: This 1-inch tall figurine depicts a crouched praying mantis.

name: Eye of the Moonwarden
description: This beaded pendant crafted by Lyrune-Quah shamans features an uncut moonstone that warns the wearer of danger.

name: Eye of the Unseen
description: This prosthetic eye was designed by elven crafters but comes in a range of appearances for different ancestries.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Eye of the Unseen (Greater)
description: This prosthetic eye was designed by elven crafters but comes in a range of appearances for different ancestries.

name: Eye of the Wise

name: Eye Slash

description: Small scars or marks around your eye improve your distant vision.

name: Fade Band
description: Activate R (concentrate) Trigger An attack misses you Requirements You are trained in Stealth This thin, silvery wire wraps around your armor.

name: False Death

description: Activate f envision Trigger You would be reduced to 0 Hit Points by damage but not immediately killed Requirements You are unarmored.

description: Activate f envision Trigger You would be reduced to 0 Hit Points by damage but not immediately killed Requirements You are unarmored.

name: False Manacles

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: False-Bottomed Mug
description: Access Member of the Bellflower Network This mug looks like any other; however, the bottom part unscrews to reveal a velvet-lined chamber.

name: Familiar Morsel
description: Activate 1 Interact Familiar morsels are little treats that come in a wide variety of flavors that appeal to numerous creatures.

name: Familiar Satchel

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Familiar Tattoo

name: Fan of Falling Words
description: This folding handheld paper fan appears blank when first found, but if the wielder unfolds its leaves as an Interact action, they display an ink-brush painting of the wielder's choice.
source: Pathfinder #199: To Bloom Below the Web

name: Fan of Soothing Winds
description: This fan of soothing winds has six cloud-shaped glass beads on the bottom of the fan, one on each of the exposed ribs.

name: Fan of Soothing Winds (Greater)
description: This fan of soothing winds has six cloud-shaped glass beads on the bottom of the fan, one on each of the exposed ribs.

name: Fang Snare
description: You set snake fangs, poison stingers, or other venomous animal parts in the ground where they can be touched or stepped on by a creature that enters the snare's square.
source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On

name: Fanged
description: When etched with this rune, a weapon's hilt or haft becomes engraved with grooves that match the imprints of a wolf's teeth.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Fanged (Greater)
description: When etched with this rune, a weapon's hilt or haft becomes engraved with grooves that match the imprints of a wolf's teeth.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Farlight Stone
description: Farlight stones are common in libraries, monasteries, labs, and other places where simple but silent communication is important.

name: Fashionable Wayfinder
description: Fashionable wayfinders allow you to be dressed for success in almost any situation.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Fate Shot
description: Ammunition any Activate 1 command Fate shot is made of a nickel-steel alloy carved with the smiling face of a comedic player on one side, while the other side holds the frown of a tragic dramatist.

name: Faydhaan's Dallah
description: Noble faydhaan shuyookhs serve coffee brewed in ornate dallahs such as this one to welcome guests in their courts.

name: Fear Gem
description: Activate 2 (concentrate)Dark smoke seems to writhe within this obsidian gem.

name: Fearcracker
description: Activate Cast a Spell A fearcracker contains fragments of broken mirrors and reagents that pop and smoke when consumed.

name: Fearflower Nectar
description: The nectar of a night-blooming desert flower attacks a victim's central nervous system and causes feelings of panic.

name: Fearless Sash
description: A feeling of security radiates out from this sash made of fine yellow fabric.

name: Fearsome
description: When you critically hit with this weapon, the target becomes Frightened 1.

name: Fearsome (Greater)
description: When you critically hit with this weapon, the target becomes Frightened 2.

name: Fearweed
description: Activate 1 Interact Cultivated by mashing and fermenting toxic weeds found in lonely graveyards, fearweed is a greenish paste magically infused with psychic horror.
source: Pathfinder #160: Assault on Hunting Lodge Seven

name: Feast of Hungry Ghosts
description: Activate 1 hour (Interact) This lavish meal with meats, fresh and dried fruits, grains, and wine smells absolutely scrumptious, especially to undead.

name: Feather Step Stone
description: Activate F (concentrate) Trigger You Stride or Step Requirements You are trained in Acrobatics This stone, usually shaped as a cabochon, is a small chunk of amber with a bit of feather or a flying insect caught within it.

name: Feather Token (Anchor)
description: This feather can be activated only on a boat.

name: Feather Token (Balloon)
description: This feather can't be activated underwater.

name: Feather Token (Bird)
description: Each feather token appears to be a simple feather from some exotic bird.

name: Feather Token (Chest) (Ammunition)
description: Each feather token appears to be a simple feather from some exotic bird.

name: Feather Token (Ladder) (Ammunition)
description: Each feather token appears to be a simple feather from some exotic bird.

name: Feather Token (Puddle)
description: When activated, the feather transforms into two gallons of fresh, clear water.

description: Each feather token appears to be a simple feather from some exotic bird.

name: Feather Token (Tree)
description: Each feather token appears to be a simple feather from some exotic bird.

description: Each feather token appears to be a simple feather from some exotic bird.

name: Feral Linguist
description: Activate Cast a Spell (add 1 action) This wooden whistle is stuffed with cotton and carved with images of bellowing stags, howling wolves, and chirping birds.

description: Activate Cast a Spell (add 1 action) This wooden whistle is stuffed with cotton and carved with images of bellowing stags, howling wolves, and chirping birds.

source: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm

description: @Embed[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.xrJ4nGGgejUPf16q inline]

name: Feyfoul (Greater)
description: Activate 1 Interact To creatures other than fey, the scent of feyfoul seems to be a faint but non-obnoxious odor of cinnamon, but fey find that the stuff interferes with their ability to manipulate a creature's mind.

name: Feyfoul (Lesser)
description: Activate 1 Interact To creatures other than fey, the scent of feyfoul seems to be a faint but non-obnoxious odor of cinnamon, but fey find that the stuff interferes with their ability to manipulate a creature's mind.

name: Fiddle of the Maestro
description: This exquisite fiddle is perfectly carved and balanced to produce the purest sound while granting its player perfect balance and poise.

name: Field Guide
description: This book contains illustrations and information on edible and dangerous plants.

name: Fiend's Hunger
source: Pathfinder #196: The Summer That Never Was

name: Fiendbreaker
source: Pathfinder #211: The Secret of Deathstalk Tower

name: Fiendbreaker (Heroic)
source: Pathfinder #212: A Voice in the Blight

name: Fiendish Teleportation
description: You tap into the fiendish ability to slip through space.

name: Fighting Stick
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse

name: Final Blade
description: A Large or smaller restrained or willing creature can be executed by a final blade.
source: Pathfinder Adventure: Night of the Gray Death

name: Final Scalecloak
description: Fashioned from a swath of Mogaru's red-and-black hide and trimmed with Agyra's rough scales in green, blue, and white, this cloak draws upon the power of both kaiju, but at considerable cost.

name: Fingerprint Kit
description: Rarely found outside of major metropolises, fingerprinting kits are a state-of-the-art, non-magical means of linking suspects to the scene of a crime.
source: Pathfinder #157: Devil at the Dreaming Palace

name: Fire and Iceberg
description: Activate 1 Interact Fiery Anulite paprika, sunrise cinnamon, and winterbite are hidden inside this salad's translucent leaves, bringing the cool of snow and the heat of steam to every bite.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Fire and Iceberg (Greater)
description: Activate 1 Interact Fiery Anulite paprika, sunrise cinnamon, and winterbite are hidden inside this salad's translucent leaves, bringing the cool of snow and the heat of steam to every bite.

description: Activate 1 Interact Fiery Anulite paprika, sunrise cinnamon, and winterbite are hidden inside this salad's translucent leaves, bringing the cool of snow and the heat of steam to every bite.

name: Fire Box
description: Anyone who opens the box triggers a clockwork mechanism that unleashes a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] of fire.

name: Fire Poi
source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On

name: Fire-Douse Snare
description: You carefully pack rare, heat-absorbing powders into a specially prepared clay vessel, then bury the vessel in the ground up to its neck.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Monsters of Myth

name: Fire-Jump Ring
description: This black, metal ring is inset with rubies that occasionally give off wisps of smoke.

name: Firearm Cleaning Kit
description: This kit contains cleaning cloth, oil, small steel brushes, and other minor tools necessary for proper cleaning and maintenance of a firearm.

name: Firecracker Fulu
description: Activate f envision Trigger You critically succeed at an attack roll with the affixed weapon.
source: Pathfinder #196: The Summer That Never Was

name: Firefoot Popcorn
description: Activate 1 Interact When you consume firefoot popcorn, for 1 minute, you can double the normal distance.

name: Firestarter Pellets
description: Activate Cast a Spell (add 1 action)These compacted pellets of bat guano, sulfur, and magical accelerants have long been a staple for spellcasters on the battlefield.

name: Firestarter Pellets (Greater)
description: Activate Cast a Spell (add 1 action)These compacted pellets of bat guano, sulfur, and magical accelerants have long been a staple for spellcasters on the battlefield.

description: Activate Cast a Spell (add 1 action)These compacted pellets of bat guano, sulfur, and magical accelerants have long been a staple for spellcasters on the battlefield.

name: Fireworks Display
description: These displays are designed to create distinctive effects you can use to make onlookers marvel and even to gain an advantage in combat.Note: This item is to be used by the Firework Technician archetype.

name: Fishing Lure
description: When a lure is attached to a combat fishing pole, it can be used to make thrown weapon attacks with a range increment of 20 feet, though the lure must then be reeled back in with an Interact action before the weapon can be used at range again (see the tethered trait).

name: Fishing Tackle
description: This kit include a collapsible fishing pole, fishhooks, line, lures, and a fishing net.

name: Fishing Tackle (Professional)
description: This kit include a collapsible fishing pole, fishhooks, line, lures, and a fishing net.

name: Five-Feather Wreath
description: Identical feathers radiate from the center of this spellheart, held in place by woven straw.

name: Five-Feather Wreath (Greater)
description: Identical feathers radiate from the center of this spellheart, held in place by woven straw.

name: Five-Feather Wreath (Major)
description: Identical feathers radiate from the center of this spellheart, held in place by woven straw.

name: Flame Drake Snare
description: The snare takes the form of a Tiny, drake-like clockwork toy.

name: Flame Navette
description: Usage affixed to armor Activate A (concentrate)This piece of bronzite is shaped like an oval with points at both ends.

name: Flaming
description: A weapon with this rune is empowered by flickering flame.

name: Flaming (Greater)
description: A weapon with this rune is empowered by flickering flame.

name: Flaming Star
description: A sheen of red crosses the surface of this star-shaped goldstone medallion when the light hits it.

description: A sheen of red crosses the surface of this star-shaped goldstone medallion when the light hits it.

name: Flaming Star (Major)
description: A sheen of red crosses the surface of this star-shaped goldstone medallion when the light hits it.

name: Flare Beacon (Greater)
description: Activate 2 Interact Flare beacons create an incredibly bright light for a brief period of time.

name: Flare Beacon (Lesser)
description: Activate 2 (manipulate)Flare beacons create an incredibly bright light for a brief period of time.

name: Flare Beacon (Major)
description: Activate 2 Interact Flare beacons create an incredibly bright light for a brief period of time.

name: Flare Beacon (Moderate)
description: Activate 2 Interact Flare beacons create an incredibly bright light for a brief period of time.

name: Flare Snare
description: Using bioluminescent matter or alchemical reagents, you rig a short-lived flare to a trip wire or pressure plate.

name: Flash Beetle Lantern
description: This unassuming hooded lantern contains a mass of flash beetle eggs suspended in a magical solution.

name: Flashblade
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

name: Flashblade (Greater)
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

name: Flashblade (Major)
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

name: Flask of Fellowship
description: This is a metal drinking flask, 4 inches in diameter and 10 inches tall.

name: Flawed Orb of Gold Dragonkind
description: Each of the legendary Orbs of Dragonkind contains the essence and personality of a powerful dragon.

name: Flayleaf
description: The flayleaf plant is relatively common, though the mildly euphoric effects of smoking its dried leaves increase when it's sourced from plants specifically grown to produce such effects.

name: Fleshgem (Combat)
description: Originally developed as a body modification by oreads, fleshgems are crystals that can be implanted in the skin of a creature of any ancestry.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Fleshgem (Earthspeaker)
description: Originally developed as a body modification by oreads, fleshgems are crystals that can be implanted in the skin of a creature of any ancestry.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Flickering
description: A flickering rune causes a weapon to shimmer, grow blurry and indistinct, and momentarily turn invisible at random intervals for a second or two.

name: Flint and Steel
description: Flint and steel are useful in creating a fire if you have the time to catch a spark, though using them is typically too time-consuming to be practical during an encounter.

name: Floating Tent (Four-Person)
description: This diamond-shaped tent is designed for sleeping in planar environments without gravity, such as the Plane of Air.

name: Floating Tent (Pup)
description: This diamond-shaped tent is designed for sleeping in planar environments without gravity, such as the Plane of Air.

name: Floorbell
description: This surprisingly sturdy 3-foot-by-3-foot clay tile resembles a thick pressure plate.

name: Flower Press
description: A flower press resembles a book with wooden covers and straps that tighten down to apply pressure.

name: Flowing Water (Greater)
description: The Flood Truce is a season of relative peace, and this tattoo of a river can soothe your temper when you might otherwise lash out.

name: Flowing Water (Lesser)
description: The Flood Truce is a season of relative peace, and this tattoo of a river can soothe your temper when you might otherwise lash out.

name: Flowing Water (Moderate)
description: The Flood Truce is a season of relative peace, and this tattoo of a river can soothe your temper when you might otherwise lash out.

name: Flurrying
description: When you make a Flurry of Blows using the etched weapon and your first Strike reduces a creature to 0 Hit Points, you can make your second Strike with an echo of the weapon, increasing the reach to 30 feet.

name: Flying Blade Wheel Snare
description: When a creature enters the square, a deadly flying wheel of spinning blades launches at it, making a [[/r 1d20+35]] with an attack modifier of +35 and dealing @Damage[8d8[slashing]] damage.

name: Flying Broomstick
description: This broom has a tenuous connection to gravity, and it tends to drift even while stowed.

name: Folding Boat
description: This simple carved box can fold or unfold into a boat when activated.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Folding Boat (Greater)
description: This simple carved box can fold or unfold into a boat when activated.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Folding Drums
description: You can unfold this virtuoso percussion instrument into a hand drum (1 Bulk), a marching drum set with a shoulder harness and back brace (3 Bulk), or a large standing drum set with a built-in stool (16 Bulk).

name: Folding Ladder
description: Bulk 1 (3 unfolded) This multi-hinged, 10-foot ladder is useful for climbing upward or across dangerous pits.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Follypops
description: Activate 1 InteractThese savory breaded snacks stuffed with cheese, peppers, and "secret ingredients" of draconic or demonic origin are often offered alongside a challenge-complete a full portion and get a free drink.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Force Tiles
description: Activate Cast a Spell Light refracts in strange ways through these precisely ground glass tiles, lengthening the refracted force and causing it to push back.

name: Forensic Dye
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)Activating this vial of colorless liquid requires inserting a small amount of another chemical or material, such as blood or mud.

name: Forgefather's Seal
description: This rune was created by Torag, god of the forge, protection, and strategy, and shared with his greatest artisans and warriors.

name: Forgetful Drops
description: Activate 1 Interact Access Member of a secret society These innocuous, colorless drops can be poured directly into a victim's mouth, or slipped into their food or drink.

name: Forgetful Ink
description: Activate 1 Interact Used to write secret messages, a single dose of forgetful ink is enough to pen a page of text, often with flourishes extending to the page's edges.

name: Forgotten Shell
source: Pathfinder #161: Belly of the Black Whale

name: Forgotten Signet
description: At the center of this silver ring gleams an obsidian gem, its surface emblazoned with a bloodred rune of forgetting.

name: Formula Book (Blank)
description: A formula book holds the formulas necessary to make items other than the common equipment from Pathfinder Player Core; characters of the alchemist class typically get one for free.

name: Formulated Sunlight
description: A leshy can derive nourishment from specially formulated bottles of sunlight instead of natural sunlight.

name: Fortification
description: A fortification rune wards against the most deadly attacks.

name: Fortification (Greater)
description: A greater fortification rune wards against the most deadly attacks.

name: Fortifying Pebble
description: Usage affixed to armor, shield, or weapon Activate F envision Trigger The affixed object would take damage This small pebble is strangely dense and surprisingly durable, affixed to an object by a sturdy steel chain.

name: Fortune Cord
description: In many parts of Tian Xia, it's tradition to mint coins with holes in the centers for the purpose of being able to thread a cord through them and tie them off for security and ease of transaction.
source: Pathfinder #199: To Bloom Below the Web

name: Fortune's Coin
description: This coin is struck with the image of a beatific seraph in gold on one side and a fearsome fiend with seven eyes enameled in black on the other.

name: Fortune's Coin (Platinum)
description: This coin is struck with the image of a beatific seraph in platinum on one side and a fearsome fiend with seven eyes enameled in black on the other.

name: Fossil Fragment (Amber Mosquito)
description: A fossil fragment is a piece of a fossil creature, typically a smaller bone from a larger specimen.

name: Fossil Fragment (Brontosaurus Phalange)

source: Pathfinder #199: To Bloom Below the Web

name: Fox Marble
description: A gumiho wears a strange green amulet around its neck.

name: Foxglove Token
description: This small piece of wood is finely carved to depict a foxglove.

name: Foxglove Token (Greater)
description: This small piece of wood is finely carved to depict a foxglove.

name: Foxglove Token (Major)
description: This small piece of wood is finely carved to depict a foxglove.

name: Freeze Ammunition
description: Ammunition any Activate 1 InteractFreeze ammunition carries chilling reagents that activate on contact with the target.

name: Freezing Ammunition
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This chilly ammunition is dark blue and cold to the touch.

name: Frenzy Oil
description: This oil, which is pressed from vrock spores and mixed with a combination of acacia ash and thistle seeds, seeps into the skin of living creatures, initially inspiring irritability that unpredictably manifests as berserk rage.

name: Frightful Hag Eye
description: This item appears to be an ordinary semiprecious stone and is typically mounted on a brooch or ring, but the stone is, in fact, an eyeball.

name: Frog Chair
description: This clockwork traveler's chair is shaped like a wheeled frog, with springs attached to the bottom and an extensible tongue on the front.Activate—Frog Hop 1 (manipulate) Frequency once per hour Effect You activate the wheelchair's springs to make hopping leaps.

name: Frogskin Tincture
description: Activate A (manipulate) Once you imbibe this bitter elixir, your skin exudes a toxin for 1 hour, affecting any creature that hits you with a jaws Strike or other bite attack.

name: Frost
description: This weapon is empowered with freezing ice.

name: Frost (Greater)
description: This weapon is empowered with freezing ice.

name: Frost Breath
description: This bottle of frozen vapors is captured in the frozen peaks of the crown of the world.

name: Frost Fair Yanyuedao
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

name: Frost Worm Snare
description: The snare takes the form of a Tiny frost worm clockwork toy.

name: Frostwalker Pattern
description: Northern peoples design magical tattoos to protect against wintry weather, typically in geometric patterns with a combination of straight lines and whorls.

name: Frozen Lava
description: Activate A (manipulate)This blueberry-sized bead appears to be a sphere of glass with a flickering light at its core.
