description: Activate A (manipulate)This blueberry-sized bead appears to be a sphere of glass with a flickering light at its core.

name: Fu Water
description: Burnt fulu ashes float in this liquid, lending a distinctive red color and imparting it with a variety of purifying effects.

name: Fulcrum Lattice
description: This silver and copper framework is shaped to hold four focusing lenses, one behind the other, from smallest to largest.

name: Fulminating Spear
source: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind

name: Fulu Compendium
description: This pamphlet-sized book records the various symbols seen on fulu and also contains some ready-made magic on a special page that restores itself every day at sunrise.

name: Fulu of Concealment
description: Usage affixed to the ground in four spaces along a 10-foot radius circle Duration 1 hour This fulu comes in four pieces, one placed in each cardinal direction.

name: Fulu of Fire Suppression
description: The silver ink on this black paper charm ebbs in and out of sight, especially when caught out of the corner of your eye.

name: Fulu of Flood Suppression
description: This blue fulu bears dark ink that slowly swirls and twists about itself, expanding and contracting on the paper over the course of the day in time with the tides.

name: Fulu of the Drunken Monkey
description: Usage affixed to armor Activate f envision Trigger You attempt a Fortitude save against an ingested poison.

name: Fulu of the Stoic Ox
description: Usage affixed to armor Activate f envision Trigger You attempt a Fortitude save against a disease.

name: Fundamental Oil
description: Activate 1 Interact Made of elemental salts and essences from the Inner Sphere or where such planes leak onto the Material Plane, fundamental oil is anathema to elementals and other creatures with a weakness to elemental damage.

name: Fungal Armor
source: Pathfinder #161: Belly of the Black Whale

name: Fungal Walk Musk
description: Activate 1 Interact This foul-smelling unguent dulls the odors and traces that fungus creatures detect.

name: Furnace of Endings
description: Ash Cultists make use of these metal scroll cases to deliver secret messages or as ways to "smuggle" stolen documents since initial inspections find an elegant yet empty case.

name: Furnace of Endings (Greater)
description: Ash Cultists make use of these metal scroll cases to deliver secret messages or as ways to "smuggle" stolen documents since initial inspections find an elegant yet empty case.

name: Furnace of Endings (Lesser)
description: Ash Cultists make use of these metal scroll cases to deliver secret messages or as ways to "smuggle" stolen documents since initial inspections find an elegant yet empty case.

name: Furnace of Endings (Major)
description: Ash Cultists make use of these metal scroll cases to deliver secret messages or as ways to "smuggle" stolen documents since initial inspections find an elegant yet empty case.

name: Fury Cocktail (Greater)
description: Activate 1 Interact A fury cocktail is a fortifying ginger beer spiked with rum and a mixer.

name: Fury Cocktail (Lesser)
description: Activate 1 Interact A fury cocktail is a fortifying ginger beer spiked with rum and a mixer.

name: Fury Cocktail (Moderate)
description: Activate 1 Interact A fury cocktail is a fortifying ginger beer spiked with rum and a mixer.

name: Gadget Skates
description: Activate 1 (manipulate, move)Gadget skates are metal devices that come in pairs and strap onto existing footwear (or a creature's feet).

name: Gaffe Glasses
description: These wire-rim glasses appear to be glasses of sociability, making you think they grant a +1 item bonus to Diplomacy when they grant none.

name: Gakgung
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

name: Gallows Tooth
description: Activate A (manipulate) This grisly molar hangs from a cord threaded through a hole just above its dried, exposed root.

name: Galvanic Chew
description: Activate 1 Interact A galvanic chew is a processed ball of dried electric eel, roasted until chewy and coated in spicy, reagent-infused powder that tingles with electricity as you chew.

name: Galvanic Mortal Coil
description: This porous steel coil wraps around a shard of onyx, supplementing the closely guarded science of galvaspheres with the dark magics of unlife.

name: Galvasphere
description: Activate 2 (manipulate)A galvasphere animates a corpse to motion via electricity, rather than dark magic.

name: Gamepiece Chariot
description: This stone figurine of a chariot pulled by two horses was used by Tekritanin adults during strategy game competitions.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Monsters of Myth

name: Games (Loaded Dice)
description: A nigh-infinite assortment of games exist in Golarion.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Gamtu Hat
description: You conjure a magical gamtu hat, which is a magic item of light Bulk.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

name: Ganjay Book (1 bulk book)
description: This item is a formula book, religious text, or spellbook that has been creased-possibly by Princess Ganjay herself-to fold up into an impossibly small shape.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Ganjay Book (Light bulk book)
description: This item is a formula book, religious text, or spellbook that has been creased-possibly by Princess Ganjay herself-to fold up into an impossibly small shape.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Garrote Bolt
description: Activate 1 Interact The shaft of this silver bolt is engraved with wiry designs.
source: Pathfinder #161: Belly of the Black Whale

name: Garrote Shot
description: Ammunition any Activate 1 command Wiry designs mark the silvery coating on a garrote shot.

name: Gasping Lament
description: This collar is a silken cord from which hangs a small silver amulet that bears the likeness of a woman with her hand at her throat.

name: Gasping Lament (Greater)
description: This collar is a silken cord from which hangs a small silver amulet that bears the likeness of a woman with her hand at her throat.

name: Gate Attenuator
description: Gate attenuators are typically worn near the body's core and are shaped like portals or passageways, making literal the elemental gates kineticists possess within their bodies.

name: Gate Attenuator (Greater)
description: Gate attenuators are typically worn near the body's core and are shaped like portals or passageways, making literal the elemental gates kineticists possess within their bodies.

name: Gate Attenuator (Major)
description: When you invest the major gate attenuator, you either increase your Constitution modifier by 1 or increase it to +4, whichever would give you a higher score.

name: Gearbinder Oil (Greater)
description: Activate 1 Interact Gearbinder oil comes in a sealed pump that can squirt the oil a short distance.

name: Gearbinder Oil (Lesser)
description: Activate 1 Interact Gearbinder oil comes in a sealed pump that can squirt the oil a short distance.

name: Gearbinder Oil (Moderate)
description: Activate 1 Interact Gearbinder oil comes in a sealed pump that can squirt the oil a short distance.

name: Gearblade
source: Pathfinder #161: Belly of the Black Whale

name: Gecko Pads
description: Activate 2 (manipulate)Gecko pads are thin, clockwork devices shaped like palms, which can be strapped onto existing handwear or a creature's hands.

name: Gecko Pads (Greater)
description: Activate 2 (manipulate)Gecko pads are thin, clockwork devices shaped like palms, which can be strapped onto existing handwear or a creature's hands.

name: Gecko Potion
description: Activate A (manipulate) A gecko potion is a sticky, tawny brown liquid with flecks of sand suspended in it.

name: Gelid Shard
description: This crystal shard shimmers with its own light even as it seems to draw the heat out of its surroundings.

name: Genealogy Mask
description: Access Alijae ethnicity These large masks are forged of precious metals or carved of wood and tasked with guarding the history of a family.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse

name: Genius Diadem
description: Perception +22; precise vision 30 feet, imprecise hearing 30 feet, constant detect magic Communication speech (Common, Draconic, and eight other common languages) Skills Arcana +34, seven Lore skills +28, Occultism +28, Society +28 Int +8, Wis +0, Cha +4 Will +24 The genius diadem is a that typicall

name: Ghastly Cauldron
description: This black cooking pot can produce a feast fit for undead.Activate 3 Interact Frequency once per day Requirements The cauldron must be filled with water, herbs, bones, and raw meat, and kept at a boil for 1 hourEffect As you stir the cauldron, its contents transform into 10 meals suitable for undead

name: Ghost Ammunition
description: Ammunition any Ghost ammunition is cool to the touch.

name: Ghost Ampoule
description: Activate 2 Interact A daub of ectoplasm twitches within this glass container, faintly glowing with ghostly light.

name: Ghost Courier Fulu
description: Activate 2 command, Interact The inscription on a ghost courier fulu leaves space for a message, and a prominent red stamp indicates which ghost delivery fulu this fulu homes in on (see below).

name: Ghost Delivery Fulu
description: Duration 1 week A ghost delivery fulu's inscription resembles a dovecote with spirits around it, and it has a prominent stamp in red wax.

name: Ghost Dust
description: Activate A (concentrate) Requirements You are trained in Stealth This small vial is filled with a grayish-green dust rendered from dried ectoplasm.

name: Ghost Fowl Porridge
description: Activate 1 (manipulate) Access Tian Xia originThis robust porridge—made from a cockatrice distilled into a broth, hot peppers from a demonic source, and various toppings—causes diners to utter a ghostly wail from the intense heat.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

name: Ghost Ink
description: Activate 10 minutes (manipulate)This pale-blue ink dries rapidly, becoming fully transparent 1 minute after application.

name: Ghost Lantern
description: Crafted from cold iron, this black hooded lantern has gray glass and lenses that emit a pale gray light when the lantern is lit.

name: Ghost Oil
description: The vials containing this translucent, unsubstantial oil are always cold to the touch.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall

name: Ghost Scarf
description: This 6-foot-long scarf shimmers with the silvery light of the River of Souls while worn, providing illumination equivalent to that of a candle.

name: Ghost Touch
description: A weapon etched with this rune can harm creatures without physical form.

name: Ghostbane Fulu
description: Usage affixed to a weapon Activate f envision Trigger You successfully Strike an incorporeal creature with the weapon to which the fulu is affixed, but you haven't rolled damage.

name: Ghostcaller's Planchette
description: This miniature wooden planchette is engraved with symbols designed to attract spirits.

name: Ghostcaller's Planchette (Greater)
description: This miniature wooden planchette is engraved with symbols designed to attract spirits.

name: Ghostly Portal Paint
description: Activate 3 Interact Translucent and nearly weightless, this opalescent paint seems to resolve into occult symbols if stared at too long.

name: Ghostshot Wrapping
description: Activate f (concentrate) Trigger You attempt a ranged Strike with the affixed weapon while hidden or undetected.This long strip of linen is tightly wound around the barrel of the affixed firearm or the grip of a bow.

name: Giant Catch Pole
description: This sturdy pole has a rope attached to one end in a loop with the other end extending to the handle.

name: Giant Centipede Venom
description: Giant centipede venom causes severe muscle stiffness.

name: Giant Scorpion Venom
description: Scorpion venom is excruciating and its effects are somewhat debilitating.

name: Giant Wasp Venom
description: Giant wasp venom interferes with a victim's movement.

name: Giant-Killing
description: This weapon features stylized etchings of giants.

name: Giant-Killing (Greater)
description: This weapon features stylized etchings of giants.

name: Gift of the Poisoned Heart
description: Activate 1 minute (command, Interact) Those who fail to see the curse view this object as a priceless gift, capable of restoring life to the deceased, but deep in the heart of this diamond lies a single flaw: a fissured occlusion of sickly, tainted red.

name: Gill Hook
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Absalom, City of Lost Omens

name: Gills
description: Delicate folds in the skin just behind your ears ripple as water flows over them.

name: Ginger Chew
description: This chewy ginger candy aids digestion and soothes unsettled stomachs.

name: Gingerbread House
description: A gingerbread house is made of magical gingerbread sweetened with honey and spices, and further decorated with candies and icing.

name: Glass Cutter
description: This small rod has a tiny, sharp cutting wheel made of steel on one end and a thick bulb on the other.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Glasses of Sociability
description: These wire-rim glasses with large, circular lenses were invented for the sole purpose of avoiding awkward confrontations at social gatherings.

name: Gliding
description: The armor allows you to make a controlled descent.

name: Gliding Membranes (Greater)
description: Membranes that stretch between your arms and torso help you convert a fall into a glide.

name: Gliding Membranes (Lesser)
description: Membranes that stretch between your arms and torso help you convert a fall into a glide.

name: Glimmering Missive
description: Activate 2 envision, Interact A glimmering missive sparkles as you compose it.

name: Glittering Scarab
description: Access Member of the Esoteric Order of the Palatine Eye This pin is a valuable copy of a popular pin sold in markets throughout Osirion.

name: Glittering Snare
description: Small flecks of mica, sand, and ground glass are packed into a spring-loaded canister that can be rigged to a trip wire or hidden in a container.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Globe of Shrouds
description: The body of this censer is made of transparent crystal banded with dark iron.

name: Gloves of Carelessness
description: These gloves appear and function as Gloves of Storing but repel any item not stored in the gloves.

name: Glow Rod
description: Activate 1 (manipulate) This 1-foot-long, gold-tipped rod glows after it's struck on a hard surface.

name: Glowing Lantern Fruit
description: The flesh of this fruit pod resembles a stylized paper lantern, with a woody, geometric structure and thin layers of flesh, complete with a glow coming from the interior.

name: Glue Bullet
description: Ammunition round Activate 1 (manipulate)These cartridges are filled with sticky clear glue.

name: Goblin-Eye Orb
description: Usage affixed to a weapon Activate f (concentrate) Trigger You attempt a Strike with the affixed firearm or crossbow against an enemy that's concealed or hidden to you.

name: Godsbreath Bow
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Monsters of Myth

name: Gold mask of a high priest
Gold urn with scenes of judgment
Golden Branding Iron
description: Activate f envision Trigger You hit a target with a ranged Strike with the affixed weapon Requirements You're an expert with the affixed weapon.

name: Golden Branding Iron (Greater)
description: Activate f envision Trigger You hit a target with a ranged Strike with the affixed weapon Requirements You're an expert with the affixed weapon.

name: Golden Branding Iron (Major)
description: Activate f envision Trigger You hit a target with a ranged Strike with the affixed weapon Requirements You're an expert with the affixed weapon.

name: Golden Breath Fulu
description: Activate f envision Trigger You take damage.An enterprising chirurgeon reversed the forces evoked by a void thousand-pains fulu to create the golden breath fulu, which fortifies ki and the body as elements move out of balance.

name: Golden Chrysalis
description: Activate 1 Interact Threads of iridescent golden silk wrap around the core of this magical sling stone.

name: Golden Gloves
description: These golden-threaded gloves fit snuggly past the elbows, and imbue all other worn clothing with an aristocratic mien.

name: Golden Goose
description: This life-sized, hollow, golden goose statuette has an open, fanged mouth and an unsettling aura of hunger.

name: Golden Legion Epaulet
description: These gleaming golden epaulets are issued to Eagle Knight officers and worn as part of the uniform.

name: Golden Rod Memento
description: This coin-sized golden pin depicts a bundle of five trimmed tree branches.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Monsters of Myth

name: Golden Silencer (Greater)
description: Activate 1 Interact Requirements You're an expert in Stealth.

name: Golden Silencer (Standard)
description: Activate 1 Interact Requirements You're an expert in Stealth.

name: Golden Spur
description: Activate 1 command Trigger You hit a target within 120 feet with the affixed weapon Requirements You're a master in Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion.

name: Golden-Cased Bullet (Greater)
description: Ammunition round Activate 1 envision The magic-infused metal of this bullet's golden casing allows it to curve just a bit in flight once the bullet has been fired, allowing you to ignore the bonus to AC granted to a target in standard or lesser cover.

name: Golden-Cased Bullet (Major)
description: Ammunition round Activate 1 envision The magic-infused metal of this bullet's golden casing allows it to curve just a bit in flight once the bullet has been fired, allowing you to ignore the bonus to AC granted to a target in greater, standard, or lesser cover.

name: Golden-Cased Bullet (Standard)
description: Ammunition round Activate 1 envision The magic-infused metal of this bullet's golden casing allows it to curve just a bit in flight once the bullet has been fired, allowing you to ignore the bonus to AC granted to a target in lesser cover.

name: Golem Stylus
description: This small, diamond-tipped stylus allows you to inscribe a magical symbol on a golem's body and possibly gain control over it.

name: Gorget of the Primal Roar
description: This engraved duskwood gorget seems to vibrate with ferocity, granting you a +2 item bonus to Intimidation checks.

name: Gorgon's Breath
description: Activate 1 Interact Gorgon's breath is a fine powder that can easily enter living creatures' bloodstreams through their lungs before binding to mucous membranes and causing any nearby soft tissues to harden.

name: Goring Horn
description: A beast's horn or horns have been grafted onto your skull.

name: Gorum's Tear
description: Activate f (concentrate, fortune) Trigger You make an attack with the affixed weapon.This teardrop-shaped piece of iron is a naturally occurring mineral, said to be a solidified tear of bellicose joy shed by Gorum during his battles.

name: Gossamer Sash
description: Activate 1 hour (envision, Interact, move) This lightweight sash of spidersilk measures 20 feet long when fully unfurled.
source: Pathfinder #199: To Bloom Below the Web

name: Gossip's Eye
description: These discrete prosthetics have been the secret behind more than a few salacious rumors getting out among Taldan high society.

name: Gourd Home
description: This dried gourd seems entirely nondescript, as it is hollow and has a sturdy cord wrapped around its neck for easy carrying.

name: Goz Mask
description: Originally designed by a fanatical sect of Gozren priests, goz masks were designed to help navigate the area around the Eye of Abendego.

name: Goz Mask (Greater)
description: Originally designed by a fanatical sect of Gozren priests, goz masks were designed to help navigate the area around the Eye of Abendego.

name: Goz Mask (Major)
description: Originally designed by a fanatical sect of Gozren priests, goz masks were designed to help navigate the area around the Eye of Abendego.

name: Grail of Twisted Desires
description: This timeworn chalice is constructed of dull tin.
source: Pathfinder #152: Legacy of the Lost God

name: Granny's Hedge Trimmer
source: Pathfinder Adventure: Little Trouble in Big Absalom

name: Grappling Arrow
description: This small grappling hook is designed to be tied to a rope and fired from a bow.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Grappling Bolt
description: This small grappling hook is designed to be tied to a rope and fired from a crossbow.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Grappling Gun
description: This wooden, pistol-like device features a large reel coiled with 100 feet of thin metal cord and can fire a grappling hook up to 100 feet.

name: Grappling Gun (Clockwork)
description: This wooden, pistol-like device features a large reel coiled with 100 feet of thin metal cord and can fire a grappling hook up to 100 feet.

name: Grappling Hook
description: You can throw a grappling hook with a rope tied to it to make a climb easier.

name: Grasp of Droskar
source: Pathfinder Adventure: Crown of the Kobold King

name: Grasping Snare
description: You rig vines and ropes to hold a creature in place.

name: Grasping Tree
description: You rig tree branches, thin strands of bark, or other plant matter to close in on a creature that enters the snare's square.
source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On

name: Grave Token
description: Activate A envision This simple charm is made from compacted grave dirt infused with bone dust.

name: Gravemist Taper
description: Activate Cast a Spell A gravemist taper is a conical candle with symbols of terror and death carved into the wax.

name: Graveroot
description: The opaque white sap from the graveroot shrub clouds the mind.

name: Gravity Inverter
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)When you Activate a gravity inverter, you can either place it in an adjacent space or toss it up to 30 feet away.
source: Pathfinder #215: To Blot Out the Sun

name: Graymist
description: This black cape flows more like a vaporous liquid than fabric.

name: Grease Snare
description: This snare releases a stream of grease that coats the area, making movement difficult and potentially making the target slippery and clumsy.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Monsters of Myth

name: Green Dragon's Breath Potion (Adult)
description: This liquid contains blood from a green dragon.

name: Green Dragon's Breath Potion (Wyrm)
description: This liquid contains blood from a green dragon.

name: Green Dragon's Breath Potion (Young)
description: This liquid contains blood from a green dragon.

name: Green Wyrmling Breath Potion
description: This liquid contains blood from a wyrmling green dragon.

name: Greengut
description: This watery, mint-green emetic of xulgath design is often carried in a delicate obsidian vial or other fragile container.
source: Pathfinder #155: Lord of the Black Sands

name: Grievous
description: When your attack roll with this weapon is a critical hit and gains the critical specialization effect, you gain an additional benefit depending on the weapon group.

name: Griffon Cane
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Grim Ring
description: This golden ring is sculpted with the visage of a grinning skull on the side.

name: Grim Sandglass
description: One bulb of this tiny hourglass contains black sand, the other white.

name: Grim Sandglass (Greater)
description: One bulb of this tiny hourglass contains black sand, the other white.

name: Grim Sandglass (Major)
description: One bulb of this tiny hourglass contains black sand, the other white.

name: Grim Trophy
description: Activate A (concentrate)This talisman comes in many forms, most often a severed piece of a humanoid creature displayed in some gruesome manner.

name: Grim Trophy (Greater)
description: Activate A (concentrate)This talisman comes in many forms, most often a severed piece of a humanoid creature displayed in some gruesome manner.

name: Grimoire of Unknown Necessities
description: The cover of this grimoire is bound in a strange crimson, pebbly leather that a @Check[occultism|dc:40] check to Recall Knowledge identifies as the hide of a rare monster from the distant plane of Leng.
source: Pathfinder #173: Doorway to the Red Star

name: Grindlegrub Steak
description: Activate 1 minute (Interact) Fried grindlegrub is a common street food in Highhelm, but Sanra has elevated the dish to something almost gourmet for such pedestrian fare, bringing out both the height of its flavor and its natural energy boosting properties.

name: Grinning Pugwampi
description: Usage affixed to a weapon Activate F envision Trigger You damage an off-guard creature with the affixed weapon This bone statuette of a sneering gremlin crumbles to dust when activated, imparting a fraction of its subject's infamous misfortune unto those you strike.

name: Grit
description: Activate 1 Interact The save for addiction to grit is @Check[fortitude|dc:15|name:Grit Addiction|traits:virulent|showDC:owner], and the addiction has the virulent trait.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Absalom, City of Lost Omens

name: Grolna
description: Activate A Interact This caligni-made, murky-green drug supercharges a creature's olfactory senses at the expense of dulling their mind.
source: Pathfinder #157: Devil at the Dreaming Palace

name: Grub Gloves (Greater)
description: Danila Kenn and Depa Stepwell of Common Goods developed these gloves after complaints from an exhausted grindlegrub rancher.

name: Grub Gloves (Lesser)
description: Danila Kenn and Depa Stepwell of Common Goods developed these gloves after complaints from an exhausted grindlegrub rancher.

name: Grub Gloves (Moderate)
description: Danila Kenn and Depa Stepwell of Common Goods developed these gloves after complaints from an exhausted grindlegrub rancher.

name: Grudgestone
description: Activate f envision Trigger A creature critically hits you.

name: Grudgestone (Greater)
description: Activate f envision Trigger A creature critically hits you.This dull black pebble, ominously cold to the touch and curiously heavy for its size, is typically bound to the affixed weapon inside a strip of cloth wrapped around its grip.

name: Guardian Aluum Charm
description: A guardian aluum charm grants control over powerful aluums—metal and stone constructs created by the Pactmasters to help maintain order in the city of Katapesh.

name: Guardian Shield
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall

name: Guide Harness
description: The grip of this guide harness fits comfortably in the hand.

name: Guiding Cajon Drum
description: This wooden, box-shaped percussion instrument resonates with great power when struck.

name: Guiding Chisel
description: This magical chisel evokes the holy symbol of the elven goddess of art and architecture, Findeladlara.
source: Pathfinder #148: Fires of the Haunted City

name: Guiding Star Orb
description: Candlaron the Sculptor is one of Kyonin's most storied and honored wizards.
source: Pathfinder #211: The Secret of Deathstalk Tower

name: Guiding Star Orb (Heroic)
description: Perception [[/r 1d20+33 #Perception]]; precise low-light vision and hearing within 30 feet Communication telepathy (partner only) Skills Arcana [[/r 1d20+35 #Arcana]], Architecture Lore [[/r 1d20+35 #Architecture Lore]], Society [[/r 1d20+35 #Society]] Int +7, Wis +5, Cha +6 Will [[/r 1d20+33 #Will]
source: Pathfinder #212: A Voice in the Blight

name: Guise of the Smirking Devil
description: This ice-blue half-mask is adorned with a wicked silver grin that covers the wearer's mouth, leaving the rest of the face uncovered.

name: Guise of the Smirking Devil (Greater)
description: This ice-blue half-mask is adorned with a wicked silver grin that covers the wearer's mouth, leaving the rest of the face uncovered.

name: Gunner's Bandolier
description: This incredibly spacious bandolier can hold up to 4 one-handed crossbows or firearms that take no more than 1 action to completely reload (typically meaning that weapons with the capacity or repeating traits won't fit in the bandolier's holsters).

name: Gunner's Saddle
description: Developed by marauders from the Mana Wastes, this clockwork saddle comes with a retractable weapon mount that can be used as a tripod to stabilize a weapon with the kickback trait.

name: Gyroscopic Stabilizer
description: A gyroscopic stabilizer appears as a gold disk suspended within three rotating golden bands inside a gilded case, itself attached to a set of clamps.

name: Habu's Cudgel
source: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind

name: Hag Eye
description: This item appears to be an ordinary semiprecious stone and is typically mounted on a brooch or ring, but the stone is, in fact, an eyeball.

name: Hail of Arrows Snare
description: When a creature enters the snare's square, it releases hundreds upon hundreds of carefully prepared arrows, blanketing a 20-foot radius around the snare's square with massive arrow fire that deals @Damage[18d6[piercing]|options:area-damage] damage.

name: Hairpin of Blooming Flowers
description: The flower that adorns this hairpin is a blooming lotus flower that varies in color; it regrows in a day after the item is activated.

name: Halcyon Heart
description: This shekere features carved prayers barely visible under a fine silk net of colorful beads.

name: Hallajin Key
description: Alignment Chaotic Good Perception [[/r ]]; imprecise hearing 60 feet Communication telepathic images (Common), 60 feet Int +2, Wis +2, Cha +4 Will [[/r ]] Working together, Lumna and the crystal key form an intelligent magic item.
source: Pathfinder Society Scenario #4-11: Prisoners of the Electric Castle

name: Hampering Snare
description: You arrange brambles, wires, sticky goo, or other materials to interfere with a creature's movement.

name: Hand of the Mage
description: This mummified elf hand hangs on a golden chain, its gnarled fingers locked in a peculiar pattern.

name: Hand-Hewed Face
description: At the crossroads under a new moon, you traded your face for one that you can mold as though it were clay, sealed with a ribbon worn around your neck to hide the seam.

name: Handcuffs (Average)
description: Developed in Absalom and rarely used except by police forces in major cities due to their significant cost, handcuffs possess a ratcheting lock system in each cuff that allows them to be quickly cinched down on a captive's limbs, even if they're actively resisting.
source: Pathfinder #157: Devil at the Dreaming Palace

name: Handcuffs (Good)
description: Developed in Absalom and rarely used except by police forces in major cities due to their significant cost, handcuffs possess a ratcheting lock system in each cuff that allows them to be quickly cinched down on a captive's limbs, even if they're actively resisting.
source: Pathfinder #157: Devil at the Dreaming Palace

name: Handcuffs (Superior)
description: Developed in Absalom and rarely used except by police forces in major cities due to their significant cost, handcuffs possess a ratcheting lock system in each cuff that allows them to be quickly cinched down on a captive's limbs, even if they're actively resisting.
source: Pathfinder #157: Devil at the Dreaming Palace

name: Hardened Harrow Deck
source: Pathfinder #160: Assault on Hunting Lodge Seven

name: Harmonic Hauberk
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Harpoon Bolt
description: Ammunition round This iron spike can be fitted into the barrel of a two-handed firearm that doesn't have the scatter property with an Interact action.

name: Harrow Carrying Case
description: This elegant wooden case contains a recessed section to hold a simple or common harrow deck and a harrow mat.
source: Pathfinder #160: Assault on Hunting Lodge Seven

name: Harrow Deck (Common)
description: Used by gamblers and seers alike, this deck of cards comes in several varieties.
source: Pathfinder #160: Assault on Hunting Lodge Seven

description: Used by gamblers and seers alike, this deck of cards comes in several varieties.
source: Pathfinder #160: Assault on Hunting Lodge Seven

description: Used by gamblers and seers alike, this deck of cards comes in several varieties.
source: Pathfinder #160: Assault on Hunting Lodge Seven

name: Harrow Mat
description: This leather mat bears intricate designs and symbols embossed into them to enhance the mystique of a harrow reading.
source: Pathfinder #160: Assault on Hunting Lodge Seven

name: Harrow Spellcards
description: Crafted of sturdy paper, each card of this Harrow Deck showcases a beautiful watercolor illustration with space to inscribe a spell below.

name: Hat of Disagreeable Disguise
description: This elegant hat appears to be and functions as a Hat of Disguise.

name: Hat of Disagreeable Disguise (Greater)
description: This elegant hat appears to be and functions as a Hat of Disguise.

name: Hat of Many Minds
description: This pointy, brimmed hat made up of a rainbow patchwork of various materials seems to sit just a little lopsided on your head, no matter how you adjust it.

name: Hauling
description: Hauling weapons are adept at moving creatures around the battlefield after a successful attack.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Hauling (Greater)
description: Hauling weapons are adept at moving creatures around the battlefield after a successful attack.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Head Gem
description: Upon your brow is a gem that houses your soul.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

name: Headbands of Translocation
description: Headbands of translocation are silk bands that come in pairs and usually feature a prominent symbol of a nation or team.

name: Headwrap of Wisdom
description: This simple scarf is designed for wrapping around the head and comes with a gemmed pin for decoration.

name: Healer's Gel (Greater)
description: Activate Cast a SpellAn astringent aroma from rare succulent plants wafts off these soothing cloth patches.

description: Activate Cast a SpellAn astringent aroma from rare succulent plants wafts off these soothing cloth patches.

description: Activate Cast a SpellAn astringent aroma from rare succulent plants wafts off these soothing cloth patches.

description: These clean, white gloves never show signs of blood, even when used to stitch up wounds or treat other ailments.

name: Healer's Toolkit
description: This kit of bandages, herbs, and suturing tools is necessary for Medicine checks to , , , or .

description: This kit of bandages, herbs, and suturing tools is necessary for Medicine checks to , , , or .

description: Activate 3 Interact Healing vapor is a substance that accelerates natural recovery processes by dispersing a mist infused with a variety of reagents typically used for healing and recovery.

name: Heart Bloodstone of Arazni
description: The Heart Bloodstone of Arazni represents protection.

name: Heartblood Ring
description: Activate 1 Interact Sealed inside the compartment of a gold ring, heartblood has an unmistakable coppery taste, along with a thick mouth feel.

name: Heartening Missive (Bull)

description: This elaborate helmet is emblazoned with the divine symbols of a deity chosen when the helmet was crafted.

description: Not to be outdone by their cousins in Dongun Hold, the artificers of Highhelm have developed a handheld magical equivalent to their clockwork drilling constructs and vehicles.

name: Hive Mother Bottle

name: Holy

name: Holy Prayer Beads

description: This strand of ordinary-looking prayer beads glows with a soft light and becomes warm to the touch the first time you cast a divine spell while holding it.

description: Activate 1 (manipulate)The holy steam ball is an odd-looking device that's nevertheless effective at reinforcing its user's mind against fiendish control.

description: Refill for a Holy Steam Ball

name: Homeward Swallow

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Humbug Pocket (Greater)
description: Fine silk lines this fashionable pocket, which is typically cinched to a belt or tailored into a piece of formal clothing.

name: Hunger Oil
description: Activate 3 Interact Rendered from the fat of corporeal undead creatures and infused with ghoulish magic, this yellowish oil causes its victims to experience stabbing hunger pangs that only living flesh can abate.

name: Immovable
description: This rune utilizes magical principles used in an .

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

description: The traditional headwear for the Red Mantis assassin is the mask of the mantis.

name: Mask of the Mantis (Greater)
description: The traditional headwear for the Red Mantis assassin is the mask of the mantis.

name: Mask of the Mantis (Major)
description: The traditional headwear for the Red Mantis assassin is the mask of the mantis.

name: Mask of Uncanny Breath
description: A thin wooden mask carved in the shape of a skull, monstrous face, or eerily featureless visage, a mask of uncanny breath fully covers your face.

name: Masquerade Scarf
description: This delicately embroidered scarf matches with every outfit and can even complete a costume or disguise with illusions.Activate—Masquerade 1 minute (manipulate) Frequency once per day Effect You arrange the scarf over your lower face, and it casts a 1st-rank spell on you, which ends immediately if t

name: Masquerade Scarf (Greater)
description: This delicately embroidered scarf matches with every outfit and can even complete a costume or disguise with illusions.Activate—Masquerade 2 (manipulate) Effect You arrange the scarf over your lower face, and it casts a 2nd-rank spell on you, which ends immediately if the scarf is removed.

name: Master Magus Ring
description: Elegant jewelry such as the master magus ring adorns experienced magi.

name: Mat of Resilience
description: This light but sturdy woven mat, a miniature version of the floating foundations used in villages of the Dirt Sea, is carried tied in a tight roll.

name: Mat of Resilience (Greater)
description: This light but sturdy woven mat, a miniature version of the floating foundations used in villages of the Dirt Sea, is carried tied in a tight roll.

name: Matchmaker Fulu
description: Usage affixed to armor Activate f envision Trigger You attempt a Diplomacy check to Make an Impression.

name: Matchstick
description: Activate A (manipulate) An alchemical substance applied to one end of this tiny wooden stick ignites when struck against a rough surface.

name: Material Essence Disruptor (Greater)
description: Activate 2 (manipulate)A material essence disruptor emits bursts of disordered energy to break down the structure of a spell that manipulates material essence.

name: Material Essence Disruptor (Lesser)
description: Activate 2 (manipulate)A material essence disruptor emits bursts of disordered energy to break down the structure of a spell that manipulates material essence.

name: Material Essence Disruptor (Major)
description: Activate 2 (manipulate)A material essence disruptor emits bursts of disordered energy to break down the structure of a spell that manipulates material essence.

name: Material Essence Disruptor (Moderate)
description: Activate 2 (manipulate)A material essence disruptor emits bursts of disordered energy to break down the structure of a spell that manipulates material essence.

name: Matsuki's Medicinal Wine
description: Activate 1 Interact Old Matsuki's private brew has quite the kick.
source: Pathfinder #196: The Summer That Never Was

name: Maw of Hungry Shadows
description: Shadows swirl around this soot-black tome, swallowing up any light that touches them.

name: Mechanical Torch
description: Powered by electricity, you can turn a mechanical torch on and off by toggling a lever on the torch with an Interact action.

name: Membership Cords
description: Access Member of a secret society These braided wool cords are threaded with reflective metal threads in patterns specified by the purchaser.

name: Memoir Map
description: Your journeys and the major events in your life that occur after you obtain this tattoo appear on it, your life story traced upon your skin.

name: Memory Guitar
description: This simple guitar appears worn and battered from use, but upon close observation, the damage seems to be intentional.

name: Memory Palace
description: A memory palace is an elaborate magical structure that safely stores memories for easy access.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Menacing
description: Common among brutes who use the magic to scare others into compliance, menacing runes lend you a formidable appearance, granting you a +1 item bonus to Intimidation checks to others.

name: Menacing (Greater)
description: Common among brutes who use the magic to scare others into compliance, menacing runes lend you a formidable appearance, granting you a +2 item bonus to Intimidation checks to others.

name: Mender's Soup
description: Activate 10 minutes (Interact) This hot, broth-based soup typically contains tubers, leeks, zesty spices, reagents, and if desired, the meat of livestock.

name: Mending Lattice
description: Activate F (concentrate) Trigger The affixed item would take damage Requirements You are trained in Crafting This lattice of reinforced iron is shaped into a perfect octagon.

name: Merchant's Guile
description: The band of this ring is made from blue-colored iron and has two sharp, decorative protrusions on each side of the red-stone inlay.
source: Pathfinder Adventure: The Fall of Plaguestone

name: Merciful
description: Merciful weapons are sheathed in an unmistakable wispy green aura recognized by both gladiators and guards around the world.

name: Merciful Balm
description: Activate 1 Interact Smelling strongly of herbs and pine resin, merciful balm is a thick, sticky paste that can be used to anoint a weapon, granting the weapon the nonlethal trait for 1 hour.

name: Merciful Charm
description: Activate f envision Trigger You Strike with the affixed weapon Requirements You're trained in the affixed weapon.

name: Mercurial Mantle
description: This deep red cloak fits lightly about your shoulders, and the edges perpetually twitch slightly, as though caught in a breeze.

name: Mesmerizing Opal
description: Activate A (concentrate) This silver-bound opal pendant is afire with iridescence.

name: Messenger Missive
description: Activate 2 envision, Interact A messenger missive sends itself.

name: Messenger Missive (Multiple)
description: Activate 2 envision, Interact A messenger missive sends itself.

name: Messenger's Ring
description: This silver signet ring changes to match the insignia of a lord or organization you serve (or your own face, if you serve no one else).

name: Messenger's Ring (Greater)
description: This silver signet ring changes to match the insignia of a lord or organization you serve (or your own face, if you serve no one else).

name: Metalmist Sphere (Greater)
description: Activate A Interact This sphere contains small fragments of thunderstones within a colloidal suspension of a precious metal.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Metalmist Sphere (Lesser)
description: Activate A Interact This sphere contains small fragments of thunderstones within a colloidal suspension of a precious metal.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Metalmist Sphere (Moderate)
description: Activate A Interact This sphere contains small fragments of thunderstones within a colloidal suspension of a precious metal.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Meteor Shot
description: Ammunition round Activate 1 (manipulate)This craggy stone ammunition is warm to the touch.

name: Meteor Shot (Greater)
description: Ammunition round Activate 1 (manipulate)This craggy stone ammunition is warm to the touch.

name: Meteor Shot (Major)
description: Ammunition round Activate 1 (manipulate)This craggy stone ammunition is warm to the touch.

name: Metuak's Pendant
description: This black quartz pendant carved in the shape of an angel's feather hangs from a leather cord worn around the neck.

name: Midday Lantern (Greater)
description: This hooded lantern is made from brilliant, reinforced gold engraved with the image of the sun high in the sky.

name: Midday Lantern (Lesser)
description: This hooded lantern is made from brilliant, reinforced gold engraved with the image of the sun high in the sky.

name: Midday Lantern (Major)
description: This hooded lantern is made from brilliant, reinforced gold engraved with the image of the sun high in the sky.

name: Midday Lantern (Moderate)
description: This hooded lantern is made from brilliant, reinforced gold engraved with the image of the sun high in the sky.

name: Midnight Milk (Experimental)
description: Activate 1 Interact Midnight milk is a strange and powerful drug, originally invented by the intellect devourers of the alien city of Ilvarandin to remotely steal the bodies of distant dreaming victims through the use of an artifact called the Dream Lens.

name: Midnight Milk (Pure)
description: Activate 1 Interact Midnight milk is a strange and powerful drug, originally invented by the intellect devourers of the alien city of Ilvarandin to remotely steal the bodies of distant dreaming victims through the use of an artifact called the Dream Lens.

name: Midnight Milk (Refined)
description: Activate 1 Interact Midnight milk is a strange and powerful drug, originally invented by the intellect devourers of the alien city of Ilvarandin to remotely steal the bodies of distant dreaming victims through the use of an artifact called the Dream Lens.

name: Mind-Swap Potion
description: Activate 1 Interact Small bolts of brightly colored electricity flicker through the cloudy mind-swap potion.

name: Mind's Light Circlet
description: Gemstones of many colors adorn the silver of a mind's light circlet.

name: Mindfog Mist
description: Mindfog mist can be used to undermine spellcasters, as its effect on a victim's mental faculties are swift and powerful.

name: Mindlock Shot
description: Ammunition any Activate 2 command, envision Mindlock shot is made of luminous ectoplasm in a crystalline form.

name: Mindmurk Oil
description: Activate 1 Interact Often taken recreationally, mindmurk oil dulls the mind, creating a pleasant and euphoric stupor that inhibits the imbiber's decision-making skills and mental capacity.
source: Pathfinder Society Scenario #1-23: The Star-Crossed Court

name: Mindsponge
description: A mindsponge appears as a misshapen gray sponge that unsettlingly resembles a malformed human brain.
source: Pathfinder #189: Dreamers of the Nameless Spires

name: Miniaturization Module
description: A miniaturization module is a bulky clockwork belt interwoven with clear rubber tubing.
source: Pathfinder #215: To Blot Out the Sun

name: Minotaur Chair
description: A minotaur chair is a traveler's chair with chair storage, impulse control, and +1 striking wounding wheel spikes.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Miogimo's Mask
description: The crime lord Miogimo almost always appears with this special mask, crafted with a piece of his soul.
source: Pathfinder #161: Belly of the Black Whale

name: Mirror Goggles (Greater)
description: These goggles feature highly reflective lenses.

name: Mirror Goggles (Lesser)
description: These goggles feature highly reflective lenses.

name: Mirror Goggles (Moderate)
description: These goggles feature highly reflective lenses.

name: Mirror Implement
description: @Embed[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.N6KvTbaRsphc0Ymb inline]

name: Mirror of Sleeping Vigil
description: This jeweled mirror grants you gain greater control over your dreaming self.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Mirror of Sorshen
description: The silvery glass of this oval mirror displays alluring sights.

name: Mirror Robe
description: Thousands of small, reflective, mirrored glass shards have been carefully stitched down this long silk duster.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Mirror-Ball Snare
description: A mixture of metal shavings and flash powder inside this small, mirrored sphere ignites when disturbed, causing the ball to flash and spin.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Misdirecting Haversack
description: This brown leather satchel is made from a heavily oiled and rustic leather.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Misleading
description: This rune attempts to obfuscate your location through illusory trickery.

name: Missive Mint
description: Activate 1 Interact This white mint with a chalky coating appears to be a normal candy unless someone examining it succeeds at a @Check[crafting|dc:15] check to Identify Alchemy.

name: Mistform Elixir (Greater)
description: Activate A (manipulate) A faint mist emanates from your skin, making you for 5 minutes.

name: Mistform Elixir (Lesser)
description: Activate A (manipulate) A faint mist emanates from your skin, making you for 3 rounds.

name: Mistform Elixir (Moderate)
description: Activate A (manipulate) A faint mist emanates from your skin, making you for 1 minute.

name: Mistranslator's Draft
description: Activate 1 Interact A pickled lizard's tongue, tied into a knot, floats in this oily potion.

name: Miter of Communion
description: This ornate headgear comes in many different shapes and sizes, though most are elaborately decorated with motifs of the deity whose honor in which it was made.

name: Mnemonic Acid
description: Activate 1 Interact This translucent yellow-green liquid has a sharp, tangy odor and an oily sheen.

name: Mocker's Swazzle
description: A swazzle is a device made of two strips of metal bound with sinew and around a reed that, when held to the mouth, causes the user's voice to take on a distinctive rasping tone.

name: Monkey Pin
description: Activate A (concentrate)This small brass pin is shaped like a monkey climbing a tree.

name: Monkey's Fist
source: Pathfinder #157: Devil at the Dreaming Palace

name: Monkey's Paw
description: This dried, gnarled hand is clenched in a fist, waiting for a creature to pick it up.

name: Monster Suit
description: Monster suits are used in elaborate and often tawdry performances where actors portray monstrous creatures.

name: Moon Blossom Tea
description: Activate 1 Interact or 10 minutes (concentrate, Interact) This bright and citrusy tea is traditionally made with green tea combined with orange rind shavings and flower petals plucked during a full moon.

name: Moon Radish Soup
description: Activate 1 1 minute (Interact) In addition to its slightly spicy-sweet flavor, Svetlana Leveton's creamy moon radish soup is amazingly comforting, clearing the mind of anyone who has a bowl of it.

name: Moonkeep Hyacinth
description: These magical flowers are infused with the power to counteract the curse of the werecreature.

name: Moonkeep Lily
description: These magical flowers are infused with the power to counteract the curse of the werecreature.

name: Moonkeep Orchid
description: These magical flowers are infused with the power to counteract the curse of the werecreature.

name: Moonlit Ink
description: Activate 1 Interact Access Member of a secret society This alchemical ink is applied to a stamping device, typically a wooden seal or chop commissioned by the secret society and costing 1 sp.

name: Moonlit Spellgun (Greater)
description: Activate 2 Interact, StrikeElegant silver filigree contains the body of this ephemeral item, which is made of solid light.

name: Moonlit Spellgun (Lesser)
description: Activate 2 Interact, StrikeElegant silver filigree contains the body of this ephemeral item, which is made of solid light.

name: Moonlit Spellgun (Major)
description: Activate 2 Interact, StrikeElegant silver filigree contains the body of this ephemeral item, which is made of solid light.

name: Moonlit Spellgun (Minor)
description: Activate 2 Interact, StrikeElegant silver filigree contains the body of this ephemeral item, which is made of solid light.

name: Moonlit Spellgun (Moderate)
description: Activate 2 Interact, StrikeElegant silver filigree contains the body of this ephemeral item, which is made of solid light.

name: Moonsilver Necklace
description: Those who are in tune with nature understand well the transience of life and the migration of souls.
source: Pathfinder #199: To Bloom Below the Web

name: Moonstone Diadem
description: This delicate and elegant diadem is woven of intricate silver wires set with three tear-shaped pearlescent moonstones.
source: Pathfinder #152: Legacy of the Lost God

name: Moritype
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This plate of smoky glass is a variation on Dr.

name: Moritype (Greater)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This plate of smoky glass is a variation on Dr.

name: Morphing Weapon
description: In its base form, this armament looks like a smooth bar of soft, gleaming metal shaped like a horseshoe.

name: Mortal Chronicle
description: Common among fatalists and adventurers with access to resurrection magic, mortal chronicles look like tombstones, funeral plaques, or simple scrolls bearing the wearer's name or nickname.

name: Mortalis Coin
description: Activate f envision Trigger You are reduced to 0 Hit Points by damage but not immediately killed Requirements You are an expert in Fortitude saves.This small golden coin is usually stamped with the image of a boar or other resilient creature.

name: Mortar of Hidden Meaning
description: This matching mortar and pestle are made from immaculate duskwood that looks nearly olive in the right light.

name: Mother Maw
description: This item appears to be and functions as a portable hole, but it's actually the maw of an alien extradimensional creature akin to and older than a bag of devouring.

name: Motivating Treat Bag
description: This stiff, cloth pouch is embroidered with whimsical images of playful pets.

name: Mountain to the Sky
description: Activate 1 minute (Interact) This tiny, carved walnut shell contains a sacred mountain within.

name: Mourner's Dawnlight Fulu
description: Activate 3 command, envision, Interact A mourner's dawnlight fulu is a stack of pages that resembles joss paper, used to locate the remains of the lost.

name: Mudlily
description: This golden flower grows amid filthy ponds or puddles, its spotless yellow petals sharply contrasting its soiled surroundings.

name: Mudrock Snare
description: Fired clay covers a shallow pit of thin mud interspersed with fragile vials of a quick-drying agent.

name: Mukradi Jar
description: Activate 2 Interact A miniature mukradi, its chitin shrunken and pale, is coiled within this jar.

name: Mummified Bat
description: Activate A (concentrate)This talisman is the magically treated corpse of a tiny bat bound in papyrus.

name: Murderer's Knot
description: Activate F (concentrate) Trigger You damage an creature with a Strike using the affixed weaponThis black strand of leather is tied to look like a peace knot when the weapon is worn, but it doesn't hamper drawing the weapon.

name: Musical Instrument (Handheld)
description: Handheld instruments include bagpipes, a small set of chimes, small drums, fiddles and viols, flutes and recorders, small harps, lutes, trumpets, and similarly sized instruments.

name: Musical Instrument (Heavy)
description: Handheld instruments include bagpipes, a small set of chimes, small drums, fiddles and viols, flutes and recorders, small harps, lutes, trumpets, and similarly sized instruments.

name: Musical Instrument (Virtuoso handheld)
description: Handheld instruments include bagpipes, a small set of chimes, small drums, fiddles and viols, flutes and recorders, small harps, lutes, trumpets, and similarly sized instruments.

name: Musical Instrument (Virtuoso heavy)
description: Handheld instruments include bagpipes, a small set of chimes, small drums, fiddles and viols, flutes and recorders, small harps, lutes, trumpets, and similarly sized instruments.

name: Mustard Powder
description: Activate 1 Interact Concocted from the formulas provided by otherworldly refugees to Irrisen, mustard powder is rumored to be devastating to entire armies with proper dispersal.

name: Mutagenic Renovator
description: Activate 1 Interact This sludgy concoction is said to be derived from liquefied mutant scales.

name: Mutator Onyx
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)A mutator onyx is a jet-black, alien mineral first found within the walls of the Onyx Citadel but is now used primarily as an alchemical teaching or experimentation tool within Oprak.

name: Mythic Armor Potency
description: This armor is etched with a mythical ward providing unparalleled defense.

name: Mythic Resilient
description: Mythic resilient runes imbue armor with unrivaled protection from a wide array of effects.

name: Mythic Striking
description: This weapon is filled with unmatched destructive power.

name: Mythic Weapon Potency
description: This weapon strikes with peerless accuracy to pierce the defenses of the mightiest monstrosities.

name: Nap Gas Dispenser
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)When you Activate a nap gas dispenser, you can either place it in an adjacent space or toss it up to 30 feet away.
source: Pathfinder #215: To Blot Out the Sun

name: Nauseating Snare
description: You position particularly foul substances to splash over a creature.

name: Navaratna of the Solar Ruby
description: These nine flawless gems are set within a golden necklace, their centerpiece a holy ruby pulled from the center of a sun.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

name: Navigator's Feather
description: Activate f (concentrate, fortune) Trigger You would roll a Survival check to or but haven't rolled yet Requirements You're trained in Survival.

name: Navigator's Star
description: A star inked on the back of the hand, usually between the thumb and forefinger, keeps you on the right path.

name: Necklace of Allure
description: Several sapphires are set along the length of this brilliant silver necklace.

name: Necklace of Fireballs I
description: This string of beads appears to be a hemp string with lustrous red beads of various sizes hanging from it.

name: Necklace of Fireballs II
description: This string of beads appears to be a hemp string with lustrous red beads of various sizes hanging from it.

name: Necklace of Fireballs III
description: This string of beads appears to be a hemp string with lustrous red beads of various sizes hanging from it.

name: Necklace of Fireballs IV
description: This string of beads appears to be a hemp string with lustrous red beads of various sizes hanging from it.

name: Necklace of Fireballs V
description: This string of beads appears to be a hemp string with lustrous red beads of various sizes hanging from it.

name: Necklace of Fireballs VI
description: This string of beads appears to be a hemp string with lustrous red beads of various sizes hanging from it.

name: Necklace of Fireballs VII
description: This string of beads appears to be a hemp string with lustrous red beads of various sizes hanging from it.

name: Necklace of Knives
description: This necklace strung with miniature stone throwing knives.

name: Necklace of Strangulation
description: This beautiful necklace appears to be a magical item such as a necklace of fireballs or a pendant of the occult.

name: Necrobinding Serum
description: Activate 2 Interact This potent necromantic serum is distilled from the body of an intelligent corporeal undead who seeks to establish absolute control over their undead minions.
source: Pathfinder Adventure: Crown of the Kobold King

name: Necrotic Cap (Greater)
description: Activate Cast a Spell (add 1 action)You can use this slimy, rotting mushroom as a spell catalyst when you cast an spell by tapping it against the target, causing the mushroom to release a cloud of necrotic spores.

name: Necrotic Cap (Lesser)
description: Activate Cast a Spell (add 1 action)You can use this slimy, rotting mushroom as a spell catalyst when you cast an spell by tapping it against the target, causing the mushroom to release a cloud of necrotic spores.

name: Necrotic Cap (Major)
description: Activate Cast a Spell (add 1 action)You can use this slimy, rotting mushroom as a spell catalyst when you cast an spell by tapping it against the target, causing the mushroom to release a cloud of necrotic spores.

name: Necrotic Cap (Moderate)
description: Activate Cast a Spell (add 1 action)You can use this slimy, rotting mushroom as a spell catalyst when you cast an spell by tapping it against the target, causing the mushroom to release a cloud of necrotic spores.

name: Nectar of Purification
description: Activate A (manipulate) A shimmering liquid, nectar of purification is often stored in bottles similar to those used for vinegar.

name: Needle of Undeath
description: This thin, wand-like implement is carved from bone and scrimshawed with depictions of battle.

name: Nemesis Name
description: You want revenge badly enough that you tattoo your nemesis's name in a place you can easily see to remember your vow to settle the score.

name: Neophyte's Fipple
description: Activate 1 Requirements You are untrained in Performance.

name: Net
description: You can use a net either on its own or attached to a rope.

name: Net Launcher
description: This wide, hollow tube is two to three feet long and fires an unattached net at much greater range than one can be thrown.

name: Nethershade
description: Activate 2 (manipulate)Distilled from the Netherworld, this oily substance imposes tenebrous effects.

name: Netherwalk Incense
description: Activate 1 minute (concentrate, manipulate)This stick of dark-gray incense carries a faint, strange odor that's different for any creature that smells it—mimicking a scent that evokes feelings of nostalgia or homesickness.

name: Nettleweed Residue
description: Activate A (manipulate)Concentrated sap of stinging weeds makes an effective toxin.

name: Nevercold
description: Activate Cast a Spell (add 1 action) Nevercold, sometimes mistakenly referred to as nevercoal, is the charcoal left after wildfires in the First World.

name: Nevercold (Compressed)
description: Activate Cast a Spell (add 1 action) Nevercold, sometimes mistakenly referred to as nevercoal, is the charcoal left after wildfires in the First World.

name: Nevercold (Refined)
description: Activate Cast a Spell (add 1 action) Nevercold, sometimes mistakenly referred to as nevercoal, is the charcoal left after wildfires in the First World.

name: Nightbreeze Machine
description: The nightbreeze machine can turn a scorching hot room into a comfortable one with just the pull of a lever.

name: Nightmare
description: A nightmare rune creates minor phantasmal alterations to a weapon's appearance so that those who look upon it see subtle reminders of their deepest fears.

name: Nightmare Cudgel
source: Pathfinder #161: Belly of the Black Whale

name: Nightmare Salt
description: This potent poison consists of crystals whose flavor and appearance mimics edible salt but whose effects are deadly: victims experience periods of waking nightmares that overload the senses and eventually result in death through a combination of shock and exhaustion.

name: Nightmare Vapor
description: Purportedly sourced from any number of outlandish locales, nightmare vapor is most often created by boiling the sweat collected from humanoids caught in the throes of terrible nightmares.

name: Nightpitch
description: Activate Cast a Spell A pellet of tar mixed with the fur of a nocturnal creature, such as a bat, nightpitch used to cast a spell makes the area of the darkness difficult terrain.

name: Nightstick
source: Pathfinder #157: Devil at the Dreaming Palace

name: Nimbus Breath
description: Activate 1 (manipulate) The dwarves of Cloudspire Citadel in Golarion's Mwangi Expanse create bottles of nimbus breath by capturing and bottling the fluffiest nimbus clouds from the lairs of cloud dragons.

name: Noisemaker Snare
description: When a creature enters this snare's square, it triggers an extremely loud clockwork device, which explodes with a bang that can be heard from 200 feet away and deals @Damage[1d8[fire]] damage.

name: Nomad's Shawl
description: The intricate beading of this shawl subtly guides you.

name: Noppera-Bo Hood
description: This unpleasant-looking hood appears to be a completely smooth, round sack of skin that feels uncannily warm to the touch.
source: Pathfinder #196: The Summer That Never Was

name: Noqual Chunk
description: Light and strong, noqual also demonstrates a powerful resistance to magic.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Noqual Ingot
description: Light and strong, noqual also demonstrates a powerful resistance to magic.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Nosoi Charm
description: Nosois serve as scribes and messengers to psychopomps.
source: Pathfinder Adventure: Night of the Gray Death

name: Nosoi Charm (Greater)
description: Nosois serve as scribes and messengers to psychopomps.
source: Pathfinder Adventure: Night of the Gray Death

name: Nostalgic Pot
description: This small pot filled with pebbles is imbued with the nostalgia of its owner.

name: Noxious Incense
description: Activate Cast a Spell Sold only in single sticks, this foul incense comes coated with a bevy of alchemical smoke that activates in the presence of intense heat, releasing its namesake pungent odor.

name: Noxious Incense (Greater)
description: Activate Cast a Spell Sold only in single sticks, this foul incense comes coated with a bevy of alchemical smoke that activates in the presence of intense heat, releasing its namesake pungent odor.

name: Numbing Tonic (Greater)
description: Activate 1 Interact Numbing tonic makes it easier to push through the pain of battle and shrug off otherwise debilitating blows.

name: Numbing Tonic (Lesser)
description: Activate 1 Interact Numbing tonic makes it easier to push through the pain of battle and shrug off otherwise debilitating blows.

name: Numbing Tonic (Major)
description: Activate 1 Interact Numbing tonic makes it easier to push through the pain of battle and shrug off otherwise debilitating blows.

name: Numbing Tonic (Minor)
description: Activate 1 Interact Numbing tonic makes it easier to push through the pain of battle and shrug off otherwise debilitating blows.

name: Numbing Tonic (Moderate)
description: Activate 1 Interact Numbing tonic makes it easier to push through the pain of battle and shrug off otherwise debilitating blows.

name: Numbing Tonic (True)
description: Activate 1 Interact Numbing tonic makes it easier to push through the pain of battle and shrug off otherwise debilitating blows.

name: Numerian Steel Breastplate
source: Pathfinder Society Scenario #1-24: Lightning Strikes, Stars Fall

name: Oak Potion
description: Activate A (manipulate) After you drink this bitter draft, your skin thickens like bark.

name: Oath of the Devoted
description: You gain fire and mental resistance 5.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse

name: Oathlamp of Accord
description: This hooded lantern takes the form of a translucent prism.

name: Obfuscation Oil
description: Activate A (manipulate) You can spread this blue-gray gel on a single item with a Bulk of 3 or less to ward it against magical detection.

name: Oblivion Essence
description: Created from a daemon's powdered soul gems or refined from the waters of Abaddon's rivers, oblivion essence causes victims to rapidly age and decay.

name: Obsidian Goggles
description: The sleek, black lenses of these goggles somehow make everything seem more brightly lit.

name: Obsidian Goggles (Greater)
description: The sleek, black lenses of these goggles somehow make everything seem more brightly lit.

name: Obsidian Goggles (Major)
description: The sleek, black lenses of these goggles somehow make everything seem more brightly lit.

name: Occult Scroll Case of Simplicity
description: The four different types of scroll cases of simplicity often bear adornments appropriate to their magical tradition, such as angelic wings or otherworldly lettering.

name: Ochre Fulcrum Lens
description: This brownish-orange lens always feels dusty and gritty, regardless of how often it's polished, though it doesn't impede light shining through it.

name: Octopus Bottle
description: Activate 2 Interact Miniature octopus arms press up against the sides of this bottle, obscuring the rest of its contents.

name: Octopus Potion (Greater)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate) Eight flailing octopus arms covered in suckers pop out from the sides of your body when you imbibe this potion.

name: Octopus Potion (Lesser)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate) Eight flailing octopus arms covered in suckers pop out from the sides of your body when you imbibe this potion.

name: Octopus Potion (Moderate)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate) Eight flailing octopus arms covered in suckers pop out from the sides of your body when you imbibe this potion.

name: Oculus of Abaddon

name: Ogre Hook
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

name: Ogre Spider Filament

name: Oil of Corpse Restoration

source: Pathfinder #189: Dreamers of the Nameless Spires

name: Oil of Dynamism
description: Activate 2 (manipulate)This fine golden oil comes in a small blue canister.

name: Oil of Dynamism (Greater)
description: Activate 2 (manipulate)This fine golden oil comes in a small blue canister.

name: Oil of Keen Edges

name: Oil of Ownership (Greater)

description: Activate 1 Interact You can coat objects of 6 Bulk or less with oil of ownership, or "red-handed oil" as some call it.

description: Activate 1 (manipulate)When you apply this thick, viscous oil to a weapon or suit of armor, that item immediately becomes magically potent.

description: Activate A (manipulate)When you apply this thick, viscous oil to a weapon or suit of armor, that item immediately becomes magically potent.

name: Oil of Repulsion

name: Oil of Revelation
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This bright oil, first created by humans as a tool to help them fight in darkness, holds flecks of tiny gemstones in suspension and smells like a struck matchstick.

name: Oil of Skating
description: Activate 1 Interact This thin, slippery oil shimmers with a golden hue.

name: Oil of Swiftness
description: Activate 1 Interact Anoint a weapon with oil of swiftness, which hisses upon application, to give it the benefits of the Speed rune for 1 minute.

name: Oil of Unlife (Greater)

name: Oil of Unlife (Lesser)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This thin, black liquid imparts a bone-deep chill while rapidly repairing an undead creature's physical or spiritual form.

description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This thin, black liquid imparts a bone-deep chill while rapidly repairing an undead creature's physical or spiritual form.

description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This thin, black liquid imparts a bone-deep chill while rapidly repairing an undead creature's physical or spiritual form.

name: Oil of Unlife (Moderate)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This thin, black liquid imparts a bone-deep chill while rapidly repairing an undead creature's physical or spiritual form.

name: Oil of Weightlessness
description: Activate 1 (manipulate) You can spread this shimmering oil on an item of 1 Bulk or less to make it feel weightless.

name: Oil of Weightlessness (Greater)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate) You can spread this shimmering oil on an item of 2 Bulk or less to make it feel weightless.

name: Oilskin Pouch
description: Treated with oil and animal fats, the leather of this pouch is more resistant to water but is also stiffer.

name: Oily Button
description: Usage affixed to armor Activation F envision Trigger You succeed at an Athletics check to Disarm Requirements You are an expert in Athletics.

name: Old Tillimaquin
description: This beloved tavern mascot is a shabby old stuffed beast mounted on an immense slab of ironwood.

name: Olfactory Obfuscator (Greater)
description: Activate A Interact This frothing fluid causes the drinker's body to exude trace odor absorbing oils.

name: Olfactory Obfuscator (Lesser)
description: Activate A Interact This frothing fluid causes the drinker's body to exude trace odor absorbing oils.

name: Olfactory Stimulators

name: Ommatophoric Mutagen
description: Activate A (manipulate) Your eyes bulge from their sockets and extend upwards from your head on long, prehensile stalks, greatly enhancing your eyesight and field of view but leaving you unable to close your eyes, increasing your vulnerability to harmful visual effects.

name: Omnidirectional Spear Snare
description: As soon as a creature enters the snare's square, the snare unleashes wickedly powerful spears at the creature from all directions, dealing @Damage[15d8[piercing]] damage (@Check[reflex|showDC:all|dc:37|basic] save).

name: One Hundred Victories
description: One hundred cuts, healed into diamond-shaped scars, represent the ability to withstand the attacks of your enemies.

name: One-Hour Flower
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)Popular with lovers, decorators, and sports fans, the seeds of these ephemeral plants grow and bloom immediately into flowers when placed in any warm environment, including a cup of dirt, a bowl of warm water, and a tightly clenched hand.

name: Onyx Panther
description: Activate 1 (concentrate) This beautiful black pebble is sculpted into a stylized panther shape.

name: Ooze Ammunition (Greater)
description: Ammunition any Activate 1 InteractOoze ammunition is a capsule containing a sticky substance.

name: Ooze Ammunition (Lesser)
description: Ammunition any Activate 1 InteractOoze ammunition is a capsule containing a sticky substance.

name: Ooze Ammunition (Major)
description: Ammunition any Activate 1 InteractOoze ammunition is a capsule containing a sticky substance.

name: Ooze Ammunition (Moderate)

name: Oozepick

name: Oozepick (Greater)
description: Activate 1 Interact You can pour this silver ooze into a lock or similar mechanism to create a set of malleable lockpicks and tools that conform to internal mechanisms.

name: Open Mind
description: Abraxas teaches knowledge is the only power that matters.

name: Oracular Crown

name: Orb of Dragonkind
description: Each of the legendary orbs of dragonkind contains the essence and personality of a powerful dragon, with each of the 10 most famous orbs preserving a different type of metallic or chromatic dragon's spirit.

name: Orc Warmask
description: Granted by You paint your face to create a warmask, an invested magic item of negligible Bulk with an item level equal to your level and a usage of worn (mask).

name: Orchestral Brooch
description: Usage affixed to armor Activate f envision Trigger You attempt a Performance check, but you haven't rolled yet Requirements You're a master in Performance.

name: Orichalcum Chunk
description: The most rare and valuable skymetal, orichalcum is coveted for its incredible time-related magical properties.

name: Orichalcum Ingot
description: The most rare and valuable skymetal, orichalcum is coveted for its incredible time-related magical properties.

name: Origin Unguent
description: Activate 1 Interact This shimmering, violet unguent forms mild chemical bonds between objects with a matching composition.

name: Original manuscript from a world‑famous author
Orm Choker
description: This elaborate choker is fashioned from the treated hide of a water orm.

name: Osteomancer's Pouch
description: This leather pouch holds a pair of six-sided dice carved from actual knucklebones.

name: Overloaded Brain Grenade
description: Activate 2 Interact It's possible for a desperate alchemist to rig the brain container of a defeated alchemical golem to create a volatile (if unusual) explosive.

name: Owlbear Egg
description: Activate 2 Interact Not only are owlbear eggs delicious when boiled, but when infused with a mix of alchemical reagents, they also make you emit a long screech much like an owlbear's.

name: Oxygen Ooze
description: Activate 1 Interact You can chew on this translucent green ooze to cause it to expand into a bubble of slime that envelops your mouth and nose.

name: Pacifying
description: This rune turns weapons into instruments of peacemaking.

name: Pact of Blood-Taking
description: Devil Decipher Writing Society, Warfare Lore You negotiate for might and viciousness.

name: Pactmaster's Grace

name: Paint Set
description: This set of painting supplies includes paints, brushes, jars, a palette, a set of small canvases, and a miniature easel.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Paired
description: These runes always come in pairs and can be applied to a garment's pockets to be activated.

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Pallesthetic Mutagen

name: Panacea

source: Pathfinder #199: To Bloom Below the Web

name: Paper Shredder

name: Parade Armor

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall

name: Paradise Light

name: Parchment of Direct Message

name: Parchment of Secrets
description: Access Member of a secret society This parchment is crafted with illusion magic, allowing for the transfer of secret messages.

name: Parrying Scabbard

name: Passage Charm

name: Passage Pane
description: The pane of this large circular mirror has a diameter of 8 feet and a gray cast.

name: Pathfinder Chronicle

name: Pathfinder's Coin

name: Peace in Dreams Tea

name: Peacemaker
description: Usage affixed to a weapon Activate a (concentrate, manipulate) Requirements Your last action was an Interact action to stow the affixed firearm or crossbow.This ragged piece of white cloth is wrapped around the grip, stock, or haft of the affixed weapon.

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Piercing Horn
description: A beast's horn or horns have been grafted onto your skull.

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Monsters of Myth

name: Pilferer's Gloves
description: Made of soft and subtle black leather, these gloves fit tightly but aren't uncomfortable and don't impede your sense of touch.

name: Pilgrim's Token
description: This wooden religious symbol is a small token of protection from a site holy to your faith.

name: Pillow Shield
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Pinwheel

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Pipe of Dancing Smoke
description: This ornate pipe is chiseled from a single bloodstone piece with wooden accents.

name: Pipes of Compulsion
description: These panpipes are made of what seems to be beat-up tin bound by frayed leather and look like they shouldn't function at all, but in skilled hands they emit a beautiful sound that beguiles the senses.

name: Pipes of Compulsion (Greater)
description: These panpipes are made of what seems to be beat-up tin bound by frayed leather and look like they shouldn't function at all, but in skilled hands they emit a beautiful sound that beguiles the senses.

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
