name: Plasma Hype
description: Activate 1 Interact A synthetic adrenaline supplement that increases awareness and reaction time.

name: Plated Duster
description: These loose-fitting long coats of canvas or leather are lined with metal plates, offering wearers respite from Alkenstar's dust storms and smog stains as well as modest protection against bullets and knives.

name: Platinum image of a fey noble with a bit of orichalcum
Playing Cards
description: A standard deck of cards consists of 54 cards made from thick paper contained within a paper sleeve.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Pocket Gala
description: This item appears to be a miniature stone replica of an aristocratic home or a simple castle.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Pocket Stage
description: This item appears to be a miniature replica of a theater.

name: Pocket Watch
description: This timepiece is a marvel of clockwork and miniaturization; its gears, arbor, and mainspring are immaculately crafted and tuned to maximize precision and reduce time loss.

name: Poi
source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On

name: Poison Barbs Snare

source: Pathfinder #160: Assault on Hunting Lodge Seven

source: Pathfinder #160: Assault on Hunting Lodge Seven

name: Pontoon

name: Popdust
description: Activate 1 Interact You can sprinkle popdust in an empty square adjacent to you.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Poracha Fulu
description: Folklore from near the Forest of Spirits tells of the origin of the poracha fulu.

name: Portable
description: This rune allows your armor to collapse into a disguised, portable form.

name: Portable Altar
description: This travel-ready kit contains a small altar featuring a deity's iconography.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall

name: Portable Animal Blind
description: Simple blinds consist of a series of poles with a cloth to cover them.

name: Portable Gaming Hall
description: A portable gaming hall resembles a miniature roulette wheel, except it's marked with indecipherable runes, not numbers.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Portable Hole
description: Wispy, ethereal strands of carefully spun silk make up the substance of a portable hole, which sparkles with captive beams of starlight.

name: Portable Ram (Reinforced)
description: A portable ram is a handheld, ironshod wooden beam designed to knock open doors, gates, and other similar obstacles.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Portable Seal (Lesser)
description: Activate 2 (manipulate)A portable seal is a stiff framework of copper wires and strategically placed hinges, so that when the device is snapped open it forms an instant geometric design.

description: Activate 2 (manipulate)A portable seal is a stiff framework of copper wires and strategically placed hinges, so that when the device is snapped open it forms an instant geometric design.

description: Activate 2 (manipulate)A portable seal is a stiff framework of copper wires and strategically placed hinges, so that when the device is snapped open it forms an instant geometric design.

description: Powerful firearms like the arquebus were originally used to defend fortifications or ships, mounted on casements or pintles to steady their aim and offset their recoil.

description: Activate 1 Interact No matter how carefully you open this bottle, it always lets out an audible, echoing pop.

name: Potion of Passing Fancy
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)A lesser variant of the with some interesting quirks, a potion of passing fancy is a staple of Arshean artisans, and most temples keep at least a few doses at hand.

name: Potion of Quickness
description: Activate A (manipulate) Drinking this silver potion grants you the effects of for 1 minute.

description: Activate 1 Interact Two swirling liquids fill this flask, each slightly distinct in color and brightness from the other.

name: Potion of Shared Memories
description: Activate 1 (manipulate) A potion of shared memories can transfer recollections from one creature to another.

description: Activate A (manipulate)Drinking this thick, fortifying potion grants resistance 15 against sonic damage for 1 hour.

name: Potion of Stable Form (Greater)
description: This aromatic potion is brewed from the white flowers and black roots of the magical herb moly.

name: Potion of Swimming
description: Activate A (manipulate) This potion tastes like salt water, and sandy grit settles to the bottom of its container.

name: Potion of Swimming (Greater)
description: Activate A (manipulate) This potion tastes like salt water, and sandy grit settles to the bottom of its container.

name: Potion of Truespeech
description: Activate 1 (manipulate) This sour potion enlivens your tongue with unusual flavors and uncommon eloquence, allowing you to speak and understand all languages for 4 hours after you drink it.

name: Potion of Undetectability
description: Activate A (manipulate) Drinking this dull-black liquid makes you undetectable to detection effects.

name: Potion of Water Breathing
description: Activate A (manipulate) This filmy, gray potion smells of an old fish midden and tastes even worse.

description: Activate 1 command Requirements You must have the potion patch affixed to your skin.

name: Powder
description: A bag of powder contains powdered chalk, flour, or similar materials.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Practice Target
description: While gunslingers have many methods for practicing their aim, these sturdy paper targets are excellent for tracking a gunslinger's progress over time, keeping score of how close they came to hitting the most vital spots.

name: Prankster's Perpetual Pieplate
description: Although the simple pies that fill this glass plate every minute are edible, they don't last long enough to sate hunger or provide any real nutritive value.

name: Predator's Claw
description: Activate F (concentrate) Trigger You critically succeed at an attack roll with the affixed weaponThis claw set in an iron clasp and chain is usually that of a large predator.

name: Predictable Silver Piece
description: This seemingly unremarkable, weathered silver coin bears the bust of an unnamed monarch on the face and a majestic bird on the tail.

name: Presentable
description: A garment with this rune is always clean, as though it had just been affected by .
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Presentable (Greater)
description: A garment with this rune is always clean, as though it had just been affected by .
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Preserved Moonflower
description: Activate 1 (manipulate) Access Tian Xia originThough these preserved vegetables aren't actual moonflowers, they're made using a moonflower-distilled vinegar.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

name: Preserving
description: Preserving runes are common among merchants and other travelers who are on the road for weeks or months at a time.

name: Preserving (Greater)
description: Preserving runes are common among merchants and other travelers who are on the road for weeks or months at a time.

name: Previously lost volume from a legendary author

name: Primal Scroll Case of Simplicity
description: The four different types of scroll cases of simplicity often bear adornments appropriate to their magical tradition, such as angelic wings or otherworldly lettering.

name: Primal Symbol
description: Primal spellcasters, especially druids, often wear adornments of natural materials to symbolize their connection to nature, such as rings of woven plants, tokens made from animal parts, or other symbols related to a druidic order or nature philosophy.

name: Primeval Mistletoe
description: This sprig of berry-festooned holly and mistletoe doesn't wilt or rot.

name: Primeval Mistletoe (Greater)
description: This sprig of berry-festooned holly and mistletoe doesn't wilt or rot.

name: Primordial Flame
description: Created by the Kellid goddess Sister Cinder to lead her believers out of the Age of Darkness, this hand-held lamp is constructed from animal bone, hide, and sinew, and it contains an eternal flame that requires neither fuel nor oxygen to burn.

name: Printing Press
description: The printing press is a revolutionary machine that combines movable type with a mechanical inking system and screw press, allowing for the mass production of large volumes of text.

name: Prismatic Dust
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This pigmented dust is often used to add color to the lights of a performance.

name: Prismatic Plate
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

source: Pathfinder #196: The Summer That Never Was

name: Probing Cane
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Propulsive Boots

name: Prosthesis

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Psychopomp Mask
description: These minor magic items are painted to resemble your face, or some metaphorical depiction thereof, to encourage the ushers of death to take the mask in your place.

name: Pucker Pickle
description: Activate 1 Interact Sharp and pungent, but tasty, pucker pickles were created by goblin alchemists working to avoid being eaten by larger creatures.

name: Puff Dragon
description: This cute and unassuming dragon toy activates once a creature moves into its square.

name: Pummel-Growth Toxin
description: Activate 2 Interact This substance is the result of a failed alchemical experiment to regrow a severed arm.

name: Pummeling Snare
description: This snare unleashes a trio of large stones that batter the creature entering the snare's square, dealing @Damage[6d8[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:21|basic|showDC:all]).
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Puppetmaster Extract
description: Activate 1 InteractDistilled from a trighoul's vital fluids, this gummy, ooze-like toxin springs to life when it makes contact with flesh.

name: Purgatory Emissary's Staff
source: Pathfinder #199: To Bloom Below the Web

name: Purifying Spoon (Ladle)

name: Purifying Spoon (Tablespoon)

name: Purifying Spoon (Teaspoon)
description: A phrase of luck is carved into the handle of this wooden teaspoon.

name: Purple Pepper Powder

name: Purple Worm Repellent
description: Cave worm repellent is a highly noxious oil that can be applied to a creature or sprinkled in a circle around a 10-foot-radius area.
source: Pathfinder #155: Lord of the Black Sands

name: Putrescent Glob
description: Usage affixed to a weapon Activation F envision Trigger You damage a creature that is Sickened 1 with a Strike using the affixed weapon Requirements You are an expert with the affixed weapon.

description: Activate 1 Strike Each of these unassuming sacks contains enough rotting fruit to provide a fungus leshy with 1 week's worth of rations, along with clusters of stones to help press out the fruit's juices.
source: Pathfinder Adventure: A Few Flowers More

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Rappelling Kit
description: This satchel contains all the basic equipment found in a climbing kit plus the specialized equipment—including a harness, belay device, and locking clips—needed for descents.

name: Ration Tonic
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This slender vial appears to hold clean, clear water with a faintly fruity scent.

name: Ration Tonic (Greater)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This slender vial appears to hold clean, clear water with a faintly fruity scent.

name: Rattling Bolt
description: Ammunition bolts Activate 1 Interact Sometimes when dealing with undead incursions, a more subtle approach is called for.

name: Rattling Bolt (Greater)
description: Ammunition bolts Activate 1 Interact Sometimes when dealing with undead incursions, a more subtle approach is called for.

name: Raven Band
description: This armband is woven from overlapping raven feathers, including one large feather from a kadlaka.

name: Razmiri Mask
description: This mask is made of iron, though more potent versions crafted by powerful Razmiran priests can be made of silver, gold, or even porcelain.

name: Razmiri Mask (Gold)
description: A gold Razmiri mask grants a +3 item bonus to Deception checks to or .Activate—Call Upon Razmir's Benevolence 2 (concentrate, manipulate, occult) Frequency once per minuteEffect You bend "divine" power to your will using the techniques taught you by the Razmiri priesthood.

name: Razmiri Mask (Porcelain)
description: A porcelain Razmiri mask grants a +4 item bonus to Deception checks to or .

name: Razmiri Mask (Silver)
description: A silver Razmiri mask grants a +2 item bonus to Deception checks to or .Activate—Call Upon Razmir's Benevolence 2 (concentrate, manipulate, occult) Frequency once per minuteEffect You bend "divine" power to your will using the techniques taught you by the Razmiri priesthood.

name: Razmiri Wayfinder
description: Worn on a chain around the neck, a Razmiri wayfinder functions as a compass and provides its wearer a +1 item bonus to Deception checks to Lie or Impersonate.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Reading Glyphs
description: These tattoos on your knuckles look like strange glyphs in an unknown language.

name: Reading Ring
description: A reading ring is personalized to its user and capable of reading only languages in which the user is fluent.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Reading Ring (Greater)
description: A greater reading ring is personalized to its user and capable of reading any written language and enable the wearer to comprehend what it reads.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Ready
description: A ready rune draws component pieces of a suit of armor toward one another, making it extremely fast to get into.

name: Ready (Greater)
description: A ready rune draws component pieces of a suit of armor toward one another, making it extremely fast to get into.

name: Reaper's Lancet
source: Pathfinder #157: Devil at the Dreaming Palace

name: Reaper's Shadow
description: Activate 2 (manipulate)Derived from duskwood sap tapped during the winter solstice, this toxin erodes the connection between body and soul, tricking the latter into assuming the former has already died.

name: Reaper's Spellgun
description: Activate 2 Interact, Strike A rod of blackened bone with a bulb at one end comprises a reaper's spellgun, which feels heavier than it looks.

name: Rebirth Potion
description: Activate 1 Interact A small bit from a humanoid—such as a hair, scale, or feather—steeps in the clear liquid of a rebirth potion.

name: Rebound Fulu
description: Usage affixed to a shield Activate f envision Trigger You use the Shield Block reaction with the shield to which this fulu is affixed.

name: Recording Rod (Basic)
description: This smooth metal bar is short enough to fit in one hand.
source: Pathfinder #157: Devil at the Dreaming Palace

name: Recording Rod (Reusable)
description: This smooth metal bar is short enough to fit in one hand.
source: Pathfinder #157: Devil at the Dreaming Palace

name: Recovery Bladder
description: Bulk L (8 if inflated) Activate 1 Interact Tattletail developed this tether-covered bladder to help divers in Anuli's Crater Lake recover heavy salvage or escape dangerous underwater beasts.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Red Dragon's Breath Potion (Adult)
description: This liquid contains blood from a red dragon.

name: Red Dragon's Breath Potion (Wyrm)
description: This liquid contains blood from a red dragon.

name: Red Dragon's Breath Potion (Young)
description: This liquid contains blood from a red dragon.

name: Red Hand's Satchel
description: An Red Hand's Satchel is a sturdy leather backpack with two compartments.

name: Red Thread Knot
description: This small length of red thread is knotted six times, with a loop at each end so it can either be worn as a bracelet or anklet, or hung from a strap.Activate r envision Trigger You critically fail a save Effect The knot unties one of its six knots, altering your fate in the process.

name: Red-Handed Missive
description: Activate 2 envision, Interact Composed to look like an important document, a red-handed missive is a trap used by those who suspect someone has been going through their correspondence.

name: Red-Rib Gill Mask (Greater)
description: Activate 1 Interact This mask is made from the gills of the red-rib salamander, an amphibious creature unique to Terwa Lake.

name: Red-Rib Gill Mask (Lesser)
description: Activate 1 Interact This mask is made from the gills of the red-rib salamander, an amphibious creature unique to Terwa Lake.

name: Red-Rib Gill Mask (Moderate)
description: Activate 1 Interact This mask is made from the gills of the red-rib salamander, an amphibious creature unique to Terwa Lake.

name: Redsand Hourglass
description: This platinum hourglass is filled with red sand, is decorated with imagery of roses and whippoorwills with tiny black onyx eyes, and has the ability to manipulate time.

name: Reducer Round
description: Ammunition round Activate 1 Interact This bullet is fashioned from a rubbery substance and stamped with the image of a diminutive ant twitching in surprise.

name: Refined Pesh
description: When eaten or smoked, pesh gives users a sense of well-being, sometimes with hallucinations, aggression, and exhaustion.

name: Reflected Moonlight Fulu
description: Activate r envision Trigger You fail to save against a void or death effect.

name: Reflecting Shard
description: Activate r command Trigger You are targeted by a spell of 5th level or lower Requirements You're a master in Athletics, and you have the affixed shield raised.

name: Reflecting Shard (Greater)
description: Activate r command Trigger You are targeted by a spell Requirements You're a master in Athletics, and you have the affixed shield raised.

name: Reflexive Tattoo
description: This subtle pattern of complex dots, sunbursts, and lines is difficult to make out, as it's a near match for the wearer's skin tone.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Reforging Shield
source: Pathfinder #148: Fires of the Haunted City

name: Regalia Implement

name: Reinforced Surcoat

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Reinforced Wheels
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Reinforcing Rune (Greater)
description: Reinforcing runes make a shield significantly more durable, allowing it to effectively block more powerful attacks.The shield's Hardness increases by 5, it gains an additional 80 Hit Points, and its BT increases by 40 (maximum 15 Hardness, 120 HP, and 60 BT).

name: Repair Toolkit (Superb)
description: A repair kit allows you to perform simple repairs while traveling.

description: A replacement filter for a .
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

description: A replacement filter for a .

description: A replacement filter for a .

description: Activate 1 Interact This clear, tasteless tar causes the victim to emit waves of harmful mental energy that repel other creatures.
source: Pathfinder #160: Assault on Hunting Lodge Seven

name: Resilient
description: Resilient runes imbue armor with additional protective magic.

name: Resilient (Greater)
description: Resilient runes imbue armor with additional protective magic.

name: Resilient (Major)
description: Resilient runes imbue armor with additional protective magic.

name: Resolute Mind Wrap
description: The followers of the Tan Sugi monastery understood the value of protecting the mind from the intrusion of violence and anger and infused this strip of striped green and brown cloth with their beliefs.

name: Resonant Guitar
description: Every part of this dark, shining guitar, from the strings to the soundboard, is constructed of metal.

name: Resonating Ammunition
description: Ammunition arrow, bolt Activate 1 InteractThe end of this ammunition is a metallic tuning fork with magical etchings.

name: Resonating Fork
description: This two-pronged fork of metal emits a constant low hum, vibrating slightly when touched.

name: Resonating Fork (Greater)
description: This two-pronged fork of metal emits a constant low hum, vibrating slightly when touched.

name: Resonating Fork (Major)
description: This two-pronged fork of metal emits a constant low hum, vibrating slightly when touched.

name: Restful Sleep Fulu
description: Usage affixed to a creature Activate f envision Duration 1 hour This fulu depicts the five-spoke wheel of Qi Zhong, god of magic and medicine, and burns away slowly, like incense.

name: Restful Tent
description: This four-person tent provides several benefits for those who rest within.

name: Resurrection Tea
description: Activate 1 Interact or 10 minutes (concentrate, Interact)Resurrection tea was named for its repugnant taste, said to be "strong enough to kill the living," and its incredible medicinal properties "powerful enough to raise the dead." The primary ingredients in this medicinal tea are ginseng and jujub

name: Retaliation (Greater)
description: Shields with a retaliation rune use the impact of weapons to generate blasts of explosive force that counterattack foes.

name: Retaliation (Lesser)
description: Shields with a retaliation rune use the impact of weapons to generate blasts of explosive force that counterattack foes.

description: This belt is covered in small pouches that clasp with buttons of painstakingly carved stone.

description: This belt is covered in small pouches that clasp with buttons of painstakingly carved stone.

description: This belt is covered in small pouches that clasp with buttons of painstakingly carved stone.

description: Usage affixed to armor Activate f command Requirements You have a free hand.

description: Usage affixed to armor Activate f command Requirements You have a free hand.

name: Returning
description: When you make a thrown Strike with this weapon, it flies back to your hand after the Strike is complete.

description: Activate 1 Interact Kept in an airtight spray bottle, revealing mist is an alchemical concoction that creates a sticky and clinging mist of chemicals in a @Template[cone|distance:30] when sprayed.

description: Activate 1 Interact Kept in an airtight spray bottle, revealing mist is an alchemical concoction that creates a sticky and clinging mist of chemicals in a @Template[cone|distance:15] when sprayed.

description: Activate f envision Trigger You use the affixed shield to Shield Block a melee attack Requirements You're a master in Athletics, and you have the affixed shield raised.

description: Activate f envision Trigger You use the affixed shield to Shield Block a melee attack Requirements You're a master in Athletics, and you have the affixed shield raised.

description: Usage affixed to armor Activate r envision Trigger You would take physical damage.
source: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind

name: Rhino Shot
description: Ammunition Any Activate 1 InteractThis arrow is made of polished animal horn, with the head of a rhinoceros carved in place of a traditional arrowhead.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Rhinoceros Mask
description: Covered with thick armor and bearing a thicker horn, this face mask grants you increased momentum.

name: Rhinoceros Mask (Greater)
description: Covered with thick armor and bearing a thicker horn, this face mask grants you increased momentum.

name: Rhythm Bone
description: This small, enchanted bone (most often a jaw) is usually capped with metal at its ends.

name: Rhythm Bone (Greater)
description: This small, enchanted bone (most often a jaw) is usually capped with metal at its ends.

name: Rhyton of the Radiant Ifrit
description: This exquisite, shimmering rhyton is made from volcanic glass and encrusted with rubies, garnets, and other red gemstones, with a blown glass sculpture of a snakelike fire elemental at its base.

name: Ridill
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Monsters of Myth

name: Right of Retribution
description: Devil Decipher Writing Nature, Religion Profane powers of vengeance are yours to inflict.

name: Rime Crystal
description: Slowly spinning at the center of this crystalline orb is a single snowflake, and its surface remains lightly covered in frost no matter how hot the weather is outside.

name: Rime Crystal (Greater)
description: Slowly spinning at the center of this crystalline orb is a single snowflake, and its surface remains lightly covered in frost no matter how hot the weather is outside.

description: Slowly spinning at the center of this crystalline orb is a single snowflake, and its surface remains lightly covered in frost no matter how hot the weather is outside.

name: Rime Jar

source: Pathfinder #189: Dreamers of the Nameless Spires

name: Ring of Bestial Friendship
description: The ring is made from a lock of green hair woven around several small gemstones.

name: Ring of Climbing
description: Claw-like prongs on his thick golden band bears extend to dig deep into sheer surfaces when you are Climbing.

name: Ring of Counterspells
description: This ornate silver ring bears two competing geometric designs of brightly colored and wildly clashing inlaid gemstones.

name: Ring of Discretion
description: A ring of discretion magically conceals any armor and sheathed weapons you're wearing by either turning them invisible or creating the illusion of ordinary clothes.

name: Ring of Lies
description: This plain silver ring has an almost oily sheen.

name: Ring of Maniacal Devices
description: This magic ring seems like simple tarnished brass, but it enhances your curiosity about traps and devices of all kinds.

name: Ring of Maniacal Devices (Greater)
description: This magic ring seems like simple tarnished brass, but it enhances your curiosity about traps and devices of all kinds.

name: Ring of Minor Arcana
description: This rose-gold ring is adorned in the center by a somewhat ominous-looking horned skull.
source: Pathfinder Adventure: The Fall of Plaguestone

name: Ring of Observation (Greater)
description: This simple gold ring is engraved with eyes and is inlaid with a single amber-colored cat-eye gemstone.

name: Ring of Observation (Lesser)
description: This simple gold ring is engraved with eyes and is inlaid with a single amber-colored cat-eye gemstone.

name: Ring of Observation (Moderate)
description: This simple gold ring is engraved with eyes and is inlaid with a single amber-colored cat-eye gemstone.

name: Ring of Ravenousness

name: Ring Of Recalcitrant Wishes
description: This band of interwoven gold and copper, traced with Aklo symbols, is topped with a gleaming, luminescent opal gently bleeding wisps of shadowstuff.
source: Pathfinder #162: Ruins of the Radiant Siege

name: Ring of Sigils
description: This silver band is carved with the personal sigils of different individuals, adding one to represent you when you invest it.

name: Ring of Sigils (Greater)
description: This silver band is carved with the personal sigils of different individuals, adding one to represent you when you invest it.

name: Ring of Sneering Charity
description: This gold ring seems to offer good fortune to the wearer when they are charitable to those in need, but its curse was created to tear societies apart by inflaming class resentments and discrediting good works of true charity.

name: Ring of Spell Turning
description: This golden ring has three diamonds set into its face.

name: Ring of Stoneshifting
description: This simple iron ring is faceted with a bulbous geode lined with bright purple crystals.

name: Ring of Sustenance
description: This polished wooden ring constantly refreshes your body and mind.

name: Ring of Swimming
description: This blue metal ring grants you a swim Speed equal to half your land Speed.

name: Ring of the Ram
description: This heavy iron ring is shaped to look like the head of a ram, with curling horns.

name: Ring of the Ram (Greater)
description: This heavy iron ring is shaped to look like the head of a ram, with curling horns.

name: Ring of the Tiger

name: Ring of the Tiger (Greater)
description: This ring, carved from green wood, bears carvings of tigers chasing each other through grasslands and forests.

name: Ring of the Weary Traveler
description: This fanciful golden ring has an ornate band cast with delicate, swirling decorations and is inlaid with three bright-green emeralds.
source: Pathfinder Adventure: The Fall of Plaguestone

name: Ring of Torag
description: This simple golden ring has a large, red gemstone set into it that sparkles with an inner fire.
source: Pathfinder Adventure: Crown of the Kobold King

name: Ring of Truth
description: This ring appears to be a ring of lies, but when invested, close investigation reveals angelic wings and divine creatures hidden on the face of the ring.

name: Robe of Feathers Fall
description: This dashing travel- (and beer-) stained feathered robe is the result of magic experimentation gone awry.

name: Robe of Stone

description: Activate f Interact Requirements You prepared the staff.

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Rune of Sin
description: This jagged glyph, one of the Thassilonian runes of sin, reacts to magic of a particular school (there's no rune for divination, as it was considered lesser within sin magic).

name: Rune of Sin (Envy)
description: This jagged glyph, the envy Thassilonian rune of sin, reacts to abjuration magic.

name: Rune of Sin (Gluttony)
description: This jagged glyph, the gluttony Thassilonian rune of sin, reacts to necromancy magic.

name: Rune of Sin (Greed)
description: This jagged glyph, the greed Thassilonian rune of sin, reacts to transmutation magic.

name: Rune of Sin (Lust)

name: Rune of Sin (Pride)

name: Rune of Sin (Sloth)

name: Rune of Sin (Wrath)

name: Runescribed Disk

name: Runestone

name: Rust Scrub
description: Activate 10 minutes (Interact)This salt scrub is infused with citron juice and alchemical ingredients that allow it to fight rust on metallic equipment.

description: Ammunition any Activate 1 Interact Rusting ammunition is made using a rust monster's saliva and, when activated, deals damage to objects or creatures primarily made of metal.

name: Rusting Ammunition (Moderate)
description: Ammunition any Activate 1 Interact Rusting ammunition is made using a rust monster's saliva and, when activated, deals damage to objects or creatures primarily made of metal.

name: Rusting Snare
description: This snare emits puffs of oxidizing chemicals that rapidly degrade metal items; skymetals and most precious metals are immune.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Monsters of Myth

name: Saboteur's Friend
description: Activate 1 Interact The euphemistically named saboteur's friend looks, smells, and tastes like an appetizing chocolate square.

name: Sack
description: A sack can hold up to 8 Bulk worth of items.

name: Sack of Rotten Fruit
description: Activate 1 Strike Each of these unassuming sacks contains enough rotting fruit to provide a fungus leshy with 1 week's worth of rations, along with clusters of stones to help press out the fruit's juices.
source: Pathfinder Adventure: A Fistful of Flowers

name: Sacred Valkyrie Helm
description: Lightning crackles from the wings flanking this helm, which is emblazoned with images of valkyries in the service of benevolent deities.

name: Saddlebags
description: Saddlebags come in a pair.

name: Sage's Bloom
description: Activate f (concentrate) Trigger You attempt a Nature check to but haven't rolled Requirements You're trained in Nature.

name: Sage's Lash
description: The thin, glittering strands of rope that comprise this thick belt appear to be spun gold.

name: Saints' Balm
description: Activate A Interact This luminescent paste is made from the powdered bones of a long-forgotten saint, mixed with herbs and blessed by a priest.
source: Pathfinder #152: Legacy of the Lost God

name: Sairazul Blue
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)A Sairazul blue potion is a rich navy blue in color.

name: Sakura's Sprig
description: Activate f (concentrate) Trigger You strike an unholy target with the affixed weapon Requirements You're trained in the affixed weapon.This small glowing sprig of cherry tree flowers is only granted by Sakura, the kami of Silvertree.
source: Pathfinder Society Scenario #6-05: Silver Bark, Golden Blades

name: Salve of Antiparalysis
description: Activate A (manipulate) Applying this filmy salve to a creature helps it overcome magical paralysis.

name: Salve of Antiparalysis (Greater)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate) Applying this filmy salve to a creature helps it overcome magical paralysis.

name: Sambuca
description: A sambuca is a long, covered troop bridge designed to help troops move from sea to land.

name: Sampling Ammunition
description: Ammunition arrow, bolt The head of this arrow or bolt is a pointed glass cylinder with a hollow core.

name: Sanctified Beans
description: Activate 2 Interact These roasted soybeans are blessed by a priest to ward against all various forms of otherworldly influence but are most effective against incorporeal evils, such as specters or path maidens.
source: Pathfinder #199: To Bloom Below the Web

name: Sandals of the Stag
description: These sturdy leather sandals feature straps that wrap up to the knees.

name: Sandalwood Fan
description: This ornate fan's carving depicts a particular tableau from the Plane of Wood, often of the site where the fan was created.

name: Sandcastle
description: A sandcastle comes in a cylindrical, waterproof satchel that contains densely packed fine sand.

name: Sandstorm Top
description: On Tekritanin holidays, children reenacted legendary battles of deities by playing with magical tops.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Monsters of Myth

name: Sanguine Fang
description: A pointed vampire fang hovers within this smoked-glass vial, its tip crimson with slowly dripping blood.

name: Sanguine Fang (Greater)
description: A pointed vampire fang hovers within this smoked-glass vial, its tip crimson with slowly dripping blood.

name: Sanguine Fang (Major)
description: A pointed vampire fang hovers within this smoked-glass vial, its tip crimson with slowly dripping blood.

name: Sanguine Mutagen (Greater)
description: Activate 1 Interact For 1 hour you gain greatly increased blood production, filtering out contagions and boosting your endurance but causing your body to bloat with blood.

name: Sanguine Mutagen (Lesser)
description: Activate 1 Interact For 1 minute you gain greatly increased blood production, filtering out contagions and boosting your endurance but causing your body to bloat with blood.

name: Sanguine Mutagen (Major)
description: Activate 1 Interact For 1 hour you gain greatly increased blood production, filtering out contagions and boosting your endurance but causing your body to bloat with blood.

name: Sanguine Mutagen (Moderate)
description: Activate 1 Interact For 10 minutes you gain greatly increased blood production, filtering out contagions and boosting your endurance but causing your body to bloat with blood.

name: Sanguine Pendant
description: This clear crystal pendant contains a drop of blood from a sorcerer that expands and contracts as you cast spells.

name: Sanguine Pendant (Greater)
description: This clear crystal pendant contains a drop of blood from a sorcerer that expands and contracts as you cast spells.

name: Sanitizing Pin
description: Activate f command Trigger You attempt a saving throw against a disease or poison.

name: Sargassum Phial
description: Activate 2 (manipulate)A layer of vapor swirls just below the surface of this glass container holding a large, dried heap of fungal-encrusted seaweed.

name: Sarkorian God-Caller Garb
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Sash of Books
description: This elegant black sash features stylized crimson books embroidered at either end and a set of simple tassels.
source: Pathfinder #192: Worst of All Possible Worlds

name: Sash of Prowess
description: This humble sash can be worn around the waist or across the chest.

name: Sash of Prowess (Greater)
description: This humble sash can be worn around the waist or across the chest.

name: Saurian Spike
description: This jagged, bony growth narrows to a sharp, pointed tip.

description: This jagged, bony growth narrows to a sharp, pointed tip.

name: Saurian Spike (Major)
description: This jagged, bony growth narrows to a sharp, pointed tip.

name: Savior Spike
description: Activate F (concentrate) Trigger You attempt to but haven't rolledThis pyramid-shaped spike is attached to an armor's chest piece.

name: Scapular of Shields
description: This fine scapular features the image of an ornate shield.
source: Pathfinder #192: Worst of All Possible Worlds

name: Scarab Cuirass
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Scarlet Mist
description: Activate 2 Interact Derived from a mixture of krooth venom and an agitating agent, scarlet mist causes bleeding that turns into a foaming mist.

name: Schematic Scanner
description: A schematic scanner is a complex brass device featuring multiple mounted lenses, clamps, and apertures.
source: Pathfinder #215: To Blot Out the Sun

name: Scholar's Drop
description: University students in Katapesh first used the scholar's drop to gain an edge over their academic rivals, but the candy has since spread across Golarion.

name: Scholarly Journal
description: Scholarly journals are uncommon.

name: Scholarly Journal Compendium
description: Scholarly journals are uncommon.

name: Scope of Limning
description: The dwarven gunsmiths of Dongun Hold originally created these scopes to help them clear out vermin in underground areas.

name: Scope of Truth
description: The scope of truth is a bit bigger than most to accommodate larger lenses, which have been magically prepared with tiny shards from crystal balls to reveal the truth.

name: Scorpion Whip
source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On

name: Scour
description: This gritty powder improves responsiveness but suppresses thoughts and leaves you weakened.

name: Scroll Belt
description: These belts are specially designed to allow for writing along the inside surface.

name: Scroll of 10th-rank Spell
description: Casting a Spell from a scroll requires holding the scroll in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell.

name: Scroll of 1st-rank Spell
description: Casting a Spell from a scroll requires holding the scroll in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell.

name: Scything Blade Snare
description: This snare sends a powerful series of scything blades to slice through a creature entering the snare's square, dealing @Damage[10d8[slashing]] damage (@Check[reflex|showDC:all|dc:32|basic] save).

name: Sea Touch Elixir (Greater)

description: Activate A (manipulate) This briny concoction alters the skin on your hands and feet.

description: Activate A (manipulate) This briny concoction alters the skin on your hands and feet.

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

source: Pathfinder #178: Punks in a Powder Keg

description: Each of these full-face masks is made of stitched materials—often including humanoid skin—and has a single, bulbous eye.

description: Each of these full-face masks is made of stitched materials—often including humanoid skin—and has a single, bulbous eye.

description: Each of these full-face masks is made of stitched materials—often including humanoid skin—and has a single, bulbous eye.

name: Security Badge
description: When displayed prominently, this iron badge grants you authority and gravitas.
source: Pathfinder #215: To Blot Out the Sun

name: Seed Pod of Rooted Wisdom
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This tiny magic item looks like a ripe brown fruit from a kapok tree.

name: Seeking Bracelets
description: Activate 2 envision, Interact Both beaded bracelets in this pair have an even larger bead in their center.

name: Seer's Flute
description: This ivory flute is adorned with many carvings of eyes.

name: Seer's Flute (Greater)
description: This ivory flute is adorned with many carvings of eyes.

name: Seer's Flute (Major)
description: This ivory flute is adorned with many carvings of eyes.

name: Self-Emptying Pocket
description: You never perform to an empty crowd after promising any profits to a phantom in a playhouse, sealed by holes that appear in your pockets.

name: Self-Immolating Note
description: Activate 1 Interact Access Member of a secret society This paper is crafted with an unusual formula, causing it to catch fire and self-immolate 5 minutes after being exposed to the air.

name: Sense-Dulling Hood (Greater)
description: Activate 1 Interact Sometimes, an enemy's dangerous special ability makes relatively standard sensory capabilities a liability.

name: Sense-Dulling Hood (Lesser)
description: Activate 1 Interact Sometimes, an enemy's dangerous special ability makes relatively standard sensory capabilities a liability.

name: Sensei's Parasol
source: Pathfinder #199: To Bloom Below the Web

name: Sentinel Horn
description: This curved brass horn is a virtuoso instrument with a surprisingly deep tone, etched with images of interlocking lines and swirls.

name: Sentry Fulu
description: Activate 3 command, envision, Interact A sentry fulu depicts an armed guard.

name: Serene Mutagen (Greater)
description: Activate A (manipulate)You gain inner serenity, but you find violence off-putting.

name: Serene Mutagen (Lesser)
description: Activate A (manipulate)You gain inner serenity, but you find violence off-putting.

description: Activate A (manipulate)You gain inner serenity, but you find violence off-putting.

description: Activate A (manipulate)You gain inner serenity, but you find violence off-putting.

name: Serpent Oil (Greater)
description: Activate 1 Interact This glistening oil has a green hue and tiny snake scales floating within.

name: Serpent Oil (Lesser)
description: Activate 1 Interact This glistening oil has a green hue and tiny snake scales floating within.

name: Serpent Oil (Major)
description: Activate 1 Interact This glistening oil has a green hue and tiny snake scales floating within.

description: Activate 1 Interact This glistening oil has a green hue and tiny snake scales floating within.

description: Activate 1 Interact This glistening oil has a green hue and tiny snake scales floating within.

name: Serrating
description: A serrating weapon's bladed edge separates into jagged, swirling shards that spin along the blade.

name: Serum of Sex Shift
description: Activate A (manipulate) Upon drinking this potion, your biology instantly transforms to take on a set of sexual characteristics of your choice, changing your appearance and physiology accordingly.

name: Server's Stew
description: Activate 1 Interact The type of animal tongue used in this tomato-based stew shifts from region to region, but it's always cooked with spirit of wine and seasoned with .
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Setup Snare
description: This snare is designed to divert a target's movement towards another snare or hazard.

name: Seven-Color Raw Fish Salad
description: An appetizer popularized in Goka, seven-color raw fish salad (qicai yusheng) is both fun and tasty to eat.

name: Seventh Prism (Pentagonal)
description: Activate Cast a Spell Beloved by the church of the Seventh Veil, a seventh prism is a crystal that disperses its internal light, casting an aurora of color.

name: Seventh Prism (Triangular)
description: Activate Cast a Spell Beloved by the church of the Seventh Veil, a seventh prism is a crystal that disperses its internal light, casting an aurora of color.

name: Sextant of the Night
description: This finely wrought sextant is made from silver with several onyx mirrors and shades made from thin sets of crystal glass.

name: Shade Hat
description: This comfortable and stylish wide-brimmed hat magically protects you from the worst of the heat in hot areas, even when the heat doesn't come from the sun.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Shadewither Key
description: This palm-sized talisman hangs on a string of braided bark fibers.

name: Shadow
description: Armor etched with this rune takes on a hazy black appearance.

name: Shadow (Greater)
description: Armor etched with this rune takes on a hazy black appearance.

name: Shadow (Major)
description: Armor etched with this rune takes on a hazy black appearance.

name: Shadow Ash
description: Activate Cast a Spell or successfully perform a ritual as the primary or secondary caster This small pile of ash glows with strange blue embers that coat whatever they touch with a thin layer of frost laced with veins of necrotic ichor.

name: Shadow Manse
description: This miniature dollhouse is made of dark wood with steep eaves and wide windows.

name: Shadow Signet
description: This obsidian ring allows you to partially warp your spells through the Netherworld, allowing them to strike directly at a target's body.

name: Shadowed Scale, the Jungle Secret
description: This gold-inlaid wooden mask depicts the reptilian visage of a mokele-mbembe, a jungle predator seen by the Mwangi as embodiments of nature's strength and majesty.

name: Shadowmist Cape
description: This black cape flows more like a vaporous liquid than fabric.

name: Shapespeak Mask
description: A shapespeak mask is carved into the shape of an animal, usually tailored to a species of beast that the user favors.

name: Shaping Sweet
description: Many inhabitants of the First World can shape their environment around them; weaker creatures can only make minor changes, while powerful entities such as the Eldest can remake entire landscapes.

name: Shard of the Third Seal
description: This stone fragment from the Third Seal retains a tiny sliver of that legendary item's power.
source: Pathfinder Adventure: Crown of the Kobold King

name: Shark Tooth Charm
description: Activate 1 (concentrate) This dried-seaweed bracelet is lined with charms shaped like small shark teeth.

name: Sharkskin Robe
description: This sandy-textured robe comes with sleeves that resemble dorsal fins.

name: Sharpened Canines
description: Some of your teeth have been replaced with those of a larger meat-eating predator.

name: Shell of Easy Breathing
description: This large salt-encrusted seashell is more than 2 feet across, with images of deep sea creatures carved around its edge.

name: Shell of Easy Breathing (Greater)
description: This large salt-encrusted seashell is more than 2 feet across, with images of deep sea creatures carved around its edge.

name: Shield Augmentation
description: There are numerous methods to modify shields-snarling rods to catch weapons, bladed edges, padding for nonlethal strikes, and so on-but all share basic functionality.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Shield Sconce
description: This carefully balanced metal bracket can be attached to the front or top of a shield or tower shield (but not a buckler), allowing you to carry a torch without giving up your shield or holding it in your other hand.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Shielding Salve
description: Activate 1 Interact This shimmering paste has many properties of a spell.

name: Shifter Prosthesis
description: This prosthetic arm is imbued with transmutation magic that can transform it into a weapon.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Shifting
description: With a moment of manipulation, you can shift this weapon into a different weapon with a similar form.

name: Shimmering Dust
description: Activate Cast a Spell This luminous mica dust fluoresces for a short time after being exposed to significant amounts of magical energy.

name: Shining Ammunition
description: Shining ammunition gives off a faint glow.

name: Shining Shield
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall

name: Shining Symbol
description: If you worship a deity, this golden amulet transforms into your deity's religious symbol when you invest it.

name: Shining Symbol (Greater)
description: If you worship a deity, this golden amulet transforms into your deity's religious symbol when you invest it.

name: Shining Symbol (Major)
description: If you worship a deity, this golden amulet transforms into your deity's religious symbol when you invest it.

name: Shining Wayfinder
description: A shining wayfinder is a polished silver compass blessed by the power of benevolent deities.

name: Shiver
description: A compound produced from the hallucinogenic venom of certain spiders, shiver is common in black markets.

name: Shobhad Longrifle
source: Pathfinder #173: Doorway to the Red Star

name: Shock
description: Electric arcs crisscross shock weapons, dealing an extra 1d6 electricity damage on a hit.

name: Shock (Greater)
description: Electric arcs crisscross shock weapons, dealing an extra 1d6 electricity damage on a hit.

name: Shockguard Coil
description: Usage affixed to a shield Activate F (concentrate) Trigger You Shield Block a foe's melee attack with the affixed shield.This miniature Stasian coil talisman emits small sparks when jostled.

name: Shockwave
description: Shockwave weapons magically increase their density and momentum when swung, creating a thudding impact on those nearby.

name: Shoony Shovel
description: This ornate, compact shovel has a golden handle wrapped with beautiful crimson bulette leather.

name: Shootist Bandolier
description: This leather bandolier holds up to three Repeating Hand Crossbow Magazines in leather pockets that pop open with the quick flick of a thumb.

name: Shortbread Spy
description: Activate 1 minute (Interact) Though this item looks like a simple cookie in the shape of a humanoid, it springs to life once decorated with icing or other edible substances.

name: Shot of the First Vault
description: Legends claim that some long-forgotten god stole the original bundle of shots of the First Vault from Abadar's repository.

name: Shrapnel Snare
description: This snare uses tightly wound springs, clockwork, and shrapnel to cause devastating damage.

name: Shrieking Key
description: A skull-topped metal shrieking key appears to be a , useful in place of Thieves' Tools when attempting to Pick a Lock.

name: Shrieking Skull
description: Usage affixed to a firearm or crossbow Activate a (concentrate) Requirements You're an expert in Intimidation and the affixed weapon is loaded.This dried skull of a snake is mounted atop the firearm's barrel or affixed to a crossbow's stock.

name: Shrine Inarizushi
description: Activate one minute (Interact) A splash of sacred sake in the rice vinegar used to prepare this sushi makes it a suitable offering to the goddess Daikitsu and her favored fox servants.

name: Shrinking Potion
description: Activate A (manipulate) This fungus-flavored potion conveys the effects of the spell to make you and all your gear smaller.

name: Shrinking Potion (Greater)
description: Activate A (manipulate) This fungus-flavored potion conveys the effects of the spell to make you and all your gear smaller.

name: Shuan Ji
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

name: Sibling's Coin
description: Access Member of a secret society Contrary to widespread belief, secret handshakes are not the preferred method of confirmation between secret society members, mostly because this would be obvious in the middle of a crowded street or busy tavern.

name: Siccatite Chunk
description: In its raw state, this silvery ore is either scalding hot or freezing cold.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Siccatite Ingot
description: In its raw state, this silvery ore is either scalding hot or freezing cold.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Sickle-saber
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Sifting Pan
description: A simple circular or rectangle pan with a mesh on the bottom.

name: Sight-Theft Grit
description: Activate 1 Interact This blackish grit seems to absorb light and resembles particularly dark flakes of black pepper.

name: Sighting Shot
description: Ammunition any Activate 2 command, envision Eyes are carved onto a sighting shot.

name: Sigil of the First Clan
description: This intricate gold and adamantine clasp depicts the sigil of Clan Taargick, house of the famed King Taargick, founder of Tar Taargadth.

name: Signal Whistle
description: When sounded, a signal whistle can be heard clearly up to half a mile away across open terrain.

name: Signaling Snare
description: A subtle snare used in hunting or tracking, a signaling snare often consists of carefully prepared earth, piled sand or stones, specific arrangements of vegetation, and so forth.

name: Signifier's Mask
description: This mask is often devoid of eyeholes or other decorative features.

name: Silencer
description: One of the more prolifically used devices developed in the infamous Alkenstar Gunworks, these small firearm components are capable of muffling most of the weapons' explosive sound when fired.

name: Silencing Ammunition
description: Ammunition arrow, bolt Activate 1 Interact Silencing ammunition is particularly dense and seems to dampen sounds around it.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Silencing Shot
description: Ammunition any Activate 1 (concentrate)This shimmering, golden-hued ammunition never makes any sound.

name: Silent Bell
description: Access Member of a secret society This large handbell is made from cast bronze and has a wooden handle.

name: Silent Heart
description: Abraxas teaches that the true heart is impenetrable, dedicated only to knowledge.

name: Silhouette Cloak
description: In bright light, this dark cloak shimmers with patches of color that shift and move even when the cloth is still.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Silkspinner's Shield
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Silvanshee Collar
description: A silvanshee collar appears as a collar of prismatic cloth affixed with a tiny bell, but once worn on the body or affixed to your hair, a Tiny cat wearing a similar (but non-magical) collar appears at your feet.

name: Silver Chunk
description: Silver weapons are a bane to creatures ranging from devils to werewolves.

name: Silver Crescent (Greater)
description: A piquant tamarind and chili-lime flavor infuses a silver crescent, which was first created to aid those battling the undead.

name: Silver Crescent (Lesser)
description: A piquant tamarind and chili-lime flavor infuses a silver crescent, which was first created to aid those battling the undead.

name: Silver Crescent (Moderate)
description: A piquant tamarind and chili-lime flavor infuses a silver crescent, which was first created to aid those battling the undead.

name: Silver Dragon's Breath Potion (Adult)
description: This liquid contains blood from a silver dragon.

name: Silver Dragon's Breath Potion (Wyrm)
description: This liquid contains blood from a silver dragon.

name: Silver Dragon's Breath Potion (Young)
description: This liquid contains blood from a silver dragon.

name: Silver Ingot
description: Silver weapons are a bane to creatures ranging from devils to werewolves.

name: Silver Salve
description: Activate A (manipulate)You can slather this silvery paste onto one melee weapon, one thrown weapon, or 10 pieces of ammunition.

name: Silver Snake Cane
description: This shimmery metal cane is both an assistive device and a popular companion for many zuhras.

name: Silver Tripod
description: Activate a (concentrate)This tiny, silver facsimile of a weapon tripod is usually attached to the underside of the affixed weapon's barrel.

name: Silvered Marp Fur
description: Activate Cast a SpellA marp that gnaws on silver rather than gold grows fur tipped with silver that can be further processed into a versatile spell catalyst.

name: Silversoul Bomb
source: Pathfinder #199: To Bloom Below the Web

name: Silversoul Bomb (Greater)
source: Pathfinder #199: To Bloom Below the Web

name: Silversoul Bomb (Major)
source: Pathfinder #199: To Bloom Below the Web

name: Silvertongue Mutagen (Greater)
description: Activate A (manipulate)Your features become striking, and your voice becomes musical and commanding, though emotion clouds your reason.

name: Silvertongue Mutagen (Lesser)
description: Activate A (manipulate)Your features become striking, and your voice becomes musical and commanding, though emotion clouds your reason.

description: Activate A (manipulate)Your features become striking, and your voice becomes musical and commanding, though emotion clouds your reason.

description: Activate A (manipulate)Your features become striking, and your voice becomes musical and commanding, though emotion clouds your reason.

name: Singing Bowl of the Versatile Stance
description: In true Iroran form, the simplicity of this small, inverted copper bell belies its flawlessness.

name: Singing Muse
description: Usage affixed to armor Activate r envision Trigger You attempt a Performance check.
source: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind

name: Singing Stone
description: A singing stone looks like a drinking cup made of polished rock, and it always faintly hums or keens.

name: Singularity Ammunition
description: Ammunition Any Activate 1 Interact Singularity ammunition seems to pull in the light around it, swirling along the surface in a misty pattern.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Sinister Knight
description: Sinister knight armor shrouds the wearer's identity in secrecy, allowing Crimson Reclaimers to pass among foes without being immediately unmasked.

name: Sisterstone Chunk
description: Sisterstone is a term used for two closely related ores infused by the spiritual runoff in the Field of Maidens, dusk sisterstone and scarlet sisterstone.

name: Sisterstone Ingot
description: Sisterstone is a term used for two closely related ores infused by the spiritual runoff in the Field of Maidens, dusk sisterstone and scarlet sisterstone.

name: Sixfingers Elixir (Greater)
description: Activation 1 Interact This gritty, spicy fluid causes you to grow a sixth finger on each hand and gives you a spiderlike grip.

name: Sixfingers Elixir (Lesser)
description: Activation 1 Interact This gritty, spicy fluid causes you to grow a sixth finger on each hand and gives you a spiderlike grip.

Smogger

name: Spectacles of Understanding
description: These folding, wood-framed spectacles hold flat discs of cut crystal as lenses and are held in place with thin cords that wrap around each ear, with another strap holding them around the neck while not in use.

name: Spiced Demonade

name: Spider Mold
