name: Spring-Loaded Net Launcher
description: Activate 1 Interact This small bronze cylinder is about the size of a potion bottle.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Sprite Apple (Chartreuse)
description: Activate 1 minute (Interact) A sparkling candy coating covers a sprite apple.

name: Sprite Apple (Golden)
description: Activate 1 minute (Interact) A sparkling candy coating covers a sprite apple.

name: Sprite Apple (Pink)
description: Activate 1 minute (Interact) A sparkling candy coating covers a sprite apple.

name: Sprite Apple (Teal)
description: Activate 1 minute (Interact) A sparkling candy coating covers a sprite apple.

name: Spry Sinews (Greater)
description: The tendons in your legs are uncommonly stretchy.

name: Spry Sinews (Lesser)
description: The tendons in your legs are uncommonly stretchy.

name: Spun Cloud (Black)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate) On the Elemental Plane of Air, small clouds of differing colors can sometimes float separately from other cloud formations.

name: Spun Cloud (Blue)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate) On the Elemental Plane of Air, small clouds of differing colors can sometimes float separately from other cloud formations.

name: Spun Cloud (Green)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)On the Elemental Plane of Air, small clouds of differing colors can sometimes float separately from other cloud formations.

name: Spun Cloud (Red)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)On the Elemental Plane of Air, small clouds of differing colors can sometimes float separately from other cloud formations.

name: Spun Cloud (White)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)On the Elemental Plane of Air, small clouds of differing colors can sometimes float separately from other cloud formations.

name: Spurned Lute
description: Made of a deep-brown rosewood, a spurned lute is adorned with carved flowers.

name: Spyglass
description: A typical spyglass lets you see eight times farther than normal.

name: Spyglass (Fine)
description: A typical spyglass lets you see eight times farther than normal.

name: Spyglass Eye
description: Polished to a perfect surface and incredibly clear, this special magical prosthetic eye allows you to clearly see small details as well as things a great distance away.

name: Squid Ink Sac
description: Sacs full of dark ink have been implanted inside your mouth, allowing you to spit it forth.Activate—Spray Ink 1 (manipulate) Frequency once per day Effect You splatter ink in a @Template[cone|distance:10], covering creatures and revealing ones.

name: St. Alkitarem's Eye
description: St.
source: Pathfinder #152: Legacy of the Lost God

name: Staff of Final Rest
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Staff of Final Rest (Greater)
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Staff of Final Rest (Major)
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Staff of Sun Wukong
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

name: Staff of the Black Desert
source: Pathfinder #155: Lord of the Black Sands

name: Staff of the Black Desert (Greater)
source: Pathfinder #155: Lord of the Black Sands

name: Staff of the Dreamlands
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Staff of the Dreamlands (Greater)
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Staff of the Dreamlands (Major)
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Stag's Helm
description: This impressive-looking helmet is crafted to resemble the skull of a mighty stag.

name: Stage Fright Missive
description: Activate 2 envision, Interact Composing a stage fright missive usually involves creating a scathing review, insulting letter, or embarrassing image that ridicules the recipient.

name: Stage Magician's Cloak
description: This black velvet cloak has a silvery blue iridescent lining.

name: Stalagmite Seed
description: Activate 1 (manipulate) You can throw a stalagmite seed, use it as a sling stone, or pack it into firearm ammunition.

name: Stalk Goggles
description: These black leather goggle frames have no lenses.

name: Stalk Goggles (Greater)
description: These black leather goggle frames have no lenses.

name: Stalk Goggles (Major)
description: These black leather goggle frames have no lenses.

name: Stalker Bane Snare
description: This snare explodes in a burst of cloying powder that can cling to a creature stepping into its square.

name: Stalwart's Ring
description: This fairly simple ring has no gemstone inlaid, but the band is cast to resembled a fanged wolf's head.
source: Pathfinder Adventure: The Fall of Plaguestone

name: Stampede Medallion
description: When you invest this medallion for your eidolon, it changes shape to appear as a tiny bejeweled facsimile of the eidolon, magically attached just over your eidolon's heart.

name: Stampede Medallion (Greater)
description: When you invest this medallion for your eidolon, it changes shape to appear as a tiny bejeweled facsimile of the eidolon, magically attached just over your eidolon's heart.

name: Stampede Medallion (Major)
description: When you invest this medallion for your eidolon, it changes shape to appear as a tiny bejeweled facsimile of the eidolon, magically attached just over your eidolon's heart.

name: Stanching
description: These symbols close bloody wounds.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Stanching (Greater)
description: These symbols close bloody wounds.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Stanching (Major)
description: These symbols close bloody wounds.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Stanching (True)
description: These symbols close bloody wounds.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Standard Astrolabe
description: Activate 1 minute (Interact) Astrolabes can be used for navigation in unfamiliar or featureless locations.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Standard Book of Translation (Tien)
description: The book is leather-bound and decorated with the symbol of the Lantern Lodge.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Standard of the Primeval Howl
description: These standards are always constructed from uncut wood and a leather banner painted with the visage of a snarling beast—a wolf, boar, bear, lion, dragon, or similarly imposing creature.

name: Star Chart Tattoo
description: This tattoo consists of numerous asterisks at regular intervals along the fingers of one hand, perfect for measuring stars against the horizon.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Monsters of Myth

name: Star of Cynosure
description: Activate f envision Trigger You attempt a Will save against a mental enchantment spell, but you haven't rolled yet Requirements You have master proficiency in Will saves.
source: Pathfinder #189: Dreamers of the Nameless Spires

name: Starfaring Cloak
description: The swirling folds of a starfaring cloak appear to contain the night sky, with the stars rotating hypnotically through its firmament shedding dim light to a range of 10 feet.

name: Stargazer's Spyglass
description: This ornate spyglass has a brass tube inscribed with constellations and green-tinted lens.

name: Staring Skull
description: This tattoo usually depicts a humanoid skull with staring eyes in its sockets, but any creature with two eyes and a skull is possible, such as a wolf, phoenix, or psychopomp.

name: Starless Scope
description: Even during the time of Thassilon, when the Order of the Starless Night still existed, starless scopes were uncommon.

name: Starless Scope Lens
description: A replacement lens for a .

name: Starshot Arrow (Greater)
description: Activate 1 Interact The metal of these arrows is said to have come from a star that ventured too close to Golarion and was shot down by a moonlit archer.

name: Starshot Arrow (Lesser)
description: Activate 1 Interact The metal of these arrows is said to have come from a star that ventured too close to Golarion and was shot down by a moonlit archer.

name: Starsong Nectar
description: Activate 1 Interact A liquid with the appearance of an expressive night sky and a taste that's sheer pleasure, starsong nectar grants you cheerful confidence and incredible luck for 10 minutes after you drink it.

name: Static Muscular Relay
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This glass orb has a Stasian coil in the center, allowing visible electricity to be safely seen within the glass.

name: Static Snare
description: You hide insulating crystals or other material that releases a strong static charge when the first creature enters the snare's square.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Statue Skin Salve
description: Activate 3 Interact This gritty salve can be applied to the skin of a creature to form a thin layer of smooth stone on its body for 20 minutes.

name: Steadfast Sentinel
description: Activate 1 envision This catalyst is a bird's claw soaked in a mixture of blood and grave dirt.

name: Steadyfoot Tassel
description: This handsome tassel comes in a variety of colors to match your companion's collar or bridle.

name: Steam Winch
description: This hefty winch is powered by a small steam engine and includes a 100-foot length of steel cable, which enables you to haul a heavier load than you could with a hand cranked winch or comealong.

name: Steamflight Pack
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)The steamflight pack allows its user to fly without using magic or wings.

name: Stepping Stone Shot
description: Ammunition round Activate 1 (concentrate, manipulate)A series of small stone discs pressed into a single round make up this ammunition.

name: Stepping Stone Shot (Greater)
description: Ammunition round Activate 1 (concentrate, manipulate)A series of small stone discs pressed into a single round make up this ammunition.

name: Stiletto Pen
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Stole of Civility
description: Woven from swaths of rich brocade silk and embroidered with ancient Azlanti script in golden thread, this stole imparts a noble appearance to even the homeliest of individuals when draped over the shoulders.
source: Pathfinder #152: Legacy of the Lost God

name: Stone Body Mutagen (Greater)
description: Activate A Interact This mutagen calcifies your body making it as hard as stone.

name: Stone Body Mutagen (Lesser)
description: Activate A Interact This mutagen calcifies your body making it as hard as stone.

name: Stone Body Mutagen (Moderate)
description: Activate A Interact This mutagen calcifies your body making it as hard as stone.

name: Stone Bullet
description: Activate A (manipulate) This sling bullet looks like a petrified serpent's eye.

name: Stone Circle
description: A stone circle appears to be a thumb-sized rectangular gray stone until activated.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Stone Circle (Greater)
description: A stone circle appears to be a thumb-sized rectangular gray stone until activated.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Stone Fist Elixir
description: Activate A (manipulate)Your fists become hard as stone.

name: Stone of Encouragement
description: This smooth, round, gray stone fits neatly into the palm of your hand and feels comfortable to hold regardless of the size or shape of your hand.

name: Stone of Encouragement (Greater)
description: This smooth, round, gray stone fits neatly into the palm of your hand and feels comfortable to hold regardless of the size or shape of your hand.

name: Stone of Unrivaled Skill
description: You traded your senses to a hag for unrivaled expertise stolen from various souls who were once the greatest in their field.

name: Stone of Weight
description: Also known as a loadstone, this small stone appears nonmagical and has a lovely sheen, giving the impression that it could be a valuable or a notable item or a magic stone of some kind.

name: Stonethroat Ammunition
description: Ammunition arrow, bolt Activate 1 Interact Each piece of stonethroat ammunition is tipped with an unusual yellow stone.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Stony Hag Eye
description: This item appears to be an ordinary semiprecious stone and is typically mounted on a brooch or ring, but the stone is, in fact, an eyeball.

name: Storage
description: The storage adjustment fits the armor or clothing with belts, buckles, pouches, and loops for holding and storing tools.

name: Storied Skin
description: Your skin becomes a canvas that records history as you learn it.

name: Storm Arrow
description: Activate A (manipulate)The head of this arrow is made from gleaming copper.

name: Storm Breath
description: Storm breaths are bottles of temperamental lightning captured during storms on the Plane of Air, releasing small charges of static energy any time they're touched.

name: Storm Chair
description: This traveler's chair uses Stasian technology to ride lightning.Activate—Electroball 2 (electricity, manipulate) Frequency once per hour Effect You create a ball of electricity around the chair, surrounding it in a damaging aura of electricity and using electromagnetism to briefly levitate.

name: Stormbreaker Fulu
description: Usage affixed to armor Activate f command Trigger You would be forced to move, you would be teleported, or you would take cold, electricity, or sonic damage.

name: Stormfeather
description: Usage affixed to armor Activate 1 Interact Requirements You're an expert in Acrobatics.

name: Stormshard
description: These shards of coalesced necromantic essence are sometimes found in the wake of an ancestor storm.

name: Stormshard (Greater)
description: These shards of coalesced necromantic essence are sometimes found in the wake of an ancestor storm.

name: Stormshard (Major)
description: These shards of coalesced necromantic essence are sometimes found in the wake of an ancestor storm.

name: Storyteller's Opus
description: This green spellbook with gold trim contains a cautionary story about a boy who was eaten by a wolf after he previously lied about wolf attacks.

name: Striking
description: A striking rune stores destructive magic in the weapon, increasing the weapon damage dice it deals to two instead of one.

name: Striking (Greater)
description: A striking rune stores destructive magic in the weapon, increasing the weapon damage dice it deals to two instead of one.

name: Striking (Major)
description: A striking rune stores destructive magic in the weapon, increasing the weapon damage dice it deals to two instead of one.

name: Striking Snare
description: You affix a trip line or other trigger to a group of either stones or wooden stakes to strike a creature that enters the snare's square.

name: Stumbling Fulu
description: Duration 1 hour The kitsune who first created a stumbling fulu advised the user to tuck the fulu under the target's belt for maximum effect.

name: Stunning Snare
description: You rig a snare to disorient a creature with a quick bash, leaving it with little ability to defend itself.

name: Stupor Poison
description: Activate 2 Interact Stupor poison is a more potent distillation of lethargy poison.

name: Sturdy Satchel
description: This heavy backpack of alchemically treated cloth layered over a metal mesh protects its contents from water damage and other harmful effects.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Subtle Armor
description: Using fabrics and fashion accessories, you disguise your armor to look like everyday clothing.

name: Succubus Kiss
description: Activate 1 Interact The save for addiction to succubus kiss is @Check[fortitude|dc:28|name:Succubus Kiss Addiction|traits:virulent|showDC:owner], and the addiction has the virulent trait.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Absalom, City of Lost Omens

name: Sulfur Bomb (Greater)
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Sulfur Bomb (Lesser)
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Sulfur Bomb (Major)
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Sulfur Bomb (Moderate)
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Summoning Handscroll
description: Classic summoning circles are engraved into the batons of this massive papyrus scroll.Activate f envision (spellshape) Frequency once per dayEffect If your next action is to Cast a Spell prepared from this spellbook that summons one or more creatures, you infuse one of the summoned creatures with th

name: Sun Dazzler
description: Activate 1 Interact This metallic tube has a complex array of lenses and prisms at one end and a hatch at the other.

name: Sun Goggles
description: These goggles are usually fitted with a polished piece of yellowtoned crystal, allowing the wearer some protection against the brightness of the sun.

name: Sun Herald's Stylus
description: This writing instrument was made from the spur of one of the giant divine roosters that heralds the presence of Shizuru.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

name: Sun Orchid Elixir
description: Activate A Interact When you drink this elixir, you physically become as you were in whatever phase of your youth you desire.

name: Sun Orchid Poultice
description: Activate 1 Interact The process of creating the sun orchid elixir leaves behind a large amount of thick paste with its own healing properties.

name: Sun Shot
description: Sun slings use small metal bullets covered in sharp spikes known as sun shots.

name: Sun Sight
description: Placed under the eyes like rays of light, this tattoo burns away illusions with the unmerciful brilliance of the sun.

name: Sun Wheel
description: Created by the priests of a Qadiran sect of Sarenites, the sun wheels were designed to protect the Dawnflower's followers in their quest to hunt down a dangerous cult trying to raise a spawn of the evil god Rovagug.

name: Sunflower Censer
description: This gold-and-ivory incense burner always emits a pleasant, floral-scented smoke without any need to be refilled.

name: Superior Catch Pole
description: This sturdy pole has a rope attached to one end in a loop with the other end extending to the handle.

name: Support
description: Supports, also commonly known as braces, can be applied to any of the following major joints: wrist, elbow, knee, and ankle.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Supramarine Chair
description: A supramarine chair is a wheeled, water-filled bath or tank, originally designed by merfolk, for assisting aquatic people's mobility on land.

name: Sure-Step Crampons
description: Sure-step crampons are sturdy leather boots with warm fur lining and magically augmented steel crampons that offer the wearer purchase on even the slipperiest ice slicks.

name: Sure-Step Potion
description: Activate 1 Interact The light-brown liquid of a sure-step potion helps you find your footing.

name: Surging Serum (Greater)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)Involuntary jolts and surges of energy move through the drinker's body as it restores normal muscle control.

name: Surging Serum (Lesser)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)Involuntary jolts and surges of energy move through the drinker's body as it restores normal muscle control.

name: Surging Serum (Major)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)Involuntary jolts and surges of energy move through the drinker's body as it restores normal muscle control.

name: Surging Serum (Minor)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)Involuntary jolts and surges of energy move through the drinker's body as it restores normal muscle control.

name: Surging Serum (Moderate)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)Involuntary jolts and surges of energy move through the drinker's body as it restores normal muscle control.

name: Survey Map
description: Maps are uncommon.

name: Survey Map (Atlas)
description: Maps are uncommon.

name: Swallow-Spike
description: Your armor responds to your desire to break free of a creature grabbing you by growing spikes.

name: Swallow-Spike (Greater)
description: Your armor responds to your desire to break free of a creature grabbing you by growing spikes.

name: Swallow-Spike (Major)
description: Your armor responds to your desire to break free of a creature grabbing you by growing spikes.

name: Swamp Lily Quilt
description: Activate 2 Interact This quilt is defined by its green lily-pad pattern, which is rare in Bellflower communications.

name: Swarmeater's Clasp
description: A swarmeater's clasp features carved reliefs of verminous, swarming creatures.

name: Swarmform Collar
description: This sturdy leather collar is imprinted with tessellated animal shapes.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Swarming
description: Able to copy itself many times over when thrown until the air is filled with deadly blades, a swarming weapon turns a single weapon into a shower of devastation.

name: Swarmsuit
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Swarmsuit (Impenetrable)
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Swift Block Cabochon
description: Activate R (concentrate) Trigger You would take damage from a physical attack while you are wielding the affixed shieldThis clear quartz cabochon attaches to the center of your shield.

name: Swiftmount Saddle
description: This sturdy leather saddle was designed to improve communication between mount and rider, allowing even inexperienced knights to command their mounts in battle.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall

name: Swim Fins
description: These flippers attach to your feet like tight shoes-donning or removing them requires three Interact actions.

name: Swirling Sand
description: Activate Swirling sand carries a faint trace of strange compulsions from the helical sand spire near Beachcomber.

name: Switchscythe
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Swooping Wings
description: A pair of feathered wings are anchored to your shoulder bones.

name: Symbol of Conflict
description: This tarnished necklace can be attuned only by someone who is holy or unholy.

name: Symbol of Conflict (Greater)
description: This tarnished necklace can be attuned only by someone who is holy or unholy.

name: Symbol of Conflict (Major)
description: This tarnished necklace can be attuned only by someone who is holy or unholy.

name: Tablet of Chained Souls
description: Half-formed, unreadable runes drift across this weathered stone tablet, which resembles a tombstone too eroded to be legible.

name: Tack
description: Tack includes all the gear required to outfit a riding animal, including a saddle, bit and bridle, and stirrups if necessary.

name: Tactician's Helm
description: Repurposing and enchanting a helmet worn by a battlefield commander can create a tactician's helm, imparting knowledge of battlefield tactics that feeds off your minor victories.

name: Tailor's Boll
description: Activate 2 (concentrate, manipulate) Harvested from one of the rainbow fields of the Plane of Wood, this cotton boll is filled with multicolored fibers.

name: Talented Tap Shoes
description: These stylish shoes were originally created by the Tappin' Toes Troupe, a group of tap-dancing Taldan bards who achieved massive popularity for their line dance routines.

name: Talespinner's Lyre
description: Activate 2 envision, Interact Plucking a talespinner's lyre while focusing on an event you witnessed causes the instrument to create an illusion in a @Template[emanation|distance:50] that plays out your memory of the event in real time, complete with sights, sounds, and smells.

name: Taleteller's Ring
description: Smiling faces are inscribed about this silver band.

name: Talisman Cord
description: This thin leather cord bears delicate runic markings and threads through an item that can bear affixed talismans.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Talisman Cord (Greater)
description: This thin leather cord bears delicate runic markings and threads through an item that can bear affixed talismans.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Talisman Cord (Lesser)
description: This thin leather cord bears delicate runic markings and threads through an item that can bear affixed talismans.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Talisman of the Sphere
description: This loop of adamantine can be slung on a chain to be worn as a necklace, but must be held to convey its benefits.

name: Taljjae Tassel
description: Activate f envision Trigger Your Strike with the affixed weapon was a critical success.
source: Pathfinder #199: To Bloom Below the Web

name: Taljjae's Mask (The Beast)
description: Those who gain one of Taljjae's masks, either by defeating Taljjae or some other means, are known as its understudies and gain a fraction of its power.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Monsters of Myth

name: Taljjae's Mask (The General)
description: Those who gain one of Taljjae's masks, either by defeating Taljjae or some other means, are known as its understudies and gain a fraction of its power.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Monsters of Myth

name: Taljjae's Mask (The Grandmother)
description: Those who gain one of Taljjae's masks, either by defeating Taljjae or some other means, are known as its understudies and gain a fraction of its power.

description: Those who gain one of Taljjae's masks, either by defeating Taljjae or some other means, are known as its understudies and gain a fraction of its power.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Monsters of Myth

name: Taljjae's Mask (The Hero)
description: Those who gain one of Taljjae's masks, either by defeating Taljjae or some other means, are known as its understudies and gain a fraction of its power.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Monsters of Myth

name: Taljjae's Mask (The Nobleman)
description: Those who gain one of Taljjae's masks, either by defeating Taljjae or some other means, are known as its understudies and gain a fraction of its power.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Monsters of Myth

name: Taljjae's Mask (The Wanderer)
description: Those who gain one of Taljjae's masks, either by defeating Taljjae or some other means, are known as its understudies and gain a fraction of its power.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Monsters of Myth

name: Tallowheart Mass
description: This disgusting mass of magically-infused hardened tallow is often found divided into three portions, each attached to the other by a thin tangle of fibers and hair.
source: Pathfinder Adventure: Crown of the Kobold King

name: Tangibility Resonator (Lesser)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)One of the stranger devices to come out of the University of Lepidstadt is a twisted glass contraption that hums with electricity.

name: Tangibility Resonator (Major)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)One of the stranger devices to come out of the University of Lepidstadt is a twisted glass contraption that hums with electricity.

name: Tangibility Resonator (Moderate)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)One of the stranger devices to come out of the University of Lepidstadt is a twisted glass contraption that hums with electricity.

name: Tangle Root Toxin
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)Tangle root toxin sees use to impede opponents in athletic competitions, in addition to espionage and tracking.

name: Tanglefoot Extruder
description: Activate 1 Interact This portable nozzle-and-trigger assembly based on spider spinnerets can extrude and weave alchemical adhesives into temporary constructions.

name: Taper of Sanctification
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This thin golden candle bears the symbol of a specific deity emblazoned on its surface, surrounded by the iconography of that deity's faith.

name: Tar Rocket Snare
description: You coat a small firework with a thick layer of resin and tar, so it sticks firmly onto a target.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Tarantula Ampoule
description: Activate 2 (manipulate)The dried, shrunken corpse of a giant tarantula inside this smoked glass bottle is obscured by swirling vapor and cobwebs.

name: Taster's Folly
description: Activate 1 Interact Devised to bypass detection, a dose of taster's folly consists of two compounds that aren't mixed but placed in the contents of one meal.

name: Tattletale Orb (Clear Quartz)
description: A tattletale orb is a polished crystal sphere that appears to function as a .

name: Tattletale Orb (Moonstone)
description: A tattletale orb is a polished crystal sphere that appears to function as a .

name: Tattletale Orb (Obsidian)
description: A tattletale orb is a polished crystal sphere that appears to function as a .

name: Tattletale Orb (Peridot)
description: A tattletale orb is a polished crystal sphere that appears to function as a .

name: Tattletale Orb (Selenite)
description: A tattletale orb is a polished crystal sphere that appears to function as a .

name: Tatzlwyrm's Gasp
description: Activate 2 (manipulate)Brave alchemists take great care to capture a tatzlwyrm's poisonous vapor in small vials, typically through a system of compressors that can concentrate their exhalations.

name: Tear-Away Clothing
description: Usage modifies existing clothing.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Tears of Death
description: Tears of death are among the most powerful of alchemical poisons, distilled from extracts of five other deadly poisons in just the right ratios.

name: Tears of the Last Azlanti
description: This gold necklace sports six bails, each with a different aeon stone.

name: Telekinetic Converters
description: Copper cables run from these thick leather gloves to nodes that attach to the wearer's temples, allowing a spellcaster to convert the magic they normally cast to pure psychic intention.
source: Pathfinder #189: Dreamers of the Nameless Spires

name: Ten-Foot Pole
description: When wielding this long pole, you can use Seek to search a square up to 10 feet away.

name: Tengu Feather Fan
description: Activate—Wave Fan (manipulate) Frequency once per dayEffect You cast your choice of one spell contained in your tengu feather fan.

name: Tentacle Potion (Greater)
description: Activate 1 Interact Upon consuming this mottled, foul-tasting liquid, the tentacle potion causes you to extrude a long, flexible limb of ectoplasm.

name: Tentacle Potion (Lesser)
description: Activate 1 Interact Upon consuming this mottled, foul-tasting liquid, the tentacle potion causes you to extrude a long, flexible limb of ectoplasm.

name: Tentacle Potion (Moderate)
description: Activate 1 Interact Upon consuming this mottled, foul-tasting liquid, the tentacle potion causes you to extrude a long, flexible limb of ectoplasm.

name: Terrifying Ammunition
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This black-and-gray ammunition is etched with occult symbols and tiny, grinning skulls.

name: Terror Spores
description: Activate 1 Interact Better known as the shrieking toadstool, the tragzioma fungus releases spores when disturbed by browsers, sending nearby creatures into a screaming panic that attracts opportunistic carnivores.

name: Tetsubo
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

name: Thawing Candle
description: Activate 1 (manipulate) This stubby, black candle has a wick made of a type of flammable bronze that can be found only on the Plane of Fire.

name: The Avalanche
description: Suit Keys (Dex) Alignment lawful evil The Avalanche represents unmitigated disasters, destruction that overruns all in its path.

name: The Big Sky
description: Suit Hammer (Str) Alignment chaotic good The Big Sky represents widespread change or liberation.

description: Suit Crown (Cha) Alignment chaotic evil The Liar represents obsession or treacherous love.

name: The Paladin

name: The Publican

description: Activate A (manipulate) Upon drinking this clear, refreshing potion, you can see things as they actually are.

description: A trundle wheel is used to measure distance.

name: Trustworthy Round
description: Ammunition any Activate F (concentrate)This ammunition was developed in Dongun Hold to minimize casualties to friendly fire, and is always marked by a burnished copper head or tip so it can be easily identified.

name: Truth Potion
description: Activate A (manipulate) For 10 minutes after drinking this astringent potion, you can't intentionally lie and may be compelled to tell the truth.

name: Tteokguk of Time Advancement
description: Dumplings and rice cakes float invitingly between seaweed and egg in this comforting soup.

name: Tubeworm Gland
description: Thanks to a graft from a hardy deep-sea invertebrate in your stomach, you can ingest food and water that would be toxic to others.

name: Tumbler's Belt
description: This sparkling purple belt was made for the youngest member of a family of jugglers and tumblers who traveled with the Crascondo Company.

name: Tusk and Fang Chain
description: Usage affixed to armor Activate f command Trigger You Grab or restrain a creature or become grabbed or restrained by a creature This length of silver chain has a tiger's fang on one end and the tip of a dire boar's tusk on the other.

name: Twig of Knowledge and Memory
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This tiny magic item looks like a twig from the rare mti'le tree with its swirls of reddish-gold veins through dark brown wood.

name: Twilight Lantern (Greater)
description: This elegant hooded lantern is made from onyx-black metal.

name: Twilight Lantern (Lesser)
description: This elegant hooded lantern is made from onyx-black metal.

name: Twilight Lantern (Major)
description: This elegant hooded lantern is made from onyx-black metal.

name: Twilight Lantern (Moderate)
description: This elegant hooded lantern is made from onyx-black metal.

name: Twining Chains
description: This set of chains is completely covered with spikes and sharp blades.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Twisting Gale
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

name: Twisting Twine (Greater)
description: This ball of hempen twine resists efforts to unravel it by hand.

name: Twisting Twine (Lesser)
description: This ball of hempen twine resists efforts to unravel it by hand.

name: Twisting Twine (Moderate)
description: This ball of hempen twine resists efforts to unravel it by hand.

name: Tyrant Ampoule
description: Activate 2 Interact The body of a fearsome tyrannosaurus is shrunken and contained in this bottle, its desiccated form barely constrained within the glass.

name: Tyrant's Writs
description: A spirited debate persists among scholars on whether the eponymous tyrant of this grimoire actually refers to Tar-Baphon, the necromancer Geb, or even the goddess Urgathoa herself.

name: Ugly Cute's Gift
source: Pathfinder #196: The Summer That Never Was

name: Umbraex Eye
description: Like the rest of its form, the eyes of the legendary umbraex darvakka collapse into ashes when the creature is destroyed.

name: Umbral Wings
description: This hooded cloak is soft and surprisingly durable.

name: Unbreakable Heart
description: The name of your beloved adorns this stylized image of a heart.

name: Undead Compendium
description: The best minds among the Magaambyan, Iomedaean, and Pharasmin Knights of Lastwall joined together to create these small, leather-bound journals.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall

name: Undead Detection Dye
description: Activate 1 Interact The liquid in this test tube is as clear as water.

name: Undead Scourge
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall

name: Undertaker's Manifest
description: This grim collection of spreadsheets is used both by undertakers who occasionally need to avoid the notice of their more restless clients, and by industrious necromancers looking to avoid catching the notice of cemetery guards and vigilant undertakers.

name: Underwater
description: This weapon works as well in water as it does on land.

name: Underwater firing Mechanism
description: This device replaces the attached firearm's normal firing mechanism (normally, most guns use a flintlock or matchlock firing mechanism).

name: Unending Itch
description: Activate 2 Interact Invented to cause a lengthy and unpleasant demise, this poison manifests as an itch that can't be soothed.

name: Unending Youth
description: You cease aging, and if you were older than young adult in age, you become a young adult again.

name: Unexceptional
description: Merchants traveling into Stonebreach sometimes apply this accessory rune to specific wares to avoid the notice of thieves.

name: Unfathomable Stargazer
description: An unfathomable stargazer is a handheld brass telescope etched with constellations, the patterns of which form bizarre, shifting runes.

name: Unfolding Tree House
description: Though it looks like a simple profile of a bird's wing and body carved into a flat triangle of wood, this magical object can transform into a tree house.

name: Unholy
description: An unholy rune instills fiendish power into the etched weapon.

name: Uniter of Clans
description: Resembling two hands clasped in friendship, this diplomat's badge is designed to be woven into the wearer's braided beard.

name: Unmemorable Mantle
description: This long, shoddy cloak bears a hood and a simple brass clasp.

description: This long, shoddy cloak bears a hood and a simple brass clasp.

name: Unmemorable Mantle (Major)
description: This long, shoddy cloak bears a hood and a simple brass clasp.

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

description: This violin is crafted from finely wrought rosewood that emits a strong, but pleasant, smell of salt water and ocean life.

description: Activate A (manipulate)The shaft of this arrow is covered in fine green scales, and its iron head comes to a pair of points almost like fangs.

description: Activate R (concentrate) Trigger A creature within your reach uses a manipulate or move action, makes a ranged attack, or leaves a square during a moving action it's using Requirements You are a master with the affixed weapon When you activate this resin-strengthened viper skull, make a melee Strike

name: Viridian Crown
description: The monarch of Kyonin imparts a sliver of their personality to the artifact when they are crowned ruler of the nation.
source: Pathfinder #212: A Voice in the Blight

name: Vital Earth
description: Life-infused soil from the Plane of Earth, vital earth is glittering dust you inhale that causes you to not need air or water for 24 hours.

name: Vitalizing
description: A vitalizing weapon pulses with vital energy, dealing an extra 1d6 persistent vitality damage to undead.

name: Vitalizing (Greater)
description: A greater vitalizing weapon pulses with vital energy, dealing an extra 2d6 persistent vitality damage to undead.

name: Vocal Shells
description: Used by more technologically inclined bards, ventriloquists, and other performers to throw their voices, this gadget consists of two button-sized conch shells, each containing a miniaturized mechanism designed to pick up and transmit sound.

name: Voice From The Grave
description: This onyx skull emits eerie whispers when on its own, but when held the skull enables you to speak with spirits and haunts you can see, even if you don't share a language.

name: Voicebox
description: This box contains small, magical amplifiers that allow a nonverbal character to translate thought into speech, which emits from the necklace.

name: Void Fragment
description: Activate 1 InteractHovering midair, thrumming and whispering of its power, a void fragment is a crystalline fragment of swirling colors, reminiscent of stars and deep darkness.

name: Void Mirror
description: Usage Mounted in frame The Void Mirror was created on a distant planet by a now-extinct alien cult to aid in unlocking the secrets of the Dark Tapestry.

name: Void Salts
description: Activate 1 envision This sachet is filled with a fine powder that seethes with energy distilled directly from the Void.

name: Void Shackles
description: Void shackles are built from supernatural crystals that form in the Void—materials that dig painfully into the flesh of those they restrain.
source: Pathfinder #212: A Voice in the Blight

name: Volcanic Vigor

name: Vulture's Wing
description: Activate A Cast a Spell This fan of vulture feathers scatters on an unnatural gust of wind.

name: Vyre's Bliss
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)Vyre's Bliss is a toxin that looks and tastes like fine wine.

description: This ring is utilitarian in design-indicating its martial use.
source: Pathfinder Adventure: The Fall of Plaguestone

name: Wasul Reed Mask
description: This mask is made of Darklands wasul reeds, which have been alchemically treated to enhance their air-retaining properties when submerged in water.

name: Watchful Portrait
description: Activate 1 Interact A watchful portrait appears to be an innocuous depiction of a bored noble, unassuming relative, or unknown local celebrity.

name: Water Purifier
description: This small tube of metal and glass has an opening at one end into which water can be poured, leading to a series of interconnected chambers filled with purifying agents contained between various perforated walls.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Waterproof Firearm Carrying Case
description: This buttoned, leather case protects a firearm and up to 6 rounds of ammunition from being damaged by water or other environmental effects.

name: Waterproof Journal
description: This leather-bound tome is specially treated to protect from water damage and comes with a key and a treated slipcase that bears a simple lock to keep the tome secure.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Waterproofing Wax
description: Activate Cast a Spell Many books and spellbooks are treated in this wax formula to protect them from the elements, but waterproofing wax's liquid-repellent properties can be further applied to split up a spell into useful smaller sections.

name: Waterskin
description: When it's full, a waterskin contains roughly 1 day's worth of water for a Small or Medium creature.

name: Waverider Barding
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Wax Key Blank
description: This small wooden or metal box is slightly larger than a typical large key and folds open along a hinge, revealing two halves filled with wax.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Wayfinder
description: Access member of the Pathfinder Society This compact compass repurposes ancient technology to draw fantastic powers from the mysterious magical items called aeon stones.

name: Wayfinder of Rescue
description: As a standard , but once per day you can activate it to cast on a creature other than yourself, using either the one-action or two-action version of heal as a 1st-rank spell.
source: Pathfinder Society Scenario #1-03: Escaping the Grave

name: Wayfinderfinder

name: Weapon Harness

name: Weapon of False Wounds

name: Weapon Potency (+1)

name: Weapon Potency (+2)
description: Magical enhancements make this weapon strike true.

name: Weeping Midnight

name: Wemmuth Trinket

name: Wet Shock Snare

source: Pathfinder #211: The Secret of Deathstalk Tower

name: Wheel Blades
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Wheel Spikes
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Wheelbarrow

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Wheelchair
description: A common wheelchair is ideal for everyday use but isn't designed for strenuous activity.

name: Whelming Scrimshaw
description: Activate 2 Interact An etching of some aquatic beast dragging a figure beneath the waves adorns the ivory of a whelming scrimshaw.

name: Whip of Compliance
source: Pathfinder #152: Legacy of the Lost God

name: Whip Tail
description: You have a strong, prehensile tail.

name: Whirlwind Vial

name: Whisper Briolette
description: Usage affixed to armor or to an outfit if a character has no armor Activate 2 Envision Requirements You are an expert in Stealth This teardrop-shaped gemstone has triangular facets and looks suitable for fancy attire, although close inspection shows that it's hollow.
source: Pathfinder #160: Assault on Hunting Lodge Seven

name: Whisper of the First Lie

name: Whistle of Calling
description: A whistle of calling appears to be a simple brass whistle.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall

name: White Cleome's Eye
description: Delicate engravings of spiders and cleomes decorate the silver cover of this magnifying loupe.

name: Wig of Holding
description: Wigs of holding are created from planar fibers and contain small extradimensional spaces accessible within the hair.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Wildwood Ink
description: These curving, delicate designs resemble leaves, vines, or creepers, most often wrapped around a limb, ear, or throat, or curled around specific muscles.

name: Wildwood Ink (Greater)
description: These curving, delicate designs resemble leaves, vines, or creepers, most often wrapped around a limb, ear, or throat, or curled around specific muscles.

name: Wildwood Ink (Major)

name: Wind At Your Back
description: This object can only be described as a gray, solidified, miniature cloud that feels spongy to the touch.

name: Wind Ocarina
description: Activate 1 Interact A blue finish decorates the ceramic body of a wind ocarina.

name: Wind-Catcher
description: This rune is invested by the captain or pilot of the vehicle.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Wind-Catcher (Greater)
description: This rune is invested by the captain or pilot of the vehicle.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Wind-Up Cart
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This primitive device can be cobbled together from springs, wheels, and scrap and is commonly used to carry rocks or other dead weight forward to trigger traps.

name: Wind-up Wings (Flutterback)
description: These delicate clockwork wings enable thrown weapons to soar through the air at high speeds, performing turns and other aerial maneuvers mid-flight.

name: Wind-up Wings (Homing)
description: These delicate clockwork wings enable thrown weapons to soar through the air at high speeds, performing turns and other aerial maneuvers mid-flight.

name: Windborne Platform
description: These magical platforms are used in a variety of performances.

name: Winder's Ring
description: This ring contains dozens of minute, interlocking bronze gears that buzz incessantly.

name: Wine of the Blood
description: This wine, prepared using the blood of a creature with overwhelming vitality, soothes the body, mind, and spirit with a temporary sense of euphoria and rest.

name: Winged
description: This rune is a swirling glyph on the front of the armor.

name: Winged (Greater)
description: This rune is a swirling glyph on the front of the armor.

name: Winged Sandals
description: Made from soft leather, with delicate white wings attached near the ankles, these sandals are ensorcelled with powerful air magic.

name: Wintershot
source: Pathfinder #211: The Secret of Deathstalk Tower

name: Wintershot (Heroic)
source: Pathfinder #212: A Voice in the Blight

name: Winterstep Elixir (Greater)
description: Activate 1 Interact This frigid white elixir widens your feet and lightens your steps, enabling you to walk across ice and snow without difficulty.

description: Activate 1 Interact This frigid white elixir widens your feet and lightens your steps, enabling you to walk across ice and snow without difficulty.

name: Witch Token
description: When the witch token is invested by a mortal, all of the mortal's spells, except those cast at the highest level the mortal can cast, count as 1 level higher for the purpose of counteracting other spells and being counteracted.

name: Witch's Finger
description: Activate 1 Interact Shaped like a pointed, gnarled finger on a stick, witch's finger is a frozen treat imbued with berries that lend it a blood-red hue.

name: Witchwarg Elixir (Greater)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This elixir warms your core and improves your circulation.

name: Witchwarg Elixir (Lesser)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This elixir warms your core and improves your circulation.

name: Witchwarg Elixir (Moderate)
description: Activate 1 (manipulate)This elixir warms your core and improves your circulation.

name: Witchwarg Fur
description: Activate Cast a SpellThe pelt of a witchwarg stays cold long after it leaves the creature's body.

name: Witchwyrd Beacon
description: Made of djezet, orichalcum, and luminous, resonant crystal, a witchwyrd beacon looks like a series of concentric rings mounted on rods that allow the rings to rotate independently of each other.

name: Wizard's Tower
description: A wizard's tower is a tiny gaming piece carved into the form of a stone tower.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar

name: Wolf Fang
description: Activate F (concentrate) Trigger You successfully a foe This wolf canine is bound in a strip of leather and tied to a buckle or strap of a suit of armor.

name: Wolfsbane
description: Wolfsbane appears in folklore for its link to werecreatures.

name: Wolliped Fleece
description: Activate Cast a Spell (add one action)A small bundle of wolliped fleece contains the memory of winter snows.

name: Wondrous Figurine (Bismuth Leopards)
description: This exquisitely crafted statuette is carved into the form of twin panthers climbing a tree.
source: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind

name: Wondrous Figurine (Candy Constrictor)
description: Although appearing as a multicolored piece of stick candy, this figurine bears a narrow snake head at one end and is as durable as stone.
source: Pathfinder #152: Legacy of the Lost God

name: Wondrous Figurine (Golden Lions)

description: Each one of these statuettes is 1 inch in height, carved from a specific material and taking the shape of a particular animal or animals.

name: Wondrous Figurine (Marble Elephant)
description: Finely carved from a solid piece of marble, this gleaming elephant statuette becomes a fully grown when activated.

name: Wondrous Figurine (Obsidian Steed)
description: This sinister-looking black statuette resembles a horse rearing up on its hind legs.

name: Wondrous Figurine (Onyx Dog)
description: Each one of these statuettes is 1 inch in height, carved from a specific material and taking the shape of a particular animal or animals.

description: This roughly hewn ruby figurine shimmers with a deep red hue and is carved into the likeness of an ornery hippopotamus.
source: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind

name: Wondrous Figurine, Stuffed Fox
description: This small toy fox has tufted, fluffy ears and buttons for eyes.

name: Wooden Taws
description: Wooden Taws to be fired from a Taw launcher.

name: Words of Wisdom (Greater)

source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

name: Worm Vial
description: Activate 2 Interact Opening this vial unleashes its destructive contents: a reconstituted Gargantuan purple worm.

name: Wounding
description: Weapons with wounding runes are said to thirst for blood.

name: Wounding Oil
description: Activate 1 Interact Smearing wounding oil, a crimson fluid, on a weapon causes it to smell strongly of blood and gives it the benefits of the rune for 1 minute.

name: Wrenchgear
description: The ubiquity of clockwork constructs in Alkenstar spurred the development of the wrenchgear (a shortened "wrench in the gears") by innovative criminals ("wrenchers") to create security exploits and larcenous opportunities.

name: Wrist Grappler
description: This specialized , which attaches to your wrist, connects to a spool of 50 feet of thin metal cord attached to a pack on your back.

description: This specialized , which attaches to your wrist, connects to a spool of 50 feet of thin metal cord attached to a pack on your back.

name: Writ of Authenticity
description: A typical Pathfinder writ of authenticity confirms the holder's status as a member of the Pathfinder Society and their intended business.
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide

name: Writing Set
description: Using a writing set, you can draft correspondence and scribe scrolls.

name: Writing Set (Extra Ink and Paper)
description: Extra ink and paper to refill your writing set.

description: The tip of a metallic dragon's claw is set into a band of silver.

description: Depicting a majestic dragon in flight, this tattoo imparts the endurance and majesty of those powerful creatures.

name: Yellow Musk Poison

name: Zarothrask's Contract
description: You've bargained for power with a gongorinan, but in return, you must avoid furthering demonic goals.

name: Zerk

name: Zhuazhi Bang
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide

description: This elaborate metallic webbing feels soft when wrapped around your hands and forearms.
